Overview.name: 概览 Overview
Overview.text:
对手在 Crucible 中是构成并栖居于世界中的非玩家角色。尽管名称如此，并非所有对手在本质上都是敌对的；我们只是使用“对手”一词来指代系统中的非玩家行动者。

对手与 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.DjePpoV2oJenlyTf]{概览}（玩家角色）共享大多数机械概念，包括属性值、资源、防御、技能、抗性和天赋，但对手的成长方式与玩家角色有所不同。

威胁等级描述某个对手所带来的机制挑战程度，由等级与威胁类别的乘积定义。对手的属性和难度会随着更高的等级和更高的威胁类别而成长。

威胁等级

=

等级 × 威胁乘数

威胁类别

每个威胁类别都会为对手的有效威胁等级提供一个乘数，同时也决定该对手在战斗中拥有的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.2U2k8WcnB1gbPLfd]{动作点} 数量。Crucible 系统中的威胁类别如下：

威胁类别威胁乘数动作点描述
喽啰× 0.52在某一等级下比平均敌人更弱，喽啰危险性较低，也更容易被解决——但数量可能很多。

普通

× 13某一等级下标准的难度与挑战水平。
精英× 1.54在某一等级下比平均敌人更强，精英更加危险，也更难被解决。精英出现得更为少见。
Boss× 25特别危险的敌人，代表某一等级下最高程度的挑战。大多数遭遇中都不包含 Boss。

属性成长

主角角色具有血统和背景，而对手则使用 @UUID[.qSeJNy28eK9axO7C]{分类法} 与 @UUID[.O8IesdQo8SQpIKbo]{原型} 这两个概念，它们都定义了对手的属性如何随着其威胁等级提升而成长。

对手天赋

除了其原型自动提供的天赋之外，对手还可以被赋予额外的天赋。

未来可能会有一些规则限制对手可拥有的天赋数量和阶级，但目前而言，除了其原型自动提供的天赋之外，对手拥有游戏主持人希望赋予他们的任何天赋都是可以接受的。

击败对手

对手不像主角角色那样拥有创伤或疯狂池；相反，他们承受伤害的能力完全由生命值和士气决定。

当对手的生命值池降至零时，它会变为 @Condition[dead]；或者如果游戏主持人出于叙事原因愿意，也可以变为 @Condition[incapacitated]，并且在此次遭遇中不再采取任何行动。

当对手的士气降至零时，它会变为 @Condition[broken]。一个破碎的对手会尝试逃离战场，除非其缺乏自我保存的本能，或者逃脱的可能性看起来不存在——在这种情况下，它将继续战斗至死。

Adversaries in Crucible are the non-player characters which populate and inhabit the world. Despite the name, not all adversaries are antagonistic in nature, we simply use the term "Adversary" to refer to non-player actors in the system.

Adversaries share most mechanical concepts in common with @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.DjePpoV2oJenlyTf]{Overview} (player characters) including Ability Scores, Resources, Defenses, Skills, Resistances, and Talents, but adversaries progress somewhat differently than player characters.

Threat Level describes the degree of mechanical challenge posed by a certain Adversary and is defined by the product of Level and Threat Category. An adversaries attributes and difficulty scale with higher level and higher Threat Category.

Threat Level

=

Level × Threat Multiplier

Threat Categories

Each Threat Category contributes a multiplier to the effective Threat Level of the Adversary and also determines the number of @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.2U2k8WcnB1gbPLfd]{Action Points} that the Adversary has in combat. The Threat Categories in the Crucible system are:

Threat CategoryThreat MultiplierAction PointsDescription
Minion× 0.52Weaker than average foes at a given level, minions are less dangerous and more easily dispatched - but may be numerous in quantity.

Normal

× 13The standard level of difficulty and challenge for a certain level.
Elite× 1.54Stronger than average foes at a given level, elites are more dangerous and more difficult to dispatch. Elites are more rarely encountered.
Boss× 25Especially dangerous enemies which represent the ultimate degree of challenge at a certain level. Most encounters do not contain a boss.

Attribute Scaling

Where Protagonists feature an Ancestry and Background, instead Adversaries use the concepts of @UUID[.qSeJNy28eK9axO7C]{Taxonomy} and @UUID[.O8IesdQo8SQpIKbo]{Archetype}, both of which define how the attributes of the Adversary progress as it increases in Threat Level.

Adversary Talents

Adversaries may be assigned additional Talents in addition to those automatically provided by their Archetype.

Eventually there may be some rules limiting the number and tier of Talents that an Adversary may have, but for the time being it is acceptable for Adversaries to have any talents that the Gamemaster wishes to give them in addition to the Talents automatically provided by their Archetype.

Defeating Adversaries

Adversaries do not have Wounds or Madness pools like Protagonist characters, instead their ability to withstand harm is determined entirely by Health and Morale.

When an Adversary Health pool reaches zero it becomes @Condition[dead] or, if preferred by the Gamemaster for narrative reasons, @Condition[incapacitated], and takes no further action during the encounter.

When Adversary Morale reaches zero it becomes @Condition[broken]. A Broken Adversary will attempt to flee the battlefield unless they lack instincts of self-preservation or the possibility of escape seems impossible - in which case they will continue to fight to the death.

Taxonomy.name: 分类法 Taxonomy
Taxonomy.text:
分类法用于对 Crucible 中对手的生物学进行分类。每种分类法都会定义多种基础属性：

  • 类别（例如一个生物是否属于野兽、天界生物、人型生物等）

  • 对手的基础体型（以网格空间计）

  • 跨步（以英尺计的移动速度）

  • 该生物是否能够穿戴典型的人型生物装备或施放法术

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Abilities}，用于决定基础属性

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resistances00000]{抗性}与免疫，用于定义伤害抗性如何随威胁等级成长，以及该生物是否免疫任何特定类型的伤害。

  • 所有具有此分类法的生物起始时应拥有的任何天赋

示例：大地精分类法

大地精是人型生物，通常聚集于尚武、秩序井然且纪律严明的社会中。大地精既狡诈又不妥协，因此会成为危险的敌人或强力的盟友。

大地精分类法定义了成长权重，使得力量、智力和坚韧成长得更频繁，而感知、风度和敏捷成长得更慢。

许多不同的对手会使用同一种分类法，例如 3级大地精弓箭手、4级大地精战士和 6级大地精巫医。这些对手可能各自拥有不同的 @UUID[.O8IesdQo8SQpIKbo]{原型}，因此具有不同的属性和天赋，但它们都会共享来自同一大地精分类法的通用成长路线。

Taxonomy classifies the biology of an Adversary in Crucible. Each Taxonomy defines a variety of basic properties:

  • Category (such as whether a creature is an Beast, Celestial, Humanoid, etc.)

  • Base size of an adversary (in grid spaces)

  • Stride (movement speed in feet)

  • Whether the creature can wear typical humanoid equipment or cast spells

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Abilities} which determine baseline attributes

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resistances00000]{Resistances} and Immunities which define how damage resistances scale with threat level and whether the creature is immune to any specific types of damage.

  • Any talents that all creatures with this taxonomy should start with

Example: Hobgoblin Taxonomy

Hobgoblins are humanoids which typically congregate in martial societies which are orderly and disciplined. Hobgoblins are both cunning and uncompromising, making dangerous foes or powerful allies.

The Hobgoblin Taxonomy defines scaling weights such that Strength, Intellect, and Toughness evolve more frequently while Wisdom, Presence, and Dexterity evolve more slowly.

Many different Adversaries will use the same Taxonomy, for example a Level 3 Hobgoblin Archer, Level 4 Hobgoblin Fighter, and a Level 6 Hobgoblin Witch Doctor. Each of these adversaries might have a different @UUID[.O8IesdQo8SQpIKbo]{Archetype} and therefore have different attributes and talents, but they would all share a common progression from their shared Hobgoblin Taxonomy.

Archetype.name: 原型 Archetype
Archetype.text:
原型定义了《Crucible》中对手的技能与战斗风格。每个原型还会进一步定义一个分类法，以便：

  • 细化 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{能力} 的成长权重（在分类法所定义的基础之上），

  • 定义技能成长

  • 配置任何自动获得的装备

  • 提供一组自动获得的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{天赋}

示例：战士原型

久经磨炼的近战战斗者，擅长使用单手武器装备、盾牌和重型护甲。

战士原型定义了成长权重，从而强调力量与坚韧的更快成长、存在感与敏捷的普通成长，以及感知与智力的较慢成长。

此外，战士原型还提供Martial Weapon Training、壁垒和装甲效率天赋。

许多不同的对手会使用相同的原型。例如，2级Bandit Fighter、4级Hobgoblin Fighter和7级Hellguard都共享战士原型，但它们各自拥有不同的分类法，因此具有不同的属性和天赋，不过由于战士原型，它们都共享某种通用的成长特征。

Archetype defines the skills and combat style of an Adversary in Crucible. Each Archetype further defines a taxonomy to:

  • Refine scaling weights for @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Abilities} (above and beyond those defined by the Taxonomy),

  • Define skill progression

  • Configure any automatic equipment

  • Provides a set of automatically attained @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{Talents}

Example: Fighter Archetype

Hardened melee combatants expert at wielding one-handed weaponry, shield, and heavy armor.

The Fighter Archetype defines scaling weights such that emphasize faster progression of Strength and Toughness, normal progression of Presence and Dexterity, and slower progression of Wisdom and Intellect.

Furthermore, the Fighter Archetype provides the Martial Weapon Training, Bulwark, and Armored Efficiency talents.

Many different Adversaries will use the same Archetype. For example a Level 2 Bandit Fighter, a Level 4 Hobgoblin Fighter, and a Level 7 Hellguard all share the Fighter Archetype, but they each have different Taxonomies and therefore have different attributes and talents, but all share a common aspect of progression due to the Fighter Archetype.

Ancestry.name: 血统 Ancestry
Ancestry.text:
角色创建的第一步是选择一个 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.ancestry00000000]，它用于界定 Crucible 中角色的生物学与生理特征，并赋予新创建的英雄特定的初始特质。

你可以在角色创建期间的任何时候更改角色的血统，但请注意，如果你已经选择了属性值，这样做可能会影响你当前已分配的属性值，并且可能需要你在完成角色创建之前重新选择它们。

虽然 Crucible 提供了一些示例祖裔，但它也允许使用自定义祖裔，为 GM 提供了一种将其自己的资料库包配置为角色创建期间来源的方式。要将你的资料库添加为来源，请前往 配置设置 ➤ Crucible ➤ 配置资料库来源。

祖裔特性

每个祖裔包括：

  • 一个主属性属性值（初始为 3）

  • 一个次要属性属性值（初始为 2）

  • 可选地，具有一种伤害抗性（+3）和一种伤害易伤（-3）。

  • 一个以网格空间计量的体型数值（通常为 4）

  • 一个以网格空间计量的步幅数值，用于决定初始移动速度（通常为 10）

  • 一个祖传天赋 ，赋予该祖裔角色一种特定的特殊能力或知识。

目前，Crucible 系统内置提供的祖裔没有独特的初始天赋。这些内置祖裔的独特天赋将在未来更新中加入。

The first step in character creation is selecting an @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.ancestry00000000], which classifies the biology and physiology of a character in Crucible, and grants the newly created hero specific starting traits.

You can change your character's Ancestry at any point during the character creation, but be aware that doing so may impact your currently assigned Ability Scores if you have already chosen them and that may require re-selecting them before completing your character creation.

While Crucible provides a number of example ancestries, it also allows use of custom ancestries by providing a way for GMs to configure their own compendium packs to use as a source during character creation. To add your compendium as a source, go to Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources.

Ancestry Features

Each Ancestry includes:

  • A Primary Ability Score (which begins at 3)

  • A Secondary Ability Score (which begins at 2)

  • Optionally, a Damage Resistance (+3) and a Damage Vulnerability (-3).

  • A Size value in grid spaces (typically 4)

  • A Stride value in grid spaces that determines the starting movement speed (typically 10)

  • An Ancestral Talent which grants a specific special ability or knowledge to a character of that ancestry.

Currently, the built-in Ancestries which are provided with the Crucible system do not have unique starting talents. Unique talents for these built-in ancestries will be added in a future update.

Background and Ability Scores.name: 背景与属性值 Background and Ability Scores
Background and Ability Scores.text:
每个角色都会选择一个@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.backgrounds00000]{背景}，它反映了英雄在战役剧情开始之前的文化成长环境、职业训练、迄今为止的职业经历，或其过去的其他方面。你对背景的选择会进一步强化你的角色。

背景特性

每个背景包括：

  • 新手技能（通常为2项）

  • 知识领域（通常为2项）

  • 已知语言

  • 起始天赋（通常为2项，其中一项为训练天赋）

虽然 Crucible 提供了若干示例背景，但它也允许使用自定义背景，方法是让 GM 将自己的资料库包配置为角色创建时可用的来源。要将你的资料库添加为来源，请前往 Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources。

属性值

在你选择好背景后，就该分配属性点来确定你的角色起始@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{属性值}了。

每个血统都会提供一个主属性，其初始值为 3，以及一个次要属性，其初始值为 2。其他所有属性值的初始值均为 1。每项属性值的范围都是 1 到 12，其中普通人类在该属性上的典型数值为 2。

除血统提供的起始属性值外，每个角色还拥有 9点属性点，可分配到六项属性值中的任意一项。要花费属性点，请点击目标属性右侧的向上或向下箭头。

在角色创建期间，你对任意单一属性值的提升次数最多只能为3次。属性值部分顶部的计数器会显示你还剩余多少点数可供分配。

一旦你完成角色创建并将角色提升至 1级，你所购买的起始属性值便不能再更改，但随着你继续升级，这些属性值仍然可以随时间提升。

Each character chooses a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.backgrounds00000]{Background} which reflects a hero's cultural upbringing, professional training, career to date, or other aspects of their past before the advent of the campaign's storyline. Your choice of Background further augments your character.

Background Features

Each Background includes:

  • Novice Skills (typically 2)

  • Knowledge Areas (typically 2)

  • Known Languages

  • Starting Talents (typically 2, one of which is training talent)

While Crucible provides a number of example backgrounds, it also allows use of custom backgrounds by providing a way for GMs to configure their own compendium packs to use as a source during character creation. To add your compendium as a source, go to Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources.

Ability Scores

After you have selected your background, it is time to allocate Ability Points to determine your character's starting @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Ability Scores}.

Each Ancestry provides a Primary Ability Score which begins at 3, and a Secondary Ability Score which begins at 2. All other ability scores begin at 1. The values of each Ability Score range from 1 to 12, where the typical value of this attribute for a non-remarkable Human is 2.

In addition to starting Ability Score values provided by your Ancestry, each character begins with 9 Ability Points which can be allocated towards any of the six Ability Scores. To spend Ability Points click the up or down arrows to the right of the desired Ability.

You may only increase a single Ability Score a maximum of 3 times during character creation. A counter at the top of the Ability Scores section displays how many points you have remaining to spend.

Once you have completed character creation and advanced your character to Level 1 the starting Ability Scores which you purchased can no longer be changed, but these ability scores may still be increased over time as you continue to level up.

Overview.name: 概览 Overview
Overview.text:
本章规则将引导游戏主持人和玩家完成创建角色并为游戏做准备的过程。

创建队伍

在 Crucible 中开始设置游戏时，先创建一个所有玩家角色都能加入的队伍，方法是创建一个类型为 Group 的 Actor。玩家创建他们的英雄时，将他们拖放到队伍角色卡上，把他们加入队伍。

创建队伍后，你还应当在Game Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Primary Adventuring Party中将该群组配置为“主要冒险队伍”。执行这一步后，大量依赖于识别哪个群组是当前活跃英雄队伍的机制都可以实现自动化。

创建英雄

英雄是 Crucible 中由玩家控制和扮演的角色，也称为“玩家角色”。所有英雄，即使是1级，也都是有能力的冒险者。他们聪明、有魅力、擅长运动且技巧娴熟——但还未达到令人惊叹的程度。随着角色等级提升，他们会达到不同的力量阶层，其身体、精神和社交能力将真正变得如传奇一般。Crucible 中的角色晋升基于等级。等级提升会给予额外的能力、技能和天赋点数可供分配，从而提高角色的力量与能力。Crucible 中角色的最高等级预计为18级。

角色创建是一个简单的过程，首先要创建一个类型为 Hero 的新 Actor。创建角色是一个带引导的流程，具有独特的界面，会一步一步带你完成整个过程。你可以随时点击角色创建界面右上角的“restart”按钮来重置角色创建流程。

起始等级

如果你想组织一场讲述英雄起源故事的游戏体验，那么从1级开始游戏是推荐选择。不过，如果你想直接进入一场冒险，并且角色已经是成名的冠军，那么从更高等级开始可能更合适。

如果从高于1级的等级开始，我们建议每位玩家准备几则简短轶事，用来说明他们的角色在游戏开始前解锁了哪些技能和天赋晋升。这一过程有助于通过过去发生的事件来巩固角色背景故事，并解释其英雄般的能力。

查阅本日志条目中的各页，以了解角色创建的步骤以及你将在该过程中做出的选择。

This chapter of the rules guides Gamemasters and Players through the process of creating their characters and preparing for play.

Creating a Party

Begin setting up a game in Crucible by creating a Party which the player characters can all belong to by creating an Actor with the Group type. As players create their heroes, add them to the Party by dragging-and-dropping them onto the Party sheet.

Once you have created a Party, you should also configure this group as the "Primary Adventuring Party" under Game Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Primary Adventuring Party. Taking this step allows a large number of mechanics to be automated which depend on knowing which group is the party of active Heroes.

Creating Heroes

Heroes are the characters in Crucible which are controlled and portrayed by players, also known as "player characters". All Heroes, even those at Level 1, are capable adventurers. They are smart, charismatic, athletic, and skillful - but not yet to a degree that is wondrous. As characters advance in level they attain tiers of power where their physical, mental, and social capabilities are truly legendary. Character advancement in Crucible is level-based. Increases in level grant additional Ability, Skill, and Talent points to spend which increase a character's power and capabilities. The maximum character level in Crucible is anticipated to be 18.

Character creation is an easy process which begins by creating a New Actor of the Hero type. Creating a character is a guided process with a unique interface that walks you through the process step-by-step. You may reset the character creation process at any time by clicking the "restart" button located at the top right of the character creation screen.

Starting Level

If organizing a gameplay experience that seeks to tell the origin story of heroes, starting your game at Level 1 is the recommended choice. If, however, you want to jump into an adventure with characters who are already established champions, beginning at a higher level may be more suitable.

If starting at a higher level than 1, we recommend each player prepare a set of short anecdotes which explain the skill and talent advancements that their character has unlocked prior to the start of the game. This process helps to solidify their character backstory through past events that explain their heroic capabilities.

Review the pages in this journal entry to understand the steps of character creation and the choices you will make during that process.

Level Advancement.name: 升级 Level Advancement
Level Advancement.text:
每当你的角色获得高于1的等级时，你都可以进一步提升角色的力量与能力。每提升一级，你将获得：

  • 1点属性点，可将你的某一项属性值提高1点。
  • 2点天赋点，可用于购买新的角色天赋。

获得等级后，你应当花一点时间分配这些点数，以便为面对更具挑战性、更富英雄色彩的任务做好准备。

升级发生在你的队伍完成了一定数量的里程碑时。里程碑通常围绕战略目标的完成、重要剧情时刻的到来，或击败值得关注的强敌来设定。

Crucible 通过团队角色卡支持便捷地标记里程碑，GM 可以通过从 Actor 侧边栏拖拽成员到该卡上来添加团队成员。团队组建完成后，点击“获得的里程碑”六边形中央会弹出授予提示，使 GM 能够快速添加已识别的里程碑、授予数量，以及授予该里程碑的原因。通过这种方式授予里程碑时，GM 也可以选择仅将该里程碑授予特定的团队成员。

里程碑进阶

提升等级所需的里程碑点数如下表所示：

升级

获得的里程碑适用于整个队伍，即使某些角色或玩家在达成该里程碑时并不在场也是如此。当达到升级所需的里程碑数量时，整个队伍都可以提升等级。

提升等级发生在一次休息动作期间，届时队伍中的每位成员都可以将自己的等级提高1级，分配所获得的属性点以提升其 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{属性值}，并花费额外的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{天赋} 点数。

Each time you gain a character Level beyond 1 you can further advance your character's powers and capabilities. Each additional level grants you:

  • 1 Ability Point which can increase one of your Ability scores by one.
  • 2 Talent Points which can be used to purchase new character Talents.

After gaining a level you should take a moment to invest these points so that you are prepared to face more challenging and heroic tasks.

Leveling up occurs when your party has accomplished a certain number of Milestones. Milestones are structured around the completion of strategic objectives, the arrival of significant plot moments, or the vanquishing of notable foes.

Crucible facilitates the convenient marking of milestones through the Group Actor sheet, which allows the GM to add group members to the sheet by dragging them from the Actor sidebar. After a group has been formed, clicking the center of the hex for Milestones Earned raises an award prompt, allowing the GM to quickly add an identified milestone, amount of award, and reason for the milestone being awarded. When awarding a milestone through this method, the GM may also selectively grant the milestone only to particular group members.

Leveling Up

Milestones earned apply to the entire party, even if certain characters or players were not present when the milestone was achieved. When reaching the number of milestones required to level-up, the entire party has the capability to advance in Level.

Advancing your Level happens during a Rest action, at which point each member of the party may increase their level by one, invest their granted ability point to progress their @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Ability Scores}, and spend additional @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{Talent} points.

Talents.name: 天赋 Talents
Talents.text:
@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]是你的角色在其一生过程中获得的独特能力或技能，并且随着游戏推进、你获得等级，这些能力会进一步扩展。

除了你在选择血统和背景时获得的天赋外，每个新角色还有3点初始天赋点，可用于选择独特的技能和能力。天赋是角色发展的路线图，让你能够投入到独特的径中，从而获得强力能力。

在你选择好天赋后，角色创建窗口右上角会出现“Complete”按钮。在你完成创造后，你的角色即告完成，你的选择也将最终确定，并且新创建的Actor Sheet将会打开。

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000] are unique abilities or skills that your character has gained over the course of their life, and as the game progresses are expanded upon as you gain levels.

In addition to the talents you gained when you selected an Ancestry and Background, each new character has 3 initial Talent points which can be used to select unique Skills and Abilities. Talents are a roadmap for your character's development, allowing you to invest into unique paths that provide powerful abilities.

After you have chosen your talents, the "Complete" button will appear in the top right of the character creation window. After you have completed creation, your character is complete and your selections are final, and your newly created Actor Sheet will open.

Finishing Touches.name: 收尾工作 Finishing Touches
Finishing Touches.text:
虽然严格来说，在按下“Complete”按钮后，角色创建就已经完成了，但你可能还想为你的角色补充一些细节。

在User Configuration菜单中，你可以将你新创建的英雄设为你的Player Character，这样游戏就能在某些自动化功能中自动选择该角色。例如，你可以按下C 键来快速打开你的角色卡！

起始装备

选择起始装备是开始任何冒险时都很重要的一部分。我们建议游戏主持人与玩家密切配合，通过浏览现有的装备 compendium（位于物品文件夹的 compendium 标签页中），来确定他们认为适合每个角色的基础装备。将该 compendium 中的物品拖到你新创建的角色卡上，就会将该物品分配到该角色的物品栏中。

新创建的角色会以 [[/award 25gp]] 开始他们的旅程，这会自动添加到其物品栏中。你可以将这笔初始预算用于购买起始装备。在购买初始装备时，从你的初始金币额度中扣除每件物品的完整Scaled Price。

我们预计，未来可能会加入一个引导式流程，帮助你将起始金币预算花费在初始物品上，作为角色创建的一个步骤！

需要注意的是，在添加角色装备时，你应通过点击角色卡右侧、位于编辑和删除按钮旁边的 Equip 按钮，将角色正在穿戴的物品标记为已装备。

游戏主持人也可以创建并使用他们自己的自定义物品：既可以通过侧边栏标签页创建（适用于许多角色都会使用的物品），也可以点击任意角色物品栏标签页右下角的 + 图标，为更独特、角色专属的物品进行创建。

外观与细节

角色创建完成后，最好通过点击角色卡左上角兜帽人像的图标，选择一张图片来代表你的角色。此外，在 Biography 标签页中，你可以填写一些重要细节，例如Pronouns、年代、Height、重量，并提供一段与你的英雄相配的外貌描述。

传记

作为角色创建的最后一部分，你可能希望提供一份Public Biography，供你游戏中的其他玩家查看，其中可以包含一些关于你的英雄声望和历史的事实。Private Biography部分中的任何细节都只会显示给你和你的游戏主持人，因此这里很适合用来撰写你英雄的完整背景故事。

While character creation is technically finished once the "Complete" button has been pressed, there are a few details you may wish to add to your character.

In the User Configuration menu you can set your configure your newly created Hero as your Player Character, which will allow the game to automatically choose that character for certain aspects of automation. For example, you can press the C key to quickly open your character sheet!

Starting Equipment

Choosing starting equipment is an important part of beginning any adventure. We advise Gamemasters to work closely with their players to determine what basic equipment they feel is appropriate for each character by browsing the existing Equipment compendium (found on the compendium tab in the Items folder). Dragging items from this compendium onto your newly created Actor Sheet will assign the item to that Actor's Inventory.

A newly created character begins their journey with [[/award 25gp]] which is automatically added to their inventory. You may spend this initial budget on starting equipment. As you purchase initial equipment, deduct the full Scaled Price of each item from your initial gold allowance.

We anticipate that a guided experience to spending your starting gold budget on initial items may be added as a Character Creation step in the future!

It is important that when adding character equipment you mark anything that the character is wearing as equipped by clicking on the Equip button on the right hand side of the sheet next to the edit and delete buttons.

Gamemasters can create and use their own custom Items either through the sidebar tab (for items that will be used by many characters) or by clicking the + icon on the bottom right corner of any Actor's inventory tab for more unique, character-specific items.

Appearance and Details

With character creation finished, it's a good idea to choose a picture to represent your character by clicking on the icon of the hooded figure on the upper left corner of the actor sheet. In addition, on the Biography tab, you can fill in some important details such as Pronouns, Age, Height, Weight, and provide a physical description to accompany your hero.

Biographies

As a final piece of character creation, you might wish to provide a Public Biography that other players in your game will be able to see, containing some facts about your hero's reputation and history. Any details in the Private Biography section will only be shown to you and your gamemaster, making it a useful place to write your hero's complete backstory.

Defenses.name: 防御 Defenses
Defenses.text:
防御是每个角色的一组属性，用于定义针对该角色执行某些动作有多困难。防御值越高，针对该防御执行动作就越困难。针对某项防御目标的检定若要成功，掷骰结果必须超过该防御值；若平局，则防御者成功。

Crucible 系统中的防御类型包括：

物理防御

物理防御描述生物有多难被物理攻击命中，通常是近战或远程武器打击。物理防御由四个组成部分构成。总物理防御等于：

Physical Defense

=

Armor + Dodge + Parry + Block

当一次攻击因低于或等于物理防御总值而未命中时，会根据物理防御各组成部分的比例构成，被赋予一种未命中类型。

护甲

由穿戴的装备或鳞片、甲壳等有机材料特征提供的保护。未能命中的打击若由护甲防御，则视为偏转结果。与其他物理防御结果不同，只要攻击检定不是严重失败——即比物理防御目标低超过 6——偏转仍会造成一些伤害。由偏转造成的残余伤害也称为擦击。

闪避

由身体迅捷与灵活性提供的保护。未能命中的打击若由闪避防御，则视为闪避成功结果。被闪避的攻击不会造成伤害，并会提供基于闪避的反应机会。

招架

通过使用已装备武器防备攻击所提供的保护。未能命中的打击若由招架防御，则视为招架成功结果。被招架的攻击不会造成伤害，并会提供基于招架的反应机会。

格挡

通过使用已装备的盾牌或格挡武器防备攻击所提供的保护。未能命中的打击若由格挡防御，则视为格挡成功 结果。被格挡的攻击不会造成伤害，并会提供基于格挡的反应机会。

非物理防御

三种非物理防御用于防护那些不涉及针对性动能打击的动作，而是通过其他方式承受或规避的效果。这些非物理防御的加值可以通过天赋或魔法装备获得。

坚韧

坚韧防御描述角色承受身体伤害的能力。坚韧受力量和感知修正，二者分别代表身体抗性与精神韧性。坚韧防御计算如下：

坚韧防御

=

12 + ((力量 + 感知) / 2) + 坚韧额外调整值

意志

意志防御描述角色承受精神或情感攻击的能力。意志受韧性和气场修正，二者分别代表身体硬气与精神决断。意志防御计算如下：

意志防御

=

12 + ((韧性 + 气场) / 2) + 意志额外调整值

反射

反射防御描述角色避开原本会在特定区域内发生之伤害的能力。反射受敏捷和智力修正，二者分别代表身体迅捷与思维敏捷。反射防御计算如下：

反射防御

=

12 + ((敏捷 + 智力) / 2) + 反射额外调整值

请注意，反射通常用作针对无形但仍属物理性伤害来源的防御类型，而物理防御则用于防御有形攻击。

恢复阈值

恢复阈值描述一对防御，用于决定通过治疗或鼓舞动作恢复生物资源有多困难。这些恢复阈值防御的加值可以通过天赋或魔法装备获得。由于更高的阈值会使角色更难被恢复，因此这些防御的加值会降低阈值，而不是提高它。

治疗阈值

治疗阈值描述恢复生物生命值有多困难。随着生物受创愈发严重，它们会变得更难治疗。这提供了一种损耗衡量机制，要求冒险者谨慎管理自己随时间累积的创伤 。治疗阈值计算如下：

Healing Threshold

=

12 + (Wounds / 10) - Bonus

鼓舞阈值

鼓舞阈值描述恢复生物士气有多困难。随着生物在心理上受损愈发严重，它们会变得更难被鼓舞。这提供了一种损耗衡量机制，要求冒险者谨慎管理自己随时间累积的疯狂。鼓舞阈值计算如下：

Rallying Threshold

=

12 + (Madness / 10) - Bonus

Defenses are a set of attributes for each character which define how difficult certain actions are to take against that character. The higher a defense value, the harder it is to perform an action which targets that defense. Success on a test against a defense target requires the roll to exceed the defense value, the defender is successful on a tie.

The defense types in the Crucible system are:

Physical Defense

Physical Defense describes how difficult the creature is to hit with physical attacks, typically melee or ranged weapon strikes. Physical Defense is composed of four components. Total Physical Defense is equal to:

Physical Defense

=

Armor + Dodge + Parry + Block

When an attack misses because it is less than or equal to the Physical Defense total, it is assigned a type of miss based on the proportional mixture of Physical Defense components.

Armor

Protection offered by worn equipment or organic attributes like scales or chitin. Strikes which fail to hit and are defended by Armor assume the Deflected outcome. Unlike other physical defense outcomes, Deflection still results in some damage as long as the attack roll was not a Critical Failure; more than 6 less than the Physical Defense target. The residual damage dealt from a Deflection is also called a Glancing Blow.

Dodge

Protection offered by physical quickness and agility. Strikes which fail to hit and are defended by the Dodge defense assume the Dodged outcome. Dodged attacks deal no damage and provide opportunity for dodge-based reactions.

Parry

Protection offered by guarding against an attack using an equipped weapon. Strikes which fail to hit and are defended by the Parry defense assume the Parried outcome. Parried attacks deal no damage and provide opportunity for parry-based reactions.

Block

Protection offered by guarding against an attack using an equipped shield or blocking weapon. Strikes which fail to hit and are defended by the Block defense assume the Blocked outcome. Blocked attacks deal no damage and provide opportunity for block-based reactions.

Non-Physical Defenses

The three non-physical defenses are used to protect against actions which do not involve a targeted kinetic strike and instead are withstood or avoided through some other means. Bonuses to these non-physical defenses may be obtained through Talents or magical Equipment.

Fortitude

Fortitude Defense describes a character's ability to withstand bodily harm. Fortitude is modified by Strength and Wisdom which represent physical resistance and mental resilience respectively. Fortitude defense is calculated as:

Fortitude Defense

=

12 + ((Strength + Wisdom) / 2) + Fortitude Bonus

Willpower

Willpower Defense describes a character's ability to withstand mental or emotional attacks. Willpower is modified by Toughness and Presence which represent physical grit and mental determination respectively. Willpower defense is calculated as:

Willpower Defense

=

12 + ((Toughness + Presence) / 2) + Willpower Bonus

Reflex

Reflex Defense describes a character's ability to avoid harm that would otherwise occur in a specific area. Reflex is modified by Dexterity and Intellect which represent quickness of body and rapidity of thought respectively. Reflex defense is calculated as:

Reflex Defense

=

12 + ((Dexterity + Intellect) / 2) + Reflex Bonus

Note that Reflex is typically used as the defense type for intangible - but otherwise physical - sources of harm, while Physical Defense is used to defend against tangible attacks.

Restoration Thresholds

Restoration Thresholds describe a pair of defenses which dictate how challenging it is to restore a creature's resources through healing or rallying actions. Bonuses to these Restoration Threshold defenses may be obtained through Talents or magical Equipment. Since higher thresholds make a character more difficult to heal, bonuses to these defenses lower the threshold instead of increasing it.

Healing Threshold

Healing Threshold describes how difficult it is to restore the Health of a creature. As creatures become more severely wounded, they grow more difficult to heal. This provides a measure of attrition which requires adventurers to carefully manage their accumulation of Wounds over time. Healing threshold is calculated as:

Healing Threshold

=

12 + (Wounds / 10) - Bonus

Rallying Threshold

Rallying Threshold describes how difficult it is to restore the Morale of a creature. As creatures become more psychologically damaged they become more difficult to rally. This provides a measure of attrition which requires adventurers to carefully manage their accumulation of Madness over time. Rallying threshold is calculated as:

Rallying Threshold

=

12 + (Madness / 10) - Bonus

Resources.name: 资源 Resources
Resources.text:
资源指的是一组用于表示角色福祉与行动能力的属性。每项资源都是一个“池”，具有当前值与最大值。所有资源的最小值均为零。

身体与精神生命值

维持角色的身体与精神健康是一项始终存在的挑战。Crucible 使用两个独立的资源池来表示英雄的健康状态。

生命值与创伤

角色的身体健康由两个资源池来建模。生命值是一项临时资源，初始为满值，并会在角色于战斗中承受伤害时减少。创伤是一项永久性资源，会在角色遭受严重伤害时增加。

如果生命值池降至零，角色会变为失能，并开始承受创伤。如果创伤计量达到其最大值，角色将变为死亡。

士气与疯狂

角色的精神健康同样由两个资源池来建模。士气是一项临时资源，初始为满值，并会随着角色承受压力或精神创伤而减少。疯狂是一项永久性资源，会在角色遭受严重精神压力时增加。

如果士气池降至零，角色会变为破碎，并开始承受疯狂。如果疯狂计量达到其最大值，角色将变为疯狂。

行动能力

两个资源池定义了角色在游戏情境中采取行动的能力。

动作

动作描述角色在战斗遭遇的每个回合中进行快速行动的能力。角色通常拥有 6 点动作，其全部六点都会在战斗中其回合开始时补满。

专注

专注描述角色施展非凡英雄事迹或魔法的能力。角色的专注会在其成功休息后恢复，但在战斗正酣时，专注必须谨慎使用，因为它不会自然恢复。

英雄气概

英雄气概是一种特殊的生成型资源，可让你施展壮观的魔法或英雄技艺。英雄气概会在——通常较长的——战斗遭遇过程中获得，使你能够在战斗的紧张达到顶点时，以叙事方式释放自己最强力的能力！

恢复资源

在战斗中，生命值和士气只能通过提供Restoration的动作或天赋来恢复。在战斗之外，可以使用恢复动作，该动作会消耗 10 分钟时间，并完全补满你的生命值、士气、动作和专注池。

为了减少创伤或疯狂的累积，需要进行长期休息。休息机制尚未在试玩测试一中实装。创伤与疯狂将通过何种方式、以何种速度减少，会在后续开发阶段中得到更完整的说明。

Resources refers to the family of attributes which represent a character's wellbeing and ability to act. Each resource is a "pool", featuring a current and maximum value. The minimum value for all resources is zero.

Physical and Mental Health

Maintaining the physical and mental health of your character is an ever-present challenge. Crucible uses two separate pools to represent the hero's state of wellbeing.

Health and Wounds

The physical health of a character is modeled using two resource pools. Health is a temporary resource which begins full and is decreased when a character sustains damage in combat. Wounds are a permanent resource which increase when a character suffers grievous injury.

If the Health pool is reduced to zero, the character becomes Incapacitated and begins to suffer Wounds. If the Wounds meter reaches its maximum, the character becomes Dead.

Morale and Madness

The mental health of a character is similarly modeled using two resource pools. Morale is a temporary resource which begins full and is decreased as the character suffers stress or trauma. Madness is a permanent resource which increases when a character suffers grievous mental strain.

If the Morale pool is reduced to zero, the character becomes Broken and begins to suffer Madness. If the Madness meter reaches its maximum, the character becomes Insane.

Capacity for Action

Two resource pools define a character's ability to take action during game situations.

Action

Action describes a character's capacity for rapid action during each round of a combat encounter. Characters typically have a pool of 6 Action, all six of which replenish at the start of their turn in combat.

Focus

Focus describes a character's capacity for extraordinary feats of heroism or magic. A character's Focus is replenished when they successfully rest, but during the midst of combat Focus must be used thoughtfully as it will not naturally replenish.

Heroism

Heroism is a special generated resource that allows you to perform spectacular feats of magic or heroic prowess. Heroism is earned over the course of — typically longer — combat encounters allowing you to narratively unleash your most powerful abilities once the tension of battle has peaked!

Recovering Resources

During Combat, Health and Morale may only be recovered by Actions or Talents which provide Restoration. Outside of Combat, it is possible to use the Recover action which consumes 10 minutes of time and fully replenishes your Health, Morale, Action, and Focus pools.

In order to reduce the accumulation of Wounds or Madness, long-term Rest is required. Rest mechanics are not implemented in Playtest One. The means and rate at which Wounds and Madness are reduced will be more fully articulated in a later phase of development.

Resistances and Vulnerability.name: 抗性与弱点 Resistances and Vulnerability
Resistances and Vulnerability.text:
伤害抗性允许《Crucible》中的角色比平常更能抵御伤害，或更容易承受伤害。特定类型的生物可能会对某些伤害类型表现出易伤；反过来说，一些最可怕的对手则能够无视其所受到伤害中的很大一部分。

大多数对某种伤害类型具有抗性的生物，都会对其他某种伤害类型存在易伤——如果你遇到一种特别善于承受你攻击的生物，就换个战术！

伤害类型

Crucible 系统使用以下 12 种伤害类型，每一种都对应一种抗性或易伤。此外，每种伤害类型还对应一种相关的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleConditio.JournalEntryPage.conditionsOvervi]{状态}，这种状态可能作为该伤害类型的后果而产生，通常是由于一次重击导致的。

伤害抗性

当一个动作造成伤害时，该伤害可能会被目标生物拥有的抗性数值所减少。这一抗性数值甚至可能将该动作造成的伤害降低至零！

示例：伤害抗性

假设一个机械自动体——黄铜哨兵——对挥砍伤害具有 +5 抗性。如果黄铜哨兵受到一次造成13 点挥砍伤害的攻击，则实际造成的伤害会降低为8 点挥砍伤害。

伤害易伤

当生物对所受的某种伤害类型具有易伤时，造成的伤害值会按该易伤数值增加。该伤害增幅受到原始伤害值的限制；对易伤目标造成的最大伤害为原始伤害值的两倍。

示例：伤害易伤

假设一个不稳定的火元素对寒冷伤害具有 -20 易伤。如果在应用易伤之前，该元素受到7 点寒冷伤害，则最终结果将为14 点寒冷伤害。

伤害免疫

在某些特殊情况下，生物可能对某种伤害类型完全免疫。在这种情况下，无论伤害数值有多高，该生物都不会受到此类型的伤害。

Damage Resistance allows a character in Crucible to shrug off or succumb to more damage than normal. Specific creature types may be vulnerable to certain types of damage, conversely some of the most terrifying adversaries are ones that can ignore significant portions of damage that they take.

Most creatures which are resistant to a certain damage type are vulnerable to some other damage type - if you encounter a creature which is overly effective at withstanding your blows - switch tactics!

Damage Types

The Crucible system uses the following 12 Damage Types, each of which has a corresponding Resistance or Vulnerability. Additionally, each damage type has an associated @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleConditio.JournalEntryPage.conditionsOvervi]{Condition} which can be caused as a consequence of that damage type, usually as a result of a Critical Hit.

Damage Resistance

When an Action deals damage, that damage may be reduced by an amount of Resistance that the target creature has. This amount of resistance may even reduce the damage caused by the Action to be zero!

Example: Damage Resistance

Suppose a mechanical automaton, a Brass Sentinel, has resistance of +5 to Slashing damage. If the Brass Sentinel receives an attack that deals 13 Slashing damage, the effective damage dealt is reduced to 8 Slashing Damage.

Damage Vulnerability

When a creature is vulnerable to a type of damage dealt, the amount of damage dealt is increased by the amount of the vulnerability. This increase in damage is limited by the base amount of damage dealt; maximum damage against a vulnerable target is two times the amount of damage dealt.

Example: Damage Vulnerability

Suppose a volatile Fire Elemental has vulnerability of -20 to Cold damage. If the elemental is dealt 7 Cold damage before vulnerability is applied, the total result will be 14 Cold damage.

Damage Immunity

In exceptional cases, a creature may be entirely Immune to a certain damage type. In this case, the creature never takes damage of that type no matter its magnitude.

Ability Scores.name: 属性值 Ability Scores
Ability Scores.text:
属性值大致体现了角色在身体与精神能力上的各个面向。在 Crucible 系统中，所有骰检都会受到进行该检定的角色至少一项属性值的修正。属性值也用于计算角色的若干次级属性，例如 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Defenses00000000]{防御} 和 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resources0000000]{Resource} 资源池。

Crucible 系统中使用的属性值如下所述，其设计遵循一种对称性，这种对称性同时体现在角色卡和天赋树中。六项属性值进一步分为身体属性与精神属性：前者描述肉体能力，后者描述认知或灵性能力。每个大类中的三项属性值又分别归类为力量、韧性或敏捷属性。

力量属性

力量（身体）与感知（精神）属于力量属性，用于描述施加力量的能力。

韧性属性

强韧（身体）与风度（精神）属于韧性属性，用于描述承受压力的能力。

敏捷属性

敏捷（身体）与智力（精神）属于敏捷属性，用于描述迅速行动的能力。

属性值通常介于 1 到 12 之间。对于游戏设定中的普通人而言，2 或 3 的数值较为常见。数值为 1 表示该方面弱于平均水平，而 12 或更高则通常只属于超自然实体或举世无双的英雄。

某些生物在极少数情况下，某项属性值可能为 0，表示该能力对该生物并不适用。这会以显著的方式改变该生物适用的规则，如下所述。

力量

力量是一项身体力量属性，用于描述生物的体能、肌力与威势。力量会影响坚韧防御、携带能力，以及使用具有蛮力特性的武器装备。力量每有 1 点，基础生命值增加 2。

高力量的角色通常能够完成体现强大体能的壮举。他们可以挥舞超大或重型武器装备，穿戴厚重的护甲，或凭借蛮力从身体上压制对手。

力量为 0 的生物无法对周围世界施加物理影响。它们不能拥有装备，也不能与物体进行物理交互。它们不能执行任何仅以力量、强韧与敏捷这三项身体属性值进行加成的动作。

强韧

强韧是一项身体韧性属性，用于描述肉体的强健与顽强。强韧会影响坚韧防御。强韧每有 1 点，基础生命值增加 4。

高强韧的角色通常能够承受相当程度的身体压力，在艰难情境中展现毅力与耐力。他们可以在危险的核心地带屹立不倒，凭借顽强意志维持或突破战斗前线。

强韧为 0 的生物是虚体，或不具备任何有意义的物理形态。它们没有生命值池，且既不会陷入 @Condition[weakened]，也不会 @Condition[dead]。它们本应拥有的任何生命值，都会改为计入其士气池。若其士气降至 0，该生物会变为 @Condition[incapacitated]。

敏捷

敏捷是一项身体敏捷属性，体现移动的灵活性与精确性。敏捷会影响行动时的先攻、物理防御中的闪避部分、反射防御，以及使用具有灵巧特性的武器装备。

高敏捷的角色通常行动迅速，更重视移动的速度与精确，而非纯粹的力量。他们可能使用便于灵活移动或具备远程能力的武器，力求在敌人还来不及出手前就抢占机动优势。

敏捷为 0 的生物天生迟缓笨重。它们的先攻始终为 0，且不能执行任何带有反应标签的动作。

感知

感知是一项精神力量属性，用于描述生物信念的力量、知识的深度与耐心。感知会影响意志防御和专注池的大小。感知每有 1 点，基础士气增加 2。

高感知的角色通常会深思熟虑地行动，展现出耐心与判断力，选择在最能发挥优势的理想时机介入。一旦行动，他们便会带着坚定信念，投入自己所选择的道路。

感知为 0 的生物没有智能，无法对周围世界施加精神或灵性影响。它们既不能获得也不能生成英雄气概，且不能执行任何仅以感知、风度与智力这三项精神属性值进行加成的动作。

风度

风度是一项精神韧性属性，用于描述生物的人格力量、决心与自信。风度会影响意志防御和专注池的大小。风度每有 1 点，基础士气增加 4。

高风度的角色能够激励自己和他人做出伟大的英雄壮举，部分依靠的正是“事情能够成功”的纯粹信念来克服障碍。这类英雄所散发的气场，能够让盟友产生类似的信心，或在对手心中播下疑虑。

风度为 0 的生物没有自我意识，也不具备有意义的认知形态。它们既不能影响他人的思想，也不会被外界影响自身行为。它们没有士气池，且既不会 @Condition[broken]，也不会 @Condition[insane]。它们本应拥有的任何士气，都会改为计入其生命值池。

智力

智力是一项精神敏捷属性，体现思维速度与行动决断。智力会影响行动时的先攻、反射防御，以及专注池的大小。

高智力的角色对各种情况都具有极强的适应能力。他们运用出色的问题解决与决策能力进行临机应变，并整合已学得的知识来指导果断行动。通过预判并智胜对手，他们能够在任何冲突中占据上风。

智力为 0 的生物缺乏专注或快速决策的能力。它们没有专注，且不能执行任何需要专注的动作。

Ability Scores approximate facets of a character's physical and mental capability. All dice checks in the Crucible system are modified by at least one ability score of the character performing the test. Ability Scores are also used to calculate a number of secondary attributes for your character, such as @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Defenses00000000]{Defenses} and @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resources0000000]{Resource} pools.

The ability scores used in the Crucible system are described below, following a designed symmetry that is reflected both on the character sheet as well as in the talent tree. The six ability scores are further divided into physical attributes which describe bodily capabilities and mental attributes which describe cognitive or spiritual capabilities. The three ability scores within each division are classified as power, resilience, or quickness attributes.

Power Attributes

Strength (physical) and Wisdom (mental) are power attributes which describe capability to exert force.

Resilience Attributes

Toughness (physical) and Presence (mental) are resilience attributes which describe capability to withstand strain.

Quickness Attributes

Dexterity (physical) and Intellect (mental) are quickness attributes which describe capability to act swiftly.

Ability scores generally range from 1 to 12. A score of 2 or 3 would be typical for the median person inhabiting the game setting. A score of 1 indicates an area of weakness compared to the median, while a score of 12 or higher is reserved for supernatural entities or peerless heroes.

Some creatures may rarely have a score of zero in a particular ability score, denoting cases where a certain ability is not relevant for a particular creature. This alters the rules for that creature in a meaningful way, as described below.

Strength

Strength is a physical power attribute describing a creature's potency, brawn and might. Strength affects Fortitude defense, carrying Capacity, and the use of weaponry with the Brute trait. Each point of Strength increases base Health by 2.

Characters with high Strength are typically capable of feats of physical prowess. They may wield oversized or heavy weaponry, wear heavy suits of armor, or use their brawn to physically subdue their opponents.

Creatures with zero Strength are incapable of exerting physical influence on the world around them. They may not possess equipment nor can they physically interact with objects. They may not perform any Action which scales only using the physical ability scores of Strength, Toughness, and Dexterity.

Toughness

Toughness is a physical resilience attribute describing physical hardiness and tenacity. Toughness affects the Fortitude defense. Each point of Toughness increases base Health by 4.

Characters with high Toughness can typically withstand considerable physical strain, demonstrating both grit and endurance in demanding situations. They may thrive amidst the center of danger, using their tenacity to hold or break the frontlines of combat.

Creatures with zero Toughness are incorporeal or otherwise have no meaningful physical form. They have no Health pool and can become neither @Condition[weakened] nor @Condition[dead]. Any amount of Health they would have possessed contributes to their Morale pool instead. The creature becomes @Condition[incapacitated] if their Morale reaches zero.

Dexterity

Dexterity is a physical quickness attribute that reflects agility and precision of movement. Dexterity affects Initiative in taking action, the Dodge component of Physical Defense, Reflex defense, and the use of weaponry with the Finesse trait.

Characters with high Dexterity typically act swiftly, favoring quickness and precision of movement over pure power. They may wield weapons that allow for nimble movement or offer ranged capabilities, seeking to outmaneuver their foes before they even get a chance to act.

Creatures with zero Dexterity are inherently sluggish or ponderous. Their Initiative is always zero and they may not perform any actions with the Reaction tag.

Wisdom

Wisdom is a mental power attribute describing a creature's force of conviction, depth of knowledge, and patience. Wisdom affects Willpower defense and size of Focus pool. Each point of Wisdom increases base Morale by 2.

Characters with high Wisdom typically act deliberately, demonstrating patience and judgment to intervene at the ideal moment where leverage is greatest. When they do act, they do so with conviction and commitment to their chosen path.

Creatures with zero Wisdom are non-sapient and incapable of exerting mental or spiritual influence on the world around them. They can neither obtain nor generate Heroism and they may not perform any Action which scales only using the mental ability scores of Wisdom, Presence, and Intellect.

Presence

Presence is a mental resilience attribute describing a creature's force of personality, resolve, and self-belief. Presence affects Willpower defense and the size of Focus pool. Each point of Presence increases base Morale by 4.

Characters with high Presence can inspire themselves and others to feats of great heroism, overcoming obstacles, in part, through the sheer belief that things are possible. The aura of such heroes can instill similar belief in allies or foment doubts in the minds of adversaries.

Creatures with zero Presence have no sense of self or meaningful cognitive form. They can neither influence the thoughts of others nor have their own behavior influenced. They have no Morale pool and can become neither @Condition[broken] nor @Condition[insane]. Any amount of Morale they would have possessed contributes to their Health pool instead.

Intellect

Intellect is a mental quickness attribute that reflects speed of thought and decisiveness of action. Intellect affects Initiative in taking action, the Reflex defense, and the size of Focus pool.

Characters with high Intellect are highly adaptable to various circumstances. They apply excellent problem solving and decision making skills to think on-the-fly and synthesize learned knowledge to guide decisive action. By anticipating and outwitting their opponent they can gain the upper hand in any conflict.

Creatures with zero Intellect lack the ability to concentrate or make rapid decisions. They have no Focus and cannot perform any action which requires it.

Talents.name: 天赋 Talents
Talents.text:
天赋代表某个角色可能拥有的独特能力组合，并在技能晋升之外提供进一步的自定义与成长空间。随着角色不断晋升，天赋让他们能够更清晰地定义自己的定位，并稳步增强力量。新创建的角色开始时拥有少量天赋点，并会在每次升级时获得更多点数。

除 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{角色创建} 流程之外，你可以随时通过打开天赋标签页并点击“Open Talent Tree”按钮，访问角色的天赋树。

与天赋树的交互方式类似于普通 Foundry VTT 使用中与场景的交互。使用鼠标右键拖动来平移天赋树，并使用鼠标滚轮进行缩放。左键点击任意节点都会将其展开，以揭示其中可能包含的天赋。

左键点击某个天赋会在你有可用点数时购买该天赋，而右键点击则会将该天赋从你的角色中移除。

你可以随时点击底部的 Reset 按钮，重置你在天赋树上的购买内容。

树形布局

Crucible 的天赋树被划分为六个区域，每个区域代表一种不同的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{属性}，它会影响这些天赋的成长及其他方面。

天赋树由若干子部分构成，帮助你为角色规划成长与晋升路线。

节点

天赋树的每个分区都由若干节点构成，每个节点可包含一个或多个天赋。靠近两个分区边界的节点通常会包含与这两个属性值主题都相关的能力。

起始节点位于最内圈，其中包含的天赋通常是天赋树后续天赋的前置条件。这些起始天赋最适合被视为塑造角色特色的第一步，使你的角色在其特殊能力组合方面有别于其他角色。

天赋

天赋是天赋树中的最小单位。每个天赋都会赋予你的角色特定能力或加值。许多天赋都有必须在购买前满足的要求，例如达到一定的属性加值，或在某项技能上达到一定程度的训练。

训练天赋

训练天赋是天赋节点的一种特殊类型，可为技能提供晋升，或推进武器或手艺训练。武器或手艺训练天赋允许你的角色使用特定武器，或制作特定类型的图纸；技能训练天赋则会授予以下收益：

加值

等级

Scale

-4

未受训

你在这项技能上的水平，明确地说就和一个完全没有接受过相关教育或职业训练的普通人一样。

0

新手

你已经接受了这项技能各个领域中通用基础实践的训练。

+1

熟练工

你已达到一定程度的进阶训练，并了解这项特定技能中一些较不常见的原理。

+2

行家

你已经超越了职业训练的一切界限。关于你的技能，别人已没有什么还能教给你的了。剩下的只有不断完善你的理解。

+3

大师

你已精通这项技能。关于它已无更多可学。

招牌天赋

位于天赋树外缘的天赋节点包含招牌天赋，即像“咒刃”或“恐惧领主”这样的强力加值，它们提供标志性的能力。招牌天赋代表了选择它们所需能力的集大成者，并横跨两个属性值相互映照。获取一个招牌天赋会与其配对的属性值建立桥梁，让你无论是否已经购买较低阶的天赋，都能继续朝该分区推进你的成长路线。

Talents represent unique combinations of abilities a particular character may have, and provide a level of customization and progression beyond skill advancement. Talents allow characters to define their role more clearly as they advance, growing steadily in power. Newly created characters begin with a small number of Talent Points, gaining more points at each level.

Outside of the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation} process, you can access the Talent Tree for a character at any time by opening the Talents tab and clicking the "Open Talent Tree" button.

Interaction with the talent tree is similar to interaction with Scenes in ordinary Foundry VTT usage. Pan the tree using right-click and drag, and use mouse-wheel to zoom in and out. Left clicking any Node will expand it to reveal the Talents it may contain.

Left-clicking a Talent purchases that talent if you have points available, while right-clicking it will remove that talent from your character.

You may reset your purchases on the Talent Tree at any time by clicking the Reset button at the bottom.

Tree Layout

Crucible's Talent Tree is divided into six sections, with each section representing a different @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Ability} which affects scaling and other aspects of those talents.

The Talent Tree is composed of several subcomponents which help you plot growth and progression for your character.

Nodes

Each sextant of the Talent tree is composed of a number of Nodes which can contain one or more Talents. A Node which lie closer to the border between two sextants will often feature abilities which relate to the themes of both ability scores.

Starting Nodes occur at the inner-most ring, and contain talents that are often prerequisites for later talents in the tree. These starter talents are best thought of as the first steps in defining what makes your character different from another in terms of their specific set of special abilities.

Talents

Talents are the smallest unit of the talent tree. Each talent grants your character-specific abilities or bonuses. Many Talents have requirements which must be met before they can be purchased, such as attaining a certain level of Ability bonus or degree of training in a Skill.

Training Talents

Training talents are specific types of talent nodes that grant advancements to Skills, or progress Weapon or Tradecraft training. Weapon or Tradecraft Training Talents authorize your character to use particular weapons or to craft particular types of schematics, Skill Training Talents award the following benefits:

Bonus

Rank

Scale

-4

Untrained

You are decidedly as good at this skill as the average person who has absolutely no education or professional training related to it.

0

Novice

You have received training in the basic practices common across all parts of that skill.

+1

Journeyman

You've reached some degree of advanced training and know some of the less common principles of that particular skill.

+2

Adept

You have exceeded all the bounds of professional training. There is nothing more about your skills that you can learn from others. All that is left is to perfect your understanding.

+3

Master

You have mastered this skill. There is nothing more to learn about it.

Signature Talents

Talent nodes at the outer edges of the Talent Tree contain Signature Talents, powerful bonuses that "Spellblade" or "Dread Lord" which offer iconic abilities. Signature Talents represent the culmination of the abilities required to select them, and are mirrored across two ability scores. Taking a Signature Talent forms a bridge to its paired ability score, allowing you to continue your path of progression into that sextant regardless of whether you have already purchased lower-tier Talents.

Ancestry.name: 血统 Ancestry
Ancestry.text:
血统用于界定 Crucible 中角色的生物学与生理特征。奇幻设定中可能会有各种可供玩家扮演为角色的种族。Crucible 支持为这些选项分别定义在叙事和机制上都适合你自己游戏的血统。

创建血统

Crucible 并不是为某个特定游戏设定而设计的。鼓励游戏主持人创建或修改血统，以契合自己世界的背景。要在 Crucible 中配置一种血统，请创建一个新的物品，并将其类型设为血统。填写血统配置表，选择一个主属性、一个副属性，并可选地选择两种不同伤害类型的抗性与易伤。每一种血统要么同时拥有抗性与易伤，要么两者都没有。

每种血统包括：

  • 一个主属性值（初始为 3）

  • 一个副属性值（初始为 2）

  • 一个以网格为单位的体型数值（通常为 4）

  • 一个以网格为单位的跨步数值，用于决定初始移动速度（通常为 10）

  • 可选：对某种伤害类型具有伤害抗性（+3 抗性）——如果选择了伤害抗性，则必须选择一种伤害易伤。

  • 可选：对某种伤害类型具有伤害易伤（-3 易伤）——如果选择了伤害易伤，则必须选择一种伤害抗性。

  • 一个祖裔天赋，赋予该血统角色某种特定的特殊能力或知识。

内置血统

为了试玩测试，Crucible 提供了以下这些典型奇幻角色扮演设定中常见的血统。以下表格展示了初始试玩测试中提供的一组示例血统：

灵活血统

Crucible 允许使用自定义血统，为此它提供了一种方式，让游戏主持人能够配置自己的资料库包，使其在角色创建期间作为来源使用。要将你的资料库添加为来源，请前往配置设置 ➤ Crucible ➤ 配置资料库来源。

角色扮演游戏通过讲述卓越而独特的英雄故事来激励并震撼我们。生物学特征并不能保证身体属性，种族也不应被视为完全同质化或单一化的存在（除非叙事上有此意图）。游戏主持人可以并且应当对血统进行修改或自定义，以适应他们与玩家想要讲述的故事。请将祖裔特征视为建议，而非要求。

Alex（一名玩家）打算扮演一名兽人，而在其旅程开始时，这名角色并不算特别强健，反而异常睿智。在这种情况下，示例兽人血统所提供的初始3 力量与2 强健属性值，就与 Alex 希望的角色发展方向不一致。游戏主持人可以与 Alex 一起创建一个兽人血统的变体，提供不同的初始属性值，例如将主属性从力量改为感知。

Ancestry classifies the biology and physiology of a character in Crucible. Fantasy settings may feature a spectrum of species which are playable as characters. Crucible supports defining Ancestries for each of these options which are narratively and mechanically appropriate for your own game.

Creating Ancestries

Crucible is not designed for a specific game setting. Gamemasters are encouraged to create or modify Ancestries to fit the lore of their own worlds. To configure an Ancestry in Crucible, create a new Item with the Ancestry type. Fill out the Ancestry configuration sheet to select a primary Ability score, a secondary Ability score, and optionally Resistance and Vulnerability to two different damage types. Every Ancestry may either have both a Resistance and a Vulnerability, or neither.

Each Ancestry includes:

  • A Primary Ability Score (which begins at 3)

  • A Secondary Ability Score (which begins at 2)

  • A Size value in grid spaces (typically 4)

  • A Stride value in grid spaces that determines the starting movement speed (typically 10)

  • Optional: A Damage Resistance to a certain type of damage (+3 resistance) — If a Damage Resistance is selected, a Damage Vulnerability MUST be selected.

  • Optional: A Damage Vulnerability to a certain type of damage (-3 vulnerability) — If a Damage Vulnerability is selected, a Damage Resistance MUST be selected.

  • An Ancestral Talent which grants a specific special ability or knowledge to a character of that ancestry.

Included Ancestries

Flexible Ancestry

Crucible allows use of custom ancestries by providing a way for GMs to configure their own compendium packs to use as a source during character creation. To add your compendium as a source, go to Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources.

Role-playing games inspire and thrill us with tales of heroes who are exceptional and unique. Biological traits do not guarantee physical attributes, nor are species meant to be homogenous or monolithic (unless narratively intended). Gamemasters are empowered and encouraged to modify or customize Ancestries to suit the stories they and their players wish to tell. Consider Ancestral traits as suggestions rather than requirements.

Alex (a player) intends to roleplay as an Orc who, at the beginning of their journey, is not particularly tough but instead unusually wise. In such cases the initial Ability Scores of 3 Strength and 2 Toughness that the example Orcish Ancestry provides are at odds with the character development Alex desires. The Gamemaster can work with Alex to create a variation of the Orcish ancestry which offers different starting Ability Scores, for example by swapping the Primary Ability from Strength to Wisdom.

Background.name: 背景 Background
Background.text:
背景定义了英雄在游戏故事事件发生之前的文化成长环境、职业训练、迄今为止的生涯，以及其过去的其他方面。这些内容旨在赋予角色更丰富的深度，并在一定程度上解释其特定技能组合与能力的来源。

创建背景

Crucible 并非为某个特定游戏设定而设计。鼓励游戏主持人创建或修改背景，以契合其自身世界的背景 lore。要在 Crucible 中配置一个背景，请创建一个新的 Item，并将其类型设为 背景 。填写背景配置表，以选择四项习得的技能，这些技能起始为新手阶，以及一项习得的天赋。

每个背景包括：

  • 新手技能（通常为 2 项）

  • 知识领域（通常为 2 项）

  • 已知语言

  • 天赋（通常至少包含一项武器训练天赋和一项额外天赋）

示例背景

下表展示了一些示例背景，这些背景在许多奇幻 RPG 设定中都很常见。

作为游戏主持人和故事讲述者，你应当与玩家协作，创建适合他们个人故事的背景。

Background defines the cultural upbringing, professional training, career to date, and other aspects of a hero's past before the events of the game's story. These are intended to give depth to a character and some measure of explanation to the origins of their particular skillset and capabilities.

Creating a Background

Crucible is not designed for a specific game setting. Gamemasters are encouraged to create or modify Backgrounds to fit the lore of their own worlds. To configure a Background in Crucible, create a new Item with the Background type. Fill out the Background configuration sheet to select four acquired Skills which begin at Novice tier and one acquired Talent.

Each Background includes:

  • Novice Skills (typically 2)

  • Knowledge Areas (typically 2)

  • Known Languages

  • Talents (typically at least one weapon training talent and one additional talent)

Knowledge Areas.name: 知识领域 Knowledge Areas
Knowledge Areas.text:
知识领域（有时也简称为“知识”）是一些特定强化，用于体现英雄在某些专业训练方面尤为突出的理解。虽然大多数知识领域来自于在 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{角色创建} 期间所选择的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.backgrounds00000]{背景}，但角色在成长过程中也可能通过其他方式获得知识领域。

知识领域作为 Crucible 的一种机械层面内容，仍在实现与开发中，并且可能会在接下来的数次迭代中发生变化。

虽然知识领域不会提供特定的机械加值，但它们经常会与技能检定结合使用：

  • 有时，知识可以替代原本所需的技能检定。

  • 有时，知识会为尝试进行的技能检定提供某些恩惠。

  • 有时，知识甚至可能是尝试进行技能检定的前置条件。

Knowledge Areas (or sometimes just called "Knowledges") are specific enhancements that reflect notable areas of a hero's understanding of some specialized training. While most knowledge areas come as a result of a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.backgrounds00000]{Background} selected during @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation}, it is possible to attain knowledge areas in other ways during character progression.

Knowledge areas are still being implemented and developed as a mechanical aspect of Crucible and may change over the course of the next several iterations.

While knowledge areas do not grant a specific mechanical bonus, they are often used in combination with skill checks:

  • Sometimes, a Knowledge will substitute for a Skill Check that would otherwise be required.

  • Sometimes, a Knowledge will provide certain Boons towards the attempted Skill Check.

  • Sometimes, a Knowledge may be a prerequisite condition for even attempting a Skill Check.
