Skills.name: 技能 Skills
Skills.text:
技能代表你的角色所受的教育或职业训练程度。这些技能可能是在其 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.uCwStnXHoUCV2TrK]{背景} 中习得的，也可能来自其人生经历的其他方面。当角色选择一个训练天赋时，技能会获得进展。在 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{角色创建} 期间，某些训练天赋会在选择背景时授予。

有关训练天赋的更多信息可见 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{天赋}。

探索技能

运动

运动技能代表应对并克服身体挑战的能力。这可能包括攀爬、奔跑或游泳等穿越困难地形的行为，也可能包括力量、耐力或柔韧性的壮举。

察觉

察觉衡量的是你将感官输入转化为有用信息的能力。拥有高察觉的角色能够注意并解读他人可能忽略的细节，也能迅速识别并应对威胁。

潜行

潜行涵盖有效藏匿、无声移动、伪装自己，以及以其他方式利用环境隐藏自身存在的能力。受过潜行训练的人专注于寻找不被注意的方法，无论是在夜晚独自潜行穿过黑暗小巷，还是在拥挤舞厅的庆典中融入人群。

荒野

精通荒野的人学会在无处可栖时搭建庇护所，辨别哪些水可以安全饮用、哪些不行，在最恶劣的地方寻找食物来源，并以其他方式在严酷环境中生存。

知识技能

奥术

无论教育重心在于魔法还是宗教，奥术都涵盖对深奥知识的研究。学习奥术的人会掌握形而上学的基本原理，研究灵体与神祇、符文理论与仪式、混沌与秩序的本质，以及魔法与灵性力量如何影响社会与文化的历史。

医疗

医疗的研究具有很强的实践性，重点在于研究构成活体生物的机械与生物材料组成部分、可能困扰它们的疾病，以及治疗创伤和病症的最佳方法。

科学

科学关注物理现象，并通过逻辑、理性、数学与系统化观察的视角审视世界。科学的学习者会学习提出并验证理论，分析实体物品与机械的构造，并运用数学思维。

社会

社会技能最常用于研究或理解社交情境中的细微层面。受过社会学识教育的人会研究促成社会结构的各种因素。社会知识可用于建立历史或社会政治背景，判断特定个体的社会等级，或以其他方式推断某个人或地点与其最可能相关的影响因素之间的联系。

社交技能

欺瞒

欺瞒最常在角色试图说谎或误导他人、伪造文书，或揭穿他人编造的谎言时发挥作用。专门研习欺瞒的人往往是政客、外交官、间谍、盗贼，或其他那些必须灵活对待真相的职业人士。

外交

外交最常用于说服他人接受你的看法。这项技能常见于深谙政治之道者或有影响力的演说家，外交使人能够运用修辞与情感诉求来激励并说服他人。外交者专注于以言辞而非行动来改变看法并激发情绪反应。

威吓

威吓用于迫使他人听命于你，无论是通过展现攻击性还是暴力威胁。受过威吓之道训练的人能够通过言语和行动激起他人的恐惧，展示支配地位，或迫使他人屈从。训练威吓技巧的人未必需要在体格上显得强壮威猛，因为言辞与行动同样能够令人心生恐惧。

表演

学习表演的人首先学会的是如何运用自己的天赋，通过乐曲、舞蹈、讲故事或其他艺术表达形式来激励并娱乐他人。表演者学习诗句与乐曲、颜料与光的运用、诗歌与故事、舞蹈，乃至身体技艺，以引发他人的情绪反应。

技能检定

角色经常会遇到需要证明自身能力的情况。游戏主持人可在任何时候要求进行一次技能检定——一次简单的掷骰，用以测试你是否拥有足够的技能来执行某个动作或回忆起某条信息。每项技能都关联两个 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{属性}。

你可以随时在角色卡的技能标签页中进行技能检定，只需点击技能名称即可。

技能检定使用与 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.KBDiQbnSfnRYG7mi.JournalEntryPage.WpBewuNfFJp1ZJRt#standard-check]{标准检定} 相同的计算公式。

角色的技能等级由其训练程度决定，并为该技能的检定提供加值。每项技能有4个等级，此外还有“未受训”等级。

加值

等级

标准

-4

未受训

你在这项技能上的水平，大体上和一个完全未受相关教育或职业训练的普通人相当。

0

新手

你已接受过这项技能各方面通用基础实践的训练。

+1

熟练工

你已达到一定程度的进阶训练，并了解这项特定技能中一些较不常见的原理。

+2

行家

你已经超越了职业训练的全部界限。关于你的技能，已没有什么还能从他人那里学到的；剩下的只有不断完善自己的理解。

+3

大师

你已精通这项技能。关于它已无更多可学之处。

技能检定

=

3d8[恩惠,祸骰] + 额外能力调整值的平均值 (向上取整) + 额外技能调整值 + 额外附魔调整值

示例：进行一次技能检定

阿尔伯特——我们在先前示例中提到那位颇具传奇色彩的海军队长——正面临一个困境。他的船即将被风暴所危及，而船员们正指望他安全驶离港口。作为一名制图大师，阿尔伯特调动了自己关于长途航行的丰富知识。这将是一次挑战性（DC 25）掷骰；阿尔伯特进行了一次技能检定。不幸的是，阿尔伯特掷出的骰子结果为 6、4 和 7——总计 17，离所需的25还差得很远。不过，阿尔伯特的力量属性相当高，达到 8，敏捷则是 6, 因此这两个属性的平均值提供了 7 的属性加值。阿尔伯特还恰好拥有一套带有魔法力量的航海图，可提供 +2 附魔加值，从而将最终结果提升至 26。

被动效果技能检定

在游戏主持人的裁定下，Crucible 允许任何技能检定被视为被动效果。若角色受训后的技能等级在加上12后足以超过一次掷骰的DC，则该检定无需掷骰，直接视为成功。

团队技能检定

Crucible 目前对团队技能检定的处理仍在开发中，敬请期待未来更新加入这一功能。

Skills represent the education or degree of professional training your character has received. These Skills might have been learned as part of their @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.uCwStnXHoUCV2TrK]{Background} or some other aspect of their life experience. Skills progress when a character selects a Training Talent. During @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation}, some Training Talents are awarded during the selection of a Background.

More information on Training Talents can be found in @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{Talents}.

Exploration Skills

Athletics

The Athletics skill represents the ability to undertake and surmount physical challenges. These could involve traversal of difficult terrain like climbing, running, or swimming, or could involve feats of strength, endurance, or flexibility.

Awareness

Awareness is a measure of your skill in translating sensory input into useful information. A character with high Awareness is able to notice and interpret details that others might miss, and is able to quickly identify and react to threats.

Stealth

Stealth covers the ability to hide effectively, to move without making a sound, to disguise oneself, and to otherwise use your environment to hide your presence. Those trained in Stealth focus on finding ways to remain unnoticed, whether sneaking in solitude through a dark alley at night, or blending in at a celebration at a crowded ballroom.

Wilderness

Those skilled in Wilderness learn to create shelter where there is none, identify which water is safe to drink and which is not, and locate sources of food in even the most inhospitable places, and to otherwise survive in harsh environments.

Knowledge Skills

Arcana

Whether the focus of the education is magical or religious in nature, Arcana encompasses the study of esoteric knowledge. Students of Arcana learn fundamental principles of metaphysics, study spiritual beings and deities, runic theory and ritual, the nature of chaos and order, and the history of how magical and spiritual forces impact societies and cultures.

Medicine

The study of Medicine is a practical one, with a focus on studying the mechanical, biological components that make up living creatures, the ailments that can afflict them, and the ways to best treat injury and illness alike.

Science

Science is concerned with physical phenomena and examining the world through the lens of logic, reason, mathematics, and the use of structured observation. A student of science learns to posit and confirm theories, analyze the construction of physical objects and machines, and apply mathematical thinking.

Society

The Society skill is most often used for the purposes of research or understanding into the nuanced aspects of a social situation. Those educated in the workings of Society study the factors which contribute to social structures. Knowledge of Society is used to establish historical or socio-political context, to identify the social rank of particular individuals, or to otherwise draw connections between a person or place and its most likely contributors.

Social Skills

Deception

Deception most commonly comes into play when a character is attempting to lie or mislead others, forge documents, or pierce the veil of lies others construct. Those who pursue an education in Deception are often politicians, diplomats, spies, thieves, or other professions for whom flexibility in the truth is a necessity.

Diplomacy

Diplomacy is rolled most often to persuade others to see things your way. A skill most commonly found in the politically savvy or influential orators, Diplomacy allows for the use of rhetoric and emotional appeals to inspire and convince others. Diplomats focus their efforts on the use of words, rather than deeds, to change opinions and inspire emotional reactions.

Intimidation

Intimidation is used to force others to do your bidding, whether through displays of aggression or threats of violence. Those trained in the art of intimidation are capable of using their words and actions to inspire fear in others, to demonstrate dominance or press others into subservience. Those who train their skill in intimidation need not necessarily be physically imposing in terms of stature, for words and deeds can be equally capable of inspiring fear.

Performance

Those who study Performance learn, above all else, how to use their talents to inspire and entertain others whether through music, dance, storytelling, or other forms of artistic expression.. Performers learn verse and music, use of pigment and light, poetry and story, dance and even physical feats to evoke emotional reactions in others.

Skill Checks

There are often situations that require a character to confirm their capabilities. At any time GM may call for a Skill Check— a simple roll to test whether you have sufficient skill to perform an action or recall some piece of information. Each skill is associated with two @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.abilityScores000]{Abilities}.

You can roll a skill check at any time from the skill tab of your character sheet, simply by clicking on the skill name.

Skill checks use the same equation for calculation that a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.KBDiQbnSfnRYG7mi.JournalEntryPage.WpBewuNfFJp1ZJRt#standard-check]{Standard Check} does.

A character's skill rank is determined by their degree of training, adding a bonus to checks made for that skill. Each skill has 4 ranks as well as an 'untrained' rank.

Bonus

Rank

Scale

-4

Untrained

You are decidedly as good at this skill as the average person who has absolutely no education or professional training related to it.

0

Novice

You have received training in the basic practices common across all parts of that skill.

+1

Journeyman

You've reached some degree of advanced training and know some of the less common principles of that particular skill.

+2

Adept

You have exceeded all the bounds of professional training. There is nothing more about your skills that you can learn from others. All that is left is to perfect your understanding.

+3

Master

You have mastered this skill. There is nothing more to learn about it.

Skill Check

=

3d8[Boons,Banes] + Average of Ability Bonuses (Round Up) + Skill Bonus + Enchantment Bonus

Example: Rolling a Skill Check

Albert, our storied naval captain from a previous example, is faced with a dilemma. His ship is about to be imperilled by a storm, and his crew is looking to him to safely navigate out of the harbor. As a Master Cartographer, Albert taps into his extremely strong knowledge of long-distance travel. This will be a Challenging (DC 25) roll; Albert rolls his Skill check. Unluckily, Albert's dice total turn up 6, 4, and 7— a total of 17 and a far cry from the needed 25. However, Albert's ability score for Strength is quite high at 8, and his Dexterity is 6, so the average of the two abilities adds an Ability bonus of 7. Albert also happens to have a magical set of nautical charts which grant a +2 enchantment bonus, pushing the result of the roll to 26.

Passive Skill Checks

Crucible allows any skill check to be considered passive at the discretion of the gamemaster. In a case where a character's trained skill rank is sufficient to exceed the DC of a roll by adding 12 to it, the check is considered successful without a need to roll.

Group Skill Checks

Crucible's handling of Group Skill Checks is a work in progress at this time, please look forward to a future update that adds this functionality.

Initiative and Turn Order.name: 先攻与回合顺序 Initiative and Turn Order
Initiative and Turn Order.text:
先攻反映了你角色在思维与身体上的敏捷程度——对应于在分秒必争的情境中你能够多快采取行动。你的角色在战斗中的先攻由你的敏捷与智力属性、你可能拥有的任何被动效果先攻加值、任何让你比平时反应更快的情境加值，以及一定的随机因素共同决定。

轮与回合

每场战斗遭遇都会划分为轮与回合。一轮指的是遭遇中各角色完成的一整组选择，其中每个角色都按其先攻所决定的顺序行动。每轮大致代表现实时间中的10秒，因此在遭遇持续的每分钟内会进行6轮战斗。一回合指的是在先攻顺序中轮到行动的那一名角色所进行的行动。

先攻计算

你的先攻由以下公式决定：

先攻

=

3d8[恩惠,祸骰] + ((Dexterity + Intellect) / 4)

先攻的情境加值可能来自你抢先敌人一步，或受益于能加快你反应的魔法法术；相对地，如果你的反应因炼金或魔法效果而变得迟钝或迟缓，你也可能受到先攻的情境减值。

在战斗的每一轮中，你都有一个动作点池，可自行选择以各种方式消耗。如果你未被定身或失能，那么在每轮结束时任何未消耗的动作点都会被视为动作储备，并在下一轮为你的先攻掷骰各提供一个恩惠。

每轮重新掷先攻，会为那些无法完全依赖于自己在每轮战斗中总是比相同敌人先或后行动的玩家带来更高的战术挑战。能够将未消耗的动作点转化为下一轮的先攻加值，也能促使玩家针对各种战斗挑战提出更有创意的战术解法。

自动先攻

由于先攻会在战斗的每轮自动更新，玩家无需自行为先攻掷骰。相反，这一过程会被自动化处理，即系统会自动为每个角色进行先攻掷骰，以维持战斗遭遇令人满意的节奏。

失能的战斗者

失能或死亡的战斗者会被自动置于先攻 0，且他们的回合总是在每轮最后进行。

平局裁定程序

先攻平局时，按以下裁定标准依序处理：

  1. 被动效果先攻加值较高的战斗者优先。

  2. 动作上限更多的战斗者优先。

  3. 对手先于英雄行动。

  4. 若仍然平局，则按字母顺序排列。

升级与士气

随着战斗的紧张不断升级——战斗者在士气上承受的后果也会随之加剧。在战斗进行6轮之后，从之后每一轮开始时起，先攻结果最高的战斗者会获得等同于当前战斗轮数的额外士气。先攻结果最低的战斗者（不包括失能与死亡的战斗者）会失去等同于当前战斗轮数的士气。

Initiative reflects your character's swiftness of mind and body - corresponding to how quickly you are able to act in a situation where time is of the essence. Your character's initiative during combat is determined by your Dexterity and Intellect attributes, any passive Initiative Bonus you may have, any situational bonus which allows you to react faster than usual, and an element of random chance.

Rounds and Turns

Each combat encounter is divided into Rounds and Turns. A Round refers to a single set of choices made by the characters in the encounter, where each character gets to act in an order defined by their Initiative. Each round loosely represents 10 seconds of real time, where 6 rounds of combat occur each minute of the encounter's duration. A Turn represents the actions taken by the one character whose turn it is to act in the initiative order.

Initiative Calculation

Your initiative is determined by:

Initiative

=

3d8[Boons,Banes] + ((Dexterity + Intellect) / 4)

A situational bonus to initiative could result from you getting the drop on an enemy, or benefiting from a magical spell which hastens your reactions, alternatively you could face a situational penalty to initiative if your reactions are dulled or slowed by alchemical or magical effects.

Each round of combat you have a pool of Action Points which you may elect to spend in various ways. If you are not immobilized or incapacitated, any unspent Action Points at the end of each round are defined as action reserves which each add a Boon to your Initiative roll for the following round.

Re-rolling initiative every round introduces greater tactical challenge for players who cannot rely completely upon always acting before or after the same foes each round of combat. Being able to convert unspent action points into an initiative bonus in the subsequent round can also promote creative tactical solutions to a variety of combat challenges.

Automatic Initiative

Since Initiative automatically updates every Round of combat, players do not roll for Initiative themselves. Instead this process is automated that every character's initiative roll is automatically performed in order to maintain a satisfying pace to combat encounters.

Incapacitated Combatants

Combatants who are Incapacitated or Dead are automatically placed at Initiative 0 and their turns come last in each Round.

Tiebreaking Procedures

Ties in initiative are resolved by applying the following tiebreaking criteria in order:

  1. Combatants with a higher passive Initiative bonus.

  2. Combatants with more maximum Action.

  3. Adversaries act before Heroes.

  4. Any remaining ties are placed in alphabetical order.

Escalation and Morale

As the tension of combat escalates - so too do the consequences on Morale for combatants. After 6 Rounds of Combat at the start of each subsequent round, the combatant with the highest Initiative result gains additional Morale equal to the numbered Round of combat. The combatant with the lowest Initiative result (excluding Incapacitated and Dead combatants) loses Morale equal to the numbered Round of combat.

Attack Rolls.name: 攻击检定 Attack Rolls
Attack Rolls.text:
攻击检定是通过进行一次标准检定，并与目标生物的某个防御值进行对比来完成的。当需要在与对手的对立中判定某项能力的效果时，就会进行攻击检定。攻击检定适用于武器攻击、施放法术、治疗能力，甚至一些在战斗中进行的技能检定。

其角色正在执行攻击的玩家总是进行掷骰的一方，而防御方角色或生物的效果则基于其防御值。攻击检定使用与标准检定相同的修正骰池，表示为：

攻击检定

=

3d8[+恩惠, -祸骰] + Ability Modifier + Skill Bonus + Enchantment Bonus

3d8骰池会受到恩惠和祸骰的修正。攻击检定的属性调整值由所使用武器类型的成长公式决定。攻击检定的技能加值由角色在该特定武器类型上的训练决定。该次检定的附魔加值由所使用武器的魔法属性（如果有）决定。

判定攻击结果

如果攻击检定结果超过目标的防御值，则该攻击命中。如果攻击检定结果低于防御值，则该攻击无效。对于以物理防御为目标的攻击，未命中的具体性质（偏斜、格挡、闪避或招架）还要根据目标生物的物理防御各组成防御值进一步判定。

溢出与伤害

攻击检定超过防御值的数值称为溢出。该溢出数值会乘以一个伤害倍率，通常为1，但有时会更高或更低。然后再应用任何加值型的伤害加值，最后从结果中减去目标生物拥有的任何抗性。

溢出

=

Attack Roll - Defense Score

伤害

=

(Overflow × Damage Multiplier) + Damage Bonus - Target Resistance

虽然伤害抗性是生物减少所受伤害的一种强力方式，但这类伤害无法被完全减轻。造成直接（即时）伤害且超过目标防御值的能力，总是至少会对其目标资源造成1点伤害。

然而，造成间接持续伤害的能力，其间接伤害的效果可以被抗性降低至零。

暴击与严重失误

如果攻击检定超过防御值的数额大于攻击者的暴击阈值（多数情况下为6），则该攻击成为一次暴击。类似地，如果攻击检定低于防御值的数额大于攻击者的严重失误阈值（多数情况下为6），则该攻击成为一次严重失误。

暴击不会直接提高一次攻击的伤害——不过，由于溢出会计入总伤害的方式，暴击造成的伤害总是高于普通命中。

暴击和严重失误会带来其他情况发生的机会。许多天赋允许你的角色在达成暴击时造成特殊效果，或在一次来袭攻击为严重失误时对敌人作出反应。

暴击效果

武僧Zenith同时拥有震荡重击和战斗专注天赋。Zenith对一只可怕的沼泽巨魔进行一次打击攻击，掷出了29，而该沼泽巨魔具有19物理防御。这次攻击构成一次暴击，因此沼泽巨魔因震荡重击天赋而陷入踉跄，而Zenith则因战斗专注天赋而恢复+1专注。

An Attack Roll is performed by making a Standard Check tested against a certain Defense Score of the target creature. Attack Rolls are made when the effectiveness of an ability is evaluated in opposition to an opponent. Attack Rolls apply to weapon attacks, spell casts, healing abilities, and even some skill checks which are performed in combat.

The player whose character is performing the Attack is always the one to make the roll, while the effectiveness of the defending character or creature is based on their defense scores. The Attack Roll uses the same modified dice pool as a Standard Check, expressed as:

Attack Roll

=

3d8[+Boons, -Banes] + Ability Modifier + Skill Bonus + Enchantment Bonus

The 3d8 dice pool is modified by Boons and Banes. The ability modifier for the attack roll is determined by the scaling formula of the weapon type being used. The Skill Bonus for the attack roll is determined by the character's training in that particular weapon type. The Enchantment Bonus for the roll is determined by the magical properties (if any) of the weapon being used.

Determining Attack Outcomes

The attack is a hit if the result of the Attack Roll exceeds the Defense score of the target. If the result of the attack roll is less than the Defense score, the attack is ineffective. For attacks which target Physical Defense the nature of the miss (Deflected, Blocked, Dodged, or Parried) is further determined by the component Physical Defense scores of the target creature.

Overflow and Damage

The amount by which the Attack Roll exceeded the Defense score is called Overflow. This Overflow amount is multiplied by a Damage Multiplier which is usually 1, but occasionally higher or lower. Then any additive Damage Bonus is applied, and lastly any Resistance possessed by the target creature is subtracted from the result.

Overflow

=

Attack Roll - Defense Score

Damage

=

(Overflow × Damage Multiplier) + Damage Bonus - Target Resistance

While Damage Resistance is a powerful way for creatures to reduce incoming damage, such damage cannot be mitigated entirely. Abilities which deal direct (immediate) damage that surpass the target's Defense Score always deal at least 1 point of damage to their target Resource.

Abilities which deal indirect damage-over-time, however, can have the effects of that indirect damage reduced to zero by Resistance.

Critical Hits and Misses

If the Attack Roll exceeds the Defense Score by an amount greater than the attacker's Critical Hit Threshold (6 in most cases) it becomes a Critical Hit. Similarly if the Attack Roll is lower than the Defense Score by an amount greater than the attacker's Critical Miss Threshold (6 in most cases) it becomes a Critical Miss.

A Critical Hit does not directly increase the damage of an attack - although because of the way that Overflow contributes to total damage, Critical Hits always deal more damage than normal hits.

Critical Hits and Critical Misses present opportunities for other things to occur. Many talents allow your character to cause special effects when achieving a Critical Hit, or to react to an enemy if an incoming attack is a Critical Miss.

Critical Hit Effects

Zenith the Monk has both the Concussive Blows and Battle Focus talents. Zenith rolls a 29 on a Strike attack against a terrible Swamp Troll with a 19 Physical Defense. This attack results in a Critical Hit and as a result the Swamp Troll is Staggered because of the Concussive Blows talent and Zenith recovers +1 Focus because of the Battle Focus talent.

Movement.name: 移动 Movement
Movement.text:
移动是《Crucible》中角色在战斗中会执行的最重要动作之一。

《Crucible》中的移动与站位采用精细的 1 英尺网格，这带来了出色的特性，例如在战术上具有重要意义的移动与站位、生物体型与武器射程之间的显著差异，以及直观的效果区域。

Crucible 系统中的距离以英尺定义。Foundry Virtual Tabletop 中场景的网格尺寸将自动调整，以具有距离单位为1 英尺的子网格。

距离测量使用Exact √2对角测量模式进行计算。

角色可执行的许多战斗动作都带有移动标签。此类动作允许你移动一定英尺数，最大不超过且可等于你角色的步幅属性。移动动作允许的距离不能被拆分或中断。如果你的移动距离少于步幅，剩余移动不会在动作之间保留。

《Crucible》中没有朝向机制，这意味着你的 Token 在地图上朝向哪个方向并不重要；除非受到某些特殊效果或状态的限制，否则你的角色都能够在完整的 360 度范围内感知并行动。

移动成本计算

一次给定移动的动作成本按如下方式计算：

  1. 距离按中心点到中心点计算，其中对角移动的距离使用Exact √2对角测量模式计算。

  2. 有效距离通过按以下顺序应用修正来计算：

    1. 首先应用如下所述的状态。

    2. 其次应用地形的效果。

    3. 然后应用由移动类型导致的修正。

  3. 该次移动的动作成本计算如下：

动作成本

=

ceil(有效距离 / 步幅)

  1. 如果有可用的免费移动，则该次移动的最终动作成本减少 1。

移动状态

以下状态会影响移动的测量与成本。

迟缓

任何移动所经过的有效距离翻倍。

加速

任何移动所经过的有效距离减半。

受拘束

无法移动。

移动类型

支持以下移动类型：

行走

有效距离不发生变化。

踏步

你会谨慎移动，不会引发Disengagement，但你所经过的有效距离翻倍。

匍匐前进

你在倒地时移动，且你所经过的有效距离翻倍。

跳跃

等同于行走，但某些动作要求使用，或用于越过某些障碍。

游泳

在齐腰深或更深的水中移动时使用，你所经过的有效距离翻倍。

飞行

等同于行走，但由能够飞行或悬浮的生物使用。

免费移动

每个生物在每轮战斗中都有机会执行一次免费的移动动作。这意味着每轮中第一次执行的、带有移动标签的动作，其动作成本会获得 -1 的减免。这通常会使该动作可以免费执行，但在某些情况下也可能只是降低其总成本。

穿着重型护甲的生物或处于倒地状态的生物无法使用免费移动。此外，迟缓状态会提高移动动作的成本，不过每轮第一次此类移动仍然会获得减免。

地形

《Crucible》最终将支持将某些网格空间声明为困难地形，使穿越其间时的移动减慢。在困难地形中的移动成本翻倍。在该功能的自动化加入之前，困难地形可以手动应用到移动成本中，但当前 Alpha 试玩测试会忽略困难地形的存在。

掩护

某些地形或障碍物可视为掩护——为来袭的法术或武器攻击提供额外保护。当一次直接的单体攻击穿过这类障碍物时，该攻击的目标处于掩护中。掩护按以下类型分类：

掩护类型

攻击附加的祸骰

完全掩护

无法进行直接攻击

坚固掩护

+4 祸骰

部分坚固掩护

+2 祸骰

软掩护

+1 祸骰

来自目标类型如 Cone、Blast 或 Pulse 的能力的范围效果攻击会忽略掩护的效果。

未来，Crucible 系统中对掩护的定义以及由掩护产生的祸骰自动化可能会实现。当前阶段，在进行攻击检定时，因掩护而附加的祸骰应手动加入。

Movement is one of the most important actions that characters in Crucible will perform in combat.

Movement and positioning in Crucible uses a fine-grained 1 foot grid which provides excellent features like tactically significant movement and positioning, meaningful differences in creature sizes and weapon ranges, and intuitive areas of effect.

Distances in the Crucible system are defined in feet. The grid size of Scenes in Foundry Virtual Tabletop will be automatically adjusted to have a subgrid with distance units of 1 foot.

Measurement distance is computed using the Exact √2 diagonal measurement mode.

Many combat actions a character can perform involve the Movement tag. Such actions allow you to move a certain number of feet up to or equal to your character's Stride attribute. The distance allowed by a Movement action cannot be broken up or interrupted. There is no leftover movement saved across actions if you move less than your Stride.

There are no facing mechanics in Crucible, meaning that it does not matter which direction your Token is facing on the map, your character is able to perceive and act in a full 360 degree radius unless otherwise limited by some special effect or condition.

Movement Cost Calculation

The Action cost of a given Movement is computed as follows:

  1. Distance is computed center-point to center-point, where the distance of diagonal movement is computed using the Exact √2 diagonal measurement mode.

  2. Effective Distance is compted by applying the following modifiers in order:

    1. Status Conditions are applied first, as described below.

    2. The effects of Terrain are applied second.

    3. Modifiers resulting from the Movement Type are applied.

  3. The Action cost of the movement is computed as:

Action Cost

=

ceil(Effective Distance / Stride)

  1. If a Free Move is available, the final Action Cost of the movement is reduced by 1.

Movement Conditions

The following Status Conditions affect the measurement and cost of movement.

Slowed

The Effective Distance traveled by any movement is doubled.

Hastened

The Effective Distance traveled by any movement is halved.

Restrained

Movement is impossible.

Movement Types

The following Movement Types are supported:

Walk

No change to Effective Distance.

Step

You move carefully and do not provoke Disengagement, but your Effective Distance traveled is doubled.

Crawl

You move while Prone and your Effective Distance traveled is doubled.

Jump

Equivalent to Walk, but required by certain actions or to surmount certain obstacles.

Swim

Used while moving in waist-deep or deeper water, your Effective Distance traveled is doubled.

Fly

Equivalent to Walk, but used by creatures which can fly or hover.

Free Movement

Each creature has the opportunity to perform one free Movement action per round of Combat. This means that the first Action performed each round which involves the Movement tag is discounted at -1 Action cost. This will typically make the action free to perform, but in some cases may simply reduce its overall cost.

Free Movement is not available to creatures wearing Heavy armor or those who are Prone. Additionally, the Slowed condition increases the cost of Movement actions, however the first such movement per round is still discounted.

Terrain

Crucible will eventually support declaring certain grid spaces as difficult terrain which slow movement while traversing them. Movement costs are doubled within difficult terrain. Until automation for this feature is added, difficult terrain can be applied manually to movement costs however the current Alpha Playtest ignores the presence of difficult terrain.

Cover

Certain terrain or obstacles can be counted as Cover - providing additional protection from incoming Spell or Weapon attacks. When a direct single-target attack passes through such an obstacle, the target of the attack is in Cover. Cover is classified according to the following types:

Cover Type

Banes to Attacks

Complete Cover

Direct attacks not possible

Hard Cover

+4 Banes

Partial Hard Cover

+2 Banes

Soft Cover

+1 Banes

Area of effect attacks from abilities with target types like Cone, Blast, or Pulse ignore the effects of Cover.

In the future, definition of cover and automation of banes occurring from cover may be automated in the Crucible system. For the time being, Banes added due to Cover should be added manually when attack rolls are made.

Skill Attacks.name: 技能攻击 Skill Attacks
Skill Attacks.text:
技能攻击是指在战斗中以战术方式运用《Crucible》的12项 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000]{技能}之一的动作。以这种方式使用技能的动作，会通过进行一次技能检定来执行技能攻击，并与目标在同一技能上的被动效果分数相对抗。

Krag想利用自己威慑十足的气场来击破一些来袭地精的士气。作为威吓技能的行家，Krag使用威吓动作，以附近的一只地精为目标，并掷出了这次技能攻击，最终结果总计为27，对抗该地精14的被动威吓分数。这次成功使地精的士气受到17点虚空伤害，令其陷入破碎状态并试图逃跑。

Skill Attacks are Actions which involve use of one of Crucible's 12 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000]{Skills} in a tactical way during combat. Actions which use a Skill in this way perform the Skill Attack by rolling a Skill Test opposed by the target's passive score in the same Skill.

Krag wants to use his intimidating demeanor to break the Morale of some attacking Goblins. Krag, an Adept in the Intimidation skill, uses the Intimidate Action targeting a nearby Goblin and rolls the Skill Attack, producing a total result of 27 compared to the Goblin's passive Intimidation score of 14. This success results in 17 Void Damage dealt to the Goblin's Morale, causing it to become Broken and attempt to flee.

Reactions.name: 反应 Reactions
Reactions.text:
反应是一种特殊类型的动作，只能在战斗中其他生物的回合内进行。反应具有特定的触发条件，例如你闪避一次近战打击攻击 ，或一名你能看见的盟友造成一次重击。反应需要消耗动作点或专注点，因此如果你没有所需的资源，就无法执行反应——即使反应的条件在其他方面已经满足。

如果一个生物处于未察觉或失能状态，则无法进行反应。

Reactions are a special type of Action which can only be taken on some other creature's turn in combat. Reactions have specific triggering conditions like you dodge an melee Strike attack or an ally you can see achieves a critical hit. Reactions require spending Action or Focus points, and therefore cannot be performed if you do not have the required resources - even if the condition for the reaction is otherwise met.

A creature is unable to perform Reactions if they are Unaware or Incapacitated.

Actions.name: 动作 Actions
Actions.text:
动作涵盖了在一次战斗遭遇中执行的活动、技巧、施法和攻击。动作会对参战者的资源池产生正面或负面的调整，直到遭遇结束。

动作属性

动作具有以下属性，用于说明其使用方式。

动作成本

大多数动作都会消耗动作点。动作点表示并代表在战斗中执行一个动作所需的时间与体力消耗。

专注成本

某些动作可能会消耗专注点。专注点表示并代表执行非凡的英雄壮举、施法或武艺时所需的精神能量与专注力。

动作标签

动作的功能依赖于一组大量标签，这些标签描述了该动作的运作方式。每个标签都可能改变动作的某些方面，例如它的前置条件、它的目标、造成的伤害类型、采用何种骰子检定、是否为检定加入恩惠或祸骰等等。动作标签表列于本页底部。

目标类型

每个动作都会定义一种特定的目标类型，用于说明该动作所影响的生物或其效果区域。可能的目标类型列表见下文。

目标范围

除了目标类型所描述的动作射程和效果区域外，每个动作还会定义一个目标范围，用于界定它能影响哪些立场的生物。动作范围包括“所有生物”“仅盟友”“仅敌人”“仅自己”。

激活条件

某些动作可能要求满足一个特定的触发条件后，才有资格使用该动作。若存在，此前置条件会列在动作上，例如，防御翻滚动作的激活条件是你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。

施加效果

某些动作可能会对其影响的生物施加主动效果。由该动作施加的任何效果都会列在其卡片上，并注明其在战斗回合或轮中的持续时间。有些效果会持续存在，直到以其他方式被移除，其持续时间为无限。

目标类型

爆发

该动作会影响一个圆形效果区域内的生物，该区域以执行该动作的角色所选定的一个网格空间为中心。爆发动作还会指定一个体型，用于描述效果半径，并指定一个距离，用于描述起始角色与所选爆发中心点之间的最大射程。

锥形

该动作会影响一个狭窄锥形区域内的生物。锥形区域起始于执行该动作角色所在网格空间的中心。锥形区域的夹角为60度，并指定一个距离，用于描述该能力以网格空间计的射程。锥形模板只能以45度增量放置。

扇形

该动作会影响一个宽阔锥形区域内的生物。扇形区域起始于执行该动作角色所在网格空间的中心。扇形区域的夹角为120度，并指定一个距离，用于描述该能力以网格空间计的射程。扇形模板只能以45度增量放置。

无

该动作没有特定目标。它可能会引发某些效果，但这些效果并不针对任何特定生物。此目标类型通常不使用。

脉冲

该动作会影响以执行该动作的角色为中心的圆形效果区域内的生物。脉冲会指定一个距离，用于描述该能力以网格空间计的半径。

射线

该动作会影响一条从执行该动作角色出发的直线上的生物。射线会指定一个距离，用于描述其效果以网格空间计的长度。

自身

该动作只涉及或影响执行它的角色或生物。以自身为目标的能力不会影响其他生物，也没有射程要求。

单体

该动作会以执行它的生物以外的若干个独立生物为目标。单体目标动作还会指定一个数量，用于描述目标生物的数量，并指定一个距离，用于描述该能力以网格空间计的射程。

墙体

该动作会以一条与执行该动作角色垂直的直线上的生物为目标。墙体类型的动作还会指定一个体型，用于描述墙体的宽度，并指定一个距离，用于描述墙体中心可被放置的最大距离。

动作标签

标签规则效果

双持

要求双手都已装备单手或徒手武器。

单手

要求使用单手武器。

灵巧

要求使用以敏捷作为成长属性的近战武器。

重型

要求使用以力量作为成长属性的近战武器。

近战

要求使用近战武器。

远程

要求使用远程武器。

盾牌

要求已装备盾牌。

徒手

要求双手都为空。

无甲

要求未装备护甲。

移动

涉及移动，并且每回合一次可受益于移动成本降低。

反应

只能在其他生物的回合中执行。

法术

涉及施放法术。

主手

涉及用已装备在主手的武器进行一次武器攻击。

双手武器

涉及用已装备的双手持用武器进行一次武器攻击。

副手

涉及用已装备在副手的武器进行一次武器攻击。

装填

为需要装填的远程武器进行装填。

致命

获得+1伤害溢出倍率。

困难

承受+1祸骰。

强化

使基础伤害提高+6。

暴露

加入+2恩惠。

无害

总是造成0伤害。

虚弱

使基础伤害降低-6。

坚韧

以坚韧防御为目标。

反射

以反射防御为目标。

意志

以意志防御为目标。

治疗

以创伤阈值防御为目标，并将伤害作为治疗恢复到生命值。

振奋

以疯狂阈值防御为目标，并将伤害作为治疗恢复到士气。

<伤害类型>

造成<伤害类型>伤害。

<资源>

对<资源>施加伤害或治疗。

<技能>

使用<技能>进行一次技能攻击。

Actions encompass the activities, techniques, spellcraft, and attacks which are performed during a combat encounter. Actions modify, either positively or negatively, the resource pools of combatants until the encounter is resolved.

Action Attributes

Actions have the following properties which explain how they are used.

Action Cost

Most actions incur a cost in Action Points. Action Points signify and represent the time and physical exertion required in order to perform an action in the midst of combat.

Focus Cost

Some actions may incur a cost in Focus Points. Focus Points signify and represent the mental energy and concentration needed to perform exceptional feats of heroism, spellcraft, or martial prowess.

Action Tags

The functionality of Actions relies on a large set of tags which describe how that action behaves. Each tag can change certain aspects of the Action like it's prerequisites, it's target, the type of damage it deals, what type of dice roll is applied, whether Boons or Banes are added to the roll, and more. A table of Action Tags is listed at the bottom of this page.

Target Type

Each action defines a specific target type which describes the affected creatures or area-of-effect of the action. A list of possible target types is provided in the following section.

Target Scope

In addition to the range and area of effect of the Action described by the target type, each Action defines a target scope which defines which creature dispositions it can affect. Action scopes include "all creatures", "allies only", "enemies only", "self only".

Activation Condition

Certain actions may require a specific triggering condition to be met in order for the action to be eligible for use. If present, this prerequisite condition will be listed on the action, for example, the Defensive Roll action has an activation condition You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Applied Effects

Certain Actions may apply Active Effects to creatures they affect. Any effects applied by the Action will be listed on its card with a stated duration in combat Turns or Rounds. Some effects last until otherwise removed, having unlimited duration.

Target Types

Blast

This action affects creatures within a circular area of effect centered on a grid space chosen by the character performing the action. The Blast action also specifies a Size which describes the radius of effect and a Distance which describes the maximum range between the originating character and the chosen center-point of the blast.

Cone

This action affects creatures within a narrow cone of effect. The Cone originates at the center of the grid space of the character performing the action. The Cone has an angle of 60 degrees and a specified Distance which describes the range of the ability in grid spaces. Cone templates may be placed at 45 degree increments only.

Fan

This action affects creatures with a broad cone of effect. The Fan originates at the center of the grid space of the character performing the action. The Fan has an angle of 120 degrees and a specified Distance which describes the range of the ability in grid spaces. Fan templates may be placed at 45 degree increments only.

None

This action has no specific target. It may cause certain effects to occur but those effects are not specific to any particular creature. This target type is not typically used.

Pulse

This action affects creatures in a circular area of effect centered on the character performing the action. The Pulse has a specified Distance which describes the radius of the ability in grid spaces.

Ray

This action affects creatures in a straight line originating from the character performing the action. The Ray has a specified Distance which describes the length of its effect in grid spaces.

Self

This action only involves or affects the character or creature which performs it. Self-target abilities affect no other creatures and have no range requirement.

Single

This action targets some number of individual creatures other than the creature which performs it. Single target actions also specify a Number which describes the number of creatures targeted and a Distance which describes the range of the ability in grid spaces.

Wall

This action targets creatures in a straight line perpendicular to the character performing the action. Actions of the Wall type also specify a Size which describes the breadth of the wall and a Distance which describes the maximum range at which the center of the wall may be placed.

Action Tags

TagRules Effect

Dual Wield

Requires one-handed or unarmed weapons equipped in both hands.

One Handed

Requires use of a one-handed weapon.

Finesse

Requires use of a melee weapon that scales using Dexterity.

Heavy

Requires use of a melee weapon that scales using Strength.

Melee

Requires use of a melee weapon.

Ranged

Requires use of a ranged weapon.

Shield

Requires a shield equipped.

Unarmed

Requires both hands to be empty.

Unarmored

Requires no armor to be equipped.

Movement

Involves movement and benefits from reduced movement cost once per turn.

Reaction

Can only be performed on some other creature's turn.

Spell

Involves casting a spell.

Mainhand

Involves performing a weapon attack with the mainhand-equipped weapon.

Twohand

Involves performing a weapon attack with a two-handed equipped weapon.

Offhand

Involves performing a weapon attack with the offhand-equipped weapon.

Reload

Reloads a ranged weapon that requires reloading.

Deadly

Gains a +1 damage overflow multiplier.

Difficult

Incurs +1 Bane.

Empowered

Increases base damage by +6.

Exposing

Adds +2 Boons.

Harmless

Always deals zero damage.

Weakened

Reduces base damage by -6.

Fortitude

Targets Fortitude defense.

Reflex

Targets Reflex defense.

Willpower

Targets Willpower defense.

Healing

Targets Wounds Threshold defense and restores damage as healing to Health.

Rallying

Targets Madness Threshold defense and restores damage as healing to Morale.

<Damage Type>

Deals damage as <Damage Type>.

<Resource>

Applies damage or healing to <Resource>.

<Skill>

Performs a skill attack using <Skill>.

Engagement and Flanking.name: 交战与夹击 Engagement and Flanking
Engagement and Flanking.text:
交战描述的是你在不会变得更加脆弱的情况下，能够同时对抗的敌对战斗者总数。主角角色的基础交战值为1，而对手角色的基础交战值等于其体型 - 2，最低为1。

当一个角色与多个敌人相邻，且已交战的敌人数等于或超过其交战值时，该角色被称为处于完全交战状态。某些状态或动作的前置条件，只有在一个生物处于完全交战时才会发生。

为了帮助直观理解交战和夹击机制如何运作，在屏幕左侧的场景控制UI中的指示物图层里，有一个可用的特殊切换开关。启用后，将会显示交战矩形和生物的夹击状态，以帮助理解其当前状态。

夹击

夹击发生在你和盟友协同对抗一个对手时。当一个生物与多于其交战值数量的生物交战时，它获得夹击状态。夹击状态有多个阶段，并且夹击的每个阶段都会使针对该生物进行的攻击检定获得+1恩惠。

夹击阶段

=

已交战敌人数
- 交战值
- 来自相邻盟友的交战加值

Krag，一名身披重甲的战士，其交战值为3，这来自他的真正的坚毅天赋加值，以及带有Engaging属性的鸢形盾所提供的加值。Krag可以同时与三名敌对战斗者交战，而不会让他们获得任何针对他的夹击加值。然而，如果Krag被五只哥布林包围，他将处于夹击 2状态，且每只哥布林的攻击都将获得+2恩惠（5名已交战敌人 - 3交战）。

尽管更多已交战敌人会提高你的夹击状态，但有相邻盟友支援你时，可以抵消夹击。如果你与盟友共同和相同的敌人交战，那么盟友会将他们自己的交战值作为加值提供给你。

在前一个例子中，Krag依然被5只哥布林包围，并处于夹击 2状态。他的盟友Jinora前来加入战斗。Jinora的交战值为2。当Jinora移动到Krag身旁，并进入一个使她至少能与其中2只哥布林交战的位置时，Krag的夹击状态就会被移除，因为Jinora的2点交战会加到Krag自身的交战值上，使Krag能够与最多5名敌人交战。

当一个角色移入或移出与其他对手的交战时，若某个生物处于夹击，系统会自动计算并添加对应的状态效果。夹击效果还会自动为针对该被夹击生物的攻击检定施加正确数量的恩惠。

脱离交战

当一个对手试图在近战中从你身边脱离交战时，它会暂时变得脆弱，使你能够进行一次脱离交战打击——使用你的主手武器进行的一次攻击，且需要消耗1点专注。若你未察觉敌人正在远离，或者你正被其他仍然留下的对手夹击，则你不能进行脱离交战攻击。

在前面的例子中，那些哥布林认定Krag太难对付，因此决定脱离交战，去寻找更脆弱的猎物。四只哥布林中的两只可以在不受反击的情况下远离Krag，因为Krag此时处于完全交战状态，因此无法还击。然而，当第三只哥布林移开时，Krag消耗1点专注进行了一次脱离交战打击，将他的战斧狠狠劈进了那个撤退恶徒的背上！

从近战中安全撤退的一种方式是谨慎移动。这种移动方式只允许你移动一个格子，但会使此前与你交战的敌人失去进行脱离交战攻击的机会。

Engagement describes the total number of opposing Combatants that you can simultaneously battle against without becoming more vulnerable. The base Engagement for Protagonist characters is 1, while the base Engagement for Adversary characters is equal to their Size - 2 with a minimum of 1.

When a character is adjacent to multiple enemies where the number of engaged enemies equals or exceeds their Engagement score, that character is said to be Fully Engaged. Some conditions or action prerequisites may only occur when a creature is Fully Engaged.

To help visualize how Engagement and Flanking mechanics works, there is a special toggle that can be used in the Tokens Layer of the Scene Controls UI on the left side of the screen. While enabled, the Engagement rectangles and flanked status of a creature will be visualized to help understand its current status.

Flanking

Flanking occurs when you and your allies team up to combat an opponent. When a creature is Engaged with a number of creatures greater than its Engagement score it has the Flanked condition. The Flanked condition has multiple stages, and each stage of Flanked contributes +1 Boon to attack rolls made against that creature.

Flanked Stage

=

Number of Engaged Enemies
- Engagement Score
- Engagement Bonus from Adjacent Allies

Krag, a heavily armored fighter, has an Engagement score of 3, with bonuses from his True Grit talent and from his Heater Shield with the Engaging property. Krag can engage with three opposing combatants simultaneously without them acquiring any Flanking bonus against him. However if Krag is surrounded by five Goblins, he would have the Flanked 2 condition and each Goblin's attacks would benefit from +2 Boons (5 engaged enemies - 3 Engagement).

While having more Engaged enemies increases your Flanked condition, having adjacent allies who are supporting you can nullify flanking. Allies contribute their own Engagement as a bonus to yours if you share enemies in common that you are both Engaged with.

Krag, from our previous example, is still surrounded by 5 Goblins and is Flanked 2. His ally Jinora comes to join the fray. Jinora has an Engagement score of 2. When Jinora moves next to Krag, and into a position where Jinora can engage at least 2 of the Goblins, Krag's Flanked condition is removed because Jinora's 2 Engagement adds to Krag's own Engagement score, allowing Krag to engage up to 5 enemies.

A status effect condition when a creature is Flanked is automatically computed and added whenever a character moves into or out of Engagement with other adversaries. The Flanked effect automatically applies the correct number of boons to attack rolls against the Flanked creature.

Disengagement

When an opponent attempts to disengage from you in melee combat it becomes temporarily vulnerable, allowing you to perform a Disengagement Strike, an attack with your mainhand weapon which costs 1 Focus point to perform. You may not make a Disengagement Attack if you are Unaware of the enemy moving away or if you are Flanked by other remaining opponents.

The Goblins in our previous example have decided that Krag is too tough and it is advisable to disengage in search of more vulnerable prey. Two of the four goblins may move away from Krag without reciprocity, because Krag is otherwise Fully Engaged and therefore cannot retaliate. When the third goblin moves away, however, Krag spends 1 Focus point to perform a Disengagement Strike, burying his battle axe in the back of the retreating evildoer!

There is a safe means of retreating from melee combat, which is to Move Cautiously. This mode of movement only permits you to move a single space, but it denies enemies with whom you were previously engaged the opportunity to perform a Disengagement Attack.

Concealment and Surprise.name: 隐蔽与突袭 Concealment and Surprise
Concealment and Surprise.text:
@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000#exploration-skills]{潜行}技能，配合来自地形的隐蔽，是让生物不被敌人发现的机制。识别隐藏的敌人通常通过对抗性的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000#exploration-skills]{察觉} 检定或一次被动察觉检定来进行。

角色或对手可能处于未察觉状态，这是一种会使其更容易受到攻击的状态。处于未察觉状态的生物在战斗中的先攻视为 1，失能的生物除外。一旦生物不再处于未察觉状态，他们便掷先攻，并在后续的战斗轮中如常行动。

有关潜行、隐蔽、未察觉的对手以及突袭的完整机制、状态和自动化功能，将在未来的开发阶段中开发并加入。

The @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000#exploration-skills]{Stealth} skill, paired with concealment from terrain are mechanics which allow creatures to be undetected by their enemies. Identification of hidden enemies is generally performed using an opposed @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000#exploration-skills]{Awareness} test or a passive Awareness check.

A character or adversary may be Unaware, a status condition which render them more vulnerable to attacks. Creatures that are Unaware act at Initiative 1 in Combat, last aside for Incapacitated creatures. Once a creature is no longer Unaware, they roll Initiative and act as normal for subsequent rounds of combat.

Complete mechanics, status conditions, and automation for stealth, concealment, unaware opponents, and surprise will be developed and added in future phases of development.

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.text:
在战斗中采取的动作会产生英雄气概，并不断累积，直到达到某个阈值；届时，战斗遭遇中的每位英雄都会获得 1 点英雄气概点。英雄气概是一种资源，能够让主角施展传说级或标志性的强大壮举，或展现惊人的韧性。

任何对其他角色施加治疗、伤害或效果的动作，都会累积英雄气概。只以自己为目标的动作，例如移动或防御，不会为英雄气概作出贡献。盟友和对手的动作都会计入英雄气概的累积。每个动作所累积的英雄气概数量，等于其动作消耗。

英雄气概累积的进度会显示在战斗追踪器顶部。系统中有一项可自定义的游戏设置，用于配置这个进度条是对所有玩家可见，还是仅对游戏主持人可见。如果你是 Crucible 系统的新手，我们建议你让所有人都能看到这个进度条；但当你熟悉了系统规则之后，将其对玩家隐藏起来，有助于减少元游戏行为，例如玩家试图精确预判自己下一点英雄气概何时获得。

获得 1 点英雄气概点所需消耗的动作点数量，取决于战斗遭遇中英雄角色的数量：

每点英雄气概所需动作

=

英雄数量 × 12

示例：生命射线

假设神乐是一位强力的治疗者，她施放法术沉着生命射线，治疗了两名盟友，并且施放需要消耗5 动作。由于这个法术治疗了其他角色，因此这个动作会为英雄气概累积贡献 5 点动作。如果这些累积足以填满英雄气概计量条，那么神乐和她的每位盟友都会立即获得+1 英雄气概。

在本回合剩余的动作中，神乐使用了防御，其消耗为 1 动作。由于这个动作只影响她自己，因此不会为英雄气概累积作出贡献。

Actions taken during Combat generate Heroism which accumulates until it reaches a threshold at which point every Hero in the Combat encounter gains a Heroism Point. Heroism is a resource that allows protagonists to perform legendary or iconic feats of power or resilience.

Heroism is accumulated by any Action which applies healing, damage, or effects to some other character. Actions which only target yourself, like Move or Defend do not contribute towards Heroism. The actions of both allies and adversaries count towards Heroism accumulation. The amount of Heroism accumulated by each Action is equal to its Action cost.

The progress of Heroism accumulation is visualized at the top of the Combat Tracker. A customizable game setting exists to configure whether this progress bar is visible to all players or only to Gamemasters. If you are new to the Crucible system, we encourage you to allow this progress bar to be visible to everyone, but once you are used to the rules of the system concealing it from players can help reduce metagaming that may occur from players trying to precisely anticipate the award of their next Heroism point.

The number of Action Points that need to be spent in order to yield a Heroism Point depends on the number of Hero characters in the Combat encounter:

Action per Heroism

=

Number of Heroes × 12

Example: Ray of Life

Suppose Kagura, a powerful Healer, casts a spell Composed Ray of Life which heals two of her allies and costs 5 Action to cast. Since this spell heals other characters, this action contributes 5 Action towards Heroism accumulation. If this accumulation were enough to fill the Heroism meter, then Kagura and each of her allies would immediately gain +1 Heroism.

With her remaining Action for the turn, Kagura uses Defend which costs 1 Action. Since this Action only affects herself, it does not contribute towards Heroism accumulation.

Balance and Difficulty.name: 平衡与难度 Balance and Difficulty
Balance and Difficulty.text:
Crucible 的设计目标是提供一种具有挑战性的战斗体验，要求玩家进行战术思考、协同合作，并有效发展角色的能力。Crucible 中遭遇的平衡通过几个基本杠杆来管理。

  1. 对手的等级与威胁评级可方便地进行成长调整，从而相对容易地根据不同队伍的等级或规模来调整难度。

  2. 英雄角色独有的次级创伤与疯狂池，它们会累积，并吸收因运气不佳带来的波动。

  3. 游戏主持人，其在诠释每个战斗时刻的叙事需求方面扮演着关键角色。

平衡遭遇

Crucible 中的遭遇通常会被平衡为：所有敌人的累计威胁等于英雄角色加上所有盟友非玩家角色的累计威胁。由于可以方便地调整某个 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM.JournalEntryPage.WH0YSVcYo09aHNZ2]{对手 }的等级或威胁，因此很容易预先将遭遇调整到这一平衡点。

以这种方式平衡的遭遇，大约有 50% 的概率对队伍有利，也有 50% 的概率对敌人有利。这并不意味着队伍有一半时间会“失败”或“死亡”，而是说在 50% 的平衡遭遇中，队伍会承受一定数量的创伤。

创伤用于调节运气

这些创伤的累积，是英雄们必须在多场遭遇或数日过程中管理的内容。由于对手没有创伤，只有生命值，这是刻意给予英雄角色的一项优势。

在任何一场单独的平衡遭遇中，如果英雄们运气好或发挥出色，他们将在不承受任何创伤的情况下获胜。如果英雄们表现不佳或遭遇坏运气，他们很可能仍然会获胜，但会在过程中承受创伤。创伤是一种用于调节运气波动的机制，同时也要求队伍在大多数时候都能成为高效的战斗者。

游戏主持人的角色

最后，游戏主持人在确保战斗的乐趣与平衡方面扮演着关键角色。Crucible 中的敌人通常都经过优化，使其在自身主要的战斗风格上能非常高效。这么做是因为我们假定玩家角色在设计与成长过程中，也至少在一定程度上会以战斗效能为考量。

Crucible 的目标并不是要求每个玩家角色都必须经过最大化优化，也不是要求战斗中的每个决定都必须以胜利最优化为目标，而不是推动当前讲述的故事。因此，游戏主持人应当根据队伍的情况以及当前叙事时刻的需求，校准自己操作的优化程度。

Crucible 中的对手可以，也应该在其决策上有失误。敌人在战斗中可以，而且往往也应该，将其动作和专注花在那些能够维持紧张感与利害关系、并优先服务于故事需求的行为上，而不是专门以击败英雄为最优目标的行为。

Crucible is designed to be a challenging combat experience which will require players to think tactically, work together, and effectively develop their characters' powers. Encounter balance in Crucible is managed using several fundamental levers.

  1. Convenient scaling of Adversary Level and Threat rating which makes adjusting difficulty for differing party levels or sizes relatively easy to do.

  2. The secondary Wounds and Madness pools that hero characters uniquely have which accumulate and absorb variance due to bad luck.

  3. The Gamemaster, who plays a pivotal role in interpreting the storytelling needs for each combat moment.

Balancing Encounters

Encounters in Crucible are typically balanced such that the cumulative Threat of all enemies is equal to the cumulative Threat of hero characters plus any allied non-player characters. The ease of adjusting the Level or Threat of an @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM.JournalEntryPage.WH0YSVcYo09aHNZ2]{adversary } makes it easy to adjust an encounter to this point of balance ahead of time.

Encounters balanced in this way have an approximately 50% chance of going in the party's favor and a 50% chance of going in the enemies' favor. This does not mean that the party "loses" or "dies" half the time, but rather in 50% of balanced encounters the party will suffer some number of Wounds.

Wounds Regulate Luck 

The accumulation of these Wounds is something that the heroes must manage over the course of multiple encounters or days. Since adversaries do not have Wounds, only Health this is an intentional advantage in favor of Hero characters.

In any single balanced encounter if the heroes get lucky or play well, they will win without suffering any Wounds. If the heroes play poorly or experience bad luck, they will probably still win but suffer Wounds in the process. Wounds are a mechanism to regulate swings in luck while also requiring the party to be effective combatants most of the time.

The Role of the Gamemaster

Lastly, the Gamemaster plays a pivotal role in ensuring the fun and balance of combat. Enemies in Crucible are generally optimized such that they can be very effective at their main combat style. This is done because we assume that player characters are also designed and progressed with — to at least some extent — combat effectiveness in mind.

It is not a goal of Crucible to require that every player character be maximally optimized or that every decision in combat be one that optimizes for victory rather than advancing the story being told. It is therefore important that the Gamemaster to calibrate the optimization of their own play to match the party and the needs of the storytelling moment.

Adversaries in Crucible can and should be fallible in the decisions that they make. Enemies can, and often should, spend their Action and Focus in combat on actions that maintain tension and stakes while prioritizing the needs of the story rather than actions that specifically optimize to defeat the heroes.

Rest and Recovery.name: 休息与恢复 Rest and Recovery
Rest and Recovery.text:
在战斗中或通过其他类型的挑战消耗资源后，角色需要补充其储备。为此会用到两种特殊动作：

恢复

一种需要 10 分钟的短休，在此期间，生命值、士气、动作和专注资源都会完全补满。任何现有的英雄气概都会被移除。某些特殊动作可以在恢复期间执行。除非另有说明，否则每名角色只能执行一种此类动作。

休息

一种需要 10 小时的长休，在此期间，角色有时间进食、睡觉、恢复，并进行其他停工期动作。休息提供恢复的全部收益，此外，任何累计的创伤或疯狂都会减少，减少量等于角色的等级。某些特殊动作可以在休息期间执行。除非另有说明，否则每名角色只能执行一种此类动作。

After expending resources in combat or via other types of challenges, characters will need to replenish their reserves. There are two special Actions that are used for this purpose:

Recover

A short rest that requires 10 minutes during which time resources of Health, Morale, Action, and Focus are fully replenished. Any existing Heroism is removed. Certain special Actions can be performed during a Recovery. Unless otherwise stated, only one such Action may be performed per character.

Rest

A long rest that requires 10 hours during which the characters have time to eat, sleep, recover, and perform other downtime actions. Rest delivers all the benefits of Recover, but also any accumulated Wounds or Madness are reduced by an amount equal to the character's level. Certain special Actions can be performed during a Rest. Unless otherwise stated, only one such Action may be performed per character.

rpL70eBEekWih461.name: 持续伤害 Damage Over Time

Conditions Overview.name: 状态概览 Conditions Overview
Conditions Overview.text:
状态是施加于角色的临时状态效果。这些状态会改变角色可以执行哪些动作、其资源池，或某些规则应用于该角色的方式。本页将状态分为两类：描述角色当前状态的状态，以及持续伤害——即在战斗中角色回合开始时生效的不利或改善性效果。

持续伤害

某些类型的伤害会造成额外的延迟伤害。这些状态会导致在角色回合开始时发生的伤害（或治疗）。

Conditions are temporary status effects which apply to a character. These conditions modify what actions the character can take, its resource pools, or the way that certain rules are applied to that character. This page separates Conditions into two categories; Statuses which describe the character's state of being and Damage-Over-Time which are detrimental or ameliorating effects which apply at the beginning of the character's Turn in Combat.

Damage Over Time

Some types of damage deal additional delayed damage. These conditions cause damage (or healing) that occurs at the start of a character's turn.

Weakened.name: 虚弱 Weakened
Weakened.text:
处于虚弱状态的生物容易遭受致命创伤。主角在生命值降至零时会陷入虚弱。在虚弱状态下，任何进一步承受的生命值伤害都会增加创伤。

当一个生物处于虚弱状态时，其最大动作值受到 -2 减值，并失去进行一次免费移动动作的能力。

A creature that is Weakened is vulnerable to taking deadly wounds. Protagonists become Weakened when they reach zero Health. Any further damage to Health taken while Weakened increases Wounds.

While a creature is Weakened, it suffers -2 to maximum Action and loses access to a free Movement action.

Dead.name: 死亡 Dead
Dead.text:
当一名主角的创伤达到其最大值，或当一名对手的生命值降至零时，该角色即为死亡。处于死亡状态的生物也被视为失能，不能再休息，且除非借助魔法手段，否则无法复活。

When a protagonist's Wounds reach their maximum value, or when an adversary's Health reaches zero, that character is Dead. A creature which is Dead is also treated as Incapacitated, can no longer Rest, and cannot be revived except by magical means.

Diseased.name: 染病 Diseased
Diseased.text:
处于染病状态的生物，在染病效果的持续时间内无法恢复生命值或治疗创伤。

A creature that is Diseased cannot recover Health or heal Wounds for the duration of the Diseased effect.

Invulnerable.name: 无敌 Invulnerable
Invulnerable.text:
处于无敌状态的生物暂时免疫生命值或创伤伤害。

A creature that is Invulnerable is temporarily immune to Health or Wounds damage.

Broken.name: 破碎 Broken
Broken.text:
处于破碎状态的生物更容易受到心理创伤。主角在士气降至零时会变为破碎。在破碎时，若士气再受到任何进一步的伤害，都会增加疯狂。

当一个生物处于破碎状态时，它不能消耗专注，且它所进行的动作会承受+2 祸骰。

处于破碎状态的生物无法为夹击提供助力。变为破碎的非玩家对手会尝试逃离战斗，除非它们缺乏自我保存的本能，或看起来根本无法逃脱。

A creature that is Broken is vulnerable to psychological trauma. Protagonists become Broken when they reach zero Morale. Any further damage to Morale taken while Broken increases Madness.

While a creature is Broken it cannot expend Focus and actions it takes suffer from +2 Banes.

Creatures which are Broken cannot contribute towards Flanking. Non-player Adversaries which become Broken will attempt to flee the battle unless they lack instincts of self-preservation or escape seems impossible.

Insane.name: 疯狂 Insane
Insane.text:
当一名主角的疯狂达到其最大值时，该角色便会疯狂。处于疯狂状态的角色将不再由其玩家控制，而改由游戏主持人控制。除非借助魔法手段，否则此状态无法被治疗或治愈。

When a protagonist's Madness reaches its maximum value, that character is Insane. A character which is Insane may no longer be controlled by its player and is controlled by the Gamemaster. This condition cannot be healed or cured except by magical means.

Frightened.name: 恐慌 Frightened
Frightened.text:
处于恐慌状态的生物在恐慌效果的持续时间内无法恢复士气或治疗疯狂。

A creature that is Frightened cannot recover Morale or heal Madness for the duration of the Frightened effect.

Resolute.name: 坚定 Resolute
Resolute.text:
处于坚定状态的生物会暂时免疫士气或疯狂伤害。

A creature which is Resolute is temporarily immune to Morale or Madness damage.

Enraged.name: 激怒 Enraged
Enraged.text:
当一个生物处于激怒状态时，它的行为会变得鲁莽，更难以保护自己。处于激怒状态的生物，其格挡和招架防御变为零，且该生物不能消耗专注。

When a creature is Enraged, it behaves recklessly and is less able to defend itself. An Enraged creature's Block and Parry defenses become zero and that creature cannot expend Focus.

Exposed.name: 暴露 Exposed
Exposed.text:
某些攻击会让敌人暂时变得脆弱。当一个生物处于暴露状态时，其基础护甲防御承受 -2 惩罚。

Some attacks can leave an enemy temporarily vulnerable. When a creature is Exposed its base Armor defense suffers a -2 penalty.

Flanked.name: 夹击 Flanked
Flanked.text:
当一个生物同时被数量超过其交战值的多个生物交战时，它会处于夹击状态。夹击状态有多个整数阶段，从夹击 1 开始，其中每一级夹击都会使针对该生物进行的攻击检定获得+1 恩惠。

虽然更多处于交战的敌人会提高你的夹击状态，但若有相邻且正在支援你的盟友，则可以抵消夹击。如果你们与相同的敌人处于交战，那么盟友会将其自身的交战值作为加值加到你的交战值上。

When a creature is simultaneously Engaged by a number of creatures greater than its Engagement score, it has the Flanked condition. The Flanked condition has multiple integer stages, starting at Flanked 1, where each stage of Flanked contributes +1 Boon to attack rolls made against that creature.

While having more Engaged enemies increases your Flanked condition, having adjacent allies who are supporting you can nullify flanking. Allies contribute their own Engagement as a bonus to yours if you share enemies in common that you are both Engaged with.

Incapacitated.name: 失能 Incapacitated
Incapacitated.text:
当一个生物完全无法行动时，它便处于失能状态。当一个目标处于失能状态时，它的闪避、格挡和招架防御变为零，并且不再从属性值对坚韧、意志或反射防御的加值中受益。它不能参与夹击，也不能以其他方式协助盟友。

When a creature is entirely unable to act, it is Inacapacitated. When a target is Incapacitated, its Dodge, Block, and Parry defenses become zero and it no longer benefits from Ability Score bonuses to Fortitude, Willpower, or Reflex defense. It cannot contribute to Flanking or otherwise aid allies.

Prone.name: 倒地 Prone
Prone.text:
被击倒在地，或主动扑倒在地的生物，视为倒地。处于倒地时，针对该目标的近战攻击获得 +1 恩惠，而针对该目标的远程攻击承受 +1 祸骰。此外，倒地生物进行的任何攻击都承受 +1 祸骰，且该生物无法从免费移动中受益。从倒地状态起身需要使用一个移动动作。

A creature that has been knocked to the ground, or has voluntarily thrown itself to the ground is considered Prone. While Prone, melee attacks against the target benefit from +1 Boon while ranged attacks against the target suffer from +1 Bane. Additionally, any attacks made by a Prone creature suffer +1 Bane, and the creature cannot benefit from a free Move. Returning to your feet from a Prone position requires the use of a Movement action.

Staggered.name: 踉跄 Staggered
Staggered.text:
处于踉跄状态的生物，其最大动作数减少 2。

A creature that is Staggered has their maximum Action reduced by 2.

Stunned.name: 震慑 Stunned
Stunned.text:
处于踉跄状态的生物，其最大动作数减少4。

A creature that is Staggered has their maximum Action reduced by 4.

Paralyzed.name: 麻痹 Paralyzed
Paralyzed.text:
处于麻痹状态的生物在麻痹结束前无法执行动作。在此期间，目标处于失能状态。

A creature that is Paralyzed is unable to perform Actions until the paralysis is ended. During this time the target is Incapacitated.

Slowed.name: 迟缓 Slowed
Slowed.text:
处于迟缓状态的生物在判定移动动作消耗时，将距离视为双倍。此外，处于迟缓状态的生物无法从免费移动中受益。

A creature that is Slowed treats distance as doubled for the purposes of determining the cost of the Move action. Additionally, a Slowed creature cannot benefit from a free Move.

Restrained.name: 受拘束 Restrained
Restrained.text:
处于受拘束状态的生物无法执行任何涉及移动的动作，且进行攻击检定时承受+2 祸骰。

A creature that is Restrained is unable to perform any Action which involves Movement and suffers +2 Banes to attack rolls.

Disoriented.name: 迷失方向 Disoriented
Disoriented.text:
处于迷失方向状态的生物在进行所有需要专注的动作时，专注消耗都要增加 +1。

A creature that is Disoriented incurs a +1 Focus cost to all Actions which require Focus.

Guarded.name: 戒备 Guarded
Guarded.text:
某些地形或能力可能会暂时强化一个生物的防御。当一个生物处于戒备状态时，对其进行的攻击会承受+1祸骰。

Some terrain or abilities may temporarily harden a creature's defenses. When a creature is Guarded attacks against it suffer +1 Banes.

Unaware.name: 未察觉 Unaware
Unaware.text:
处于未察觉状态的生物在战斗中的先攻为 1，且不能进行反应。

A creature that is Unaware acts in combat at Initiative 1 and cannot perform Reactions.

Bleeding.name: 流血 Bleeding
Bleeding.text:
处于流血状态的生物会在其后续每个回合开始时受到额外的穿刺或挥砍伤害（取决于触发的伤害类型），并失去生命值。

A Bleeding creature suffers additional Piercing or Slashing damage, depending on the triggering damage type, to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Poisoned.name: 中毒 Poisoned
Poisoned.text:
处于中毒状态的生物会在其后续每个回合开始时，额外受到毒素伤害并失去生命值。

A Poisoned creature suffers additional Poison damage to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Corroding.name: 腐蚀 Corroding
Corroding.text:
处于腐蚀状态的生物会在其后续每个回合开始时，受到额外的强酸伤害，并损失生命值。

A Corroding creature suffers additional Acid damage to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Burning.name: 燃烧 Burning
Burning.text:
处于燃烧状态的生物会在其后续每个回合开始时，额外受到火元素伤害并损失生命值。

A Burning creature suffers additional Fire damage to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Freezing.name: 冰冻 Freezing
Freezing.text:
一个处于冰冻状态的生物会在其后续各回合开始时，对其生命值承受额外的寒冷伤害。

A Freezing creature suffers additional Cold damage to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Irradiated.name: 辐照 Irradiated
Irradiated.text:
一个辐照生物会在其后续回合开始时，对其生命值和士气额外受到光辉伤害。

An Irradiated creature suffers additional Radiant damage to both Health and Morale at the start of its subsequent turns.

Decaying.name: 腐坏 Decaying
Decaying.text:
处于腐坏状态的生物在其后续每个回合开始时，都会受到额外的腐化伤害，并失去生命值。

A Decaying creature suffers additional Corruption damage to Health at the start of its subsequent turns.

Hastened.name: 加速 Hastened
Hastened.text:
处于加速状态的生物在判定移动动作的消耗时，将距离视为减半。此外，处于加速状态的生物每个回合可用的最大动作数+1。

A creature that is Hastened treats distance as halved for the purposes of determining the cost of the Move action. Additionally, a creature that is Hastened has +1 maximum Action available each turn.

Blinded.name: 目盲 Blinded
Blinded.text:
处于目盲状态的生物无法通过基于光的察觉进行视物，也不能使用任何要求看见目标的动作。目盲生物的攻击承受 +2 祸骰，而对其进行的攻击获得 +2 恩惠。

A creature that is Blinded may not see using light-based perception and cannot use any Action which requires the target to be seen. A Blinded creature's attacks suffer +2 Banes, while attacks against it gain +2 Boons.

Deafened.name: 失聪 Deafened
Deafened.text:
处于失聪状态的生物无法利用任何基于声音的察觉，且无法受到任何具有Vocal特质的动作影响。

TODO: Vocal 特质的实现仍有待完成。

A creature which is Deafened is unable to utilize any sound-based perception and cannot be affected by any action with the Vocal trait.

TODO: Implementation of the Vocal trait still to come.

Silenced.name: 沉默 Silenced
Silenced.text:
处于沉默状态的生物无法执行任何具有Vocal特质的动作，也无法施放包含超魔屈折的法术。

TODO: Vocal 特质的实现仍待完成。

A creature which is Silenced is unable to perform any action with the Vocal trait or to cast a Spell which includes a metamagic Inflection.

TODO: Implementation of the Vocal trait still to come.

Invisible.name: 隐形 Invisible
Invisible.text:
处于隐形状态的生物无法通过基于视觉的察觉被发现。

TODO：关于隐形的更高级规则仍待补充。

A creature which is Inivisible cannot be detected using sight-based perception.

TODO: More advanced rules for invisibility still to come.

Asleep.name: 睡眠 Asleep
Asleep.text:
处于睡眠状态的生物视为失能。对其生命值或创伤造成的任何伤害都会使其立即醒来。除非另有说明，否则该生物在睡眠期间免疫士气伤害。

A creature that is Asleep is treated as incapacitated. Any damage to Health or Wounds causes it to immediately awaken. The creature is immune to Morale damage while sleeping unless otherwise stated.

Shocked.name: 电击 Shocked
Shocked.text:
处于电击状态的生物在每个回合开始时，其士气受到电击伤害。

A Shocked creature suffers Electricity damage to Morale at the start of each turn.

Exhausted.name: 精疲力竭 Exhausted
Exhausted.text:
处于精疲力竭状态的生物无法再主动进行防御。其闪避和反射防御减半。

A creature that is Exhausted can no longer actively defend itself. It's Dodge and Reflex defenses are reduced by half.

Mending.name: 修补 Mending
Mending.text:
处于修补状态的生物会在其每个回合开始时逐渐恢复生命值。恢复的生命值数量由修补效果的对应数值决定。

A creature that is Mending will gradually recover Health at the start of each of its turns. The amount of Health recovered is defined by a corresponding value of the Mending effect.

Inspired.name: 鼓舞 Inspired
Inspired.text:
处于鼓舞状态的生物会在其每个回合开始时逐渐恢复士气。恢复的士气数量由鼓舞效果的对应数值决定。

A creature that is Inspired will gradually recover Morale at the start of each of its turns. The amount of Morale recovered is defined by a corresponding value of the Inspired effect.

Confused.name: 混乱 Confused
Confused.text:
处于混乱状态的生物在每个回合开始时会受到心灵伤害，并扣减士气，且还视为处于迷失方向状态。

A Confused creature suffers Psychic damage to Morale at the start of each turn, and is also treated as Disoriented.

Entropy.name: 熵蚀 Entropy
Entropy.text:
受熵蚀影响的生物会在每个回合开始时受到虚空伤害并失去生命值，同时也视为处于恐慌状态。

A creature afflicted with Entropy suffers Void damage to Health at the start of each turn, and is also treated as Frightened.

Burrowing.name: 掘穴 Burrowing
Burrowing.text:
完全潜入地下的生物处于掘穴状态。处于掘穴状态时，生物无法看见，也不能被基于光的察觉方式看见。

A creature that is submerged entirely within the ground is Burrowing. While Burrowing, a creature cannot see or be seen using light-based perception.

Alchemy.name: 炼金术 Alchemy
Alchemy.text:
炼金术是一门科学实践，通过发酵、蒸馏或均质化，将植物与矿物等材料结合起来，以制造可消耗的医疗物品、毒药和爆炸物。

炼金术士可以将常见易得的材料组合起来，制成可消耗的药剂，例如@UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.healingTonic0000]{治疗药剂}或 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.poisonVial000000]{毒药瓶}，以及可投掷的武器，例如 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.KdlUUFhAnpv6YIHT]{爆炸瓶}。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示炼金术训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.alchemyNovice000]{炼金术新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.alchemyJourneyma]{炼金术熟练工}

Alchemy is the scientific practice of combining ingredients such as botanicals and minerals in order to produce consumable medicines, poisons, and explosives through zymurgy, distillation, or homogenization.

An alchemist can combine commonly available ingredients to produce consumable potions such as@UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.healingTonic0000]{Healing Tonic} or @UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.poisonVial000000]{Poison Vial}, as well as throwable weapons such as @UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.KdlUUFhAnpv6YIHT]{Blast Flask}.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Alchemical training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.alchemyNovice000]{Alchemy Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.alchemyJourneyma]{Alchemy Journeyman}

Cooking.name: 烹饪 Cooking
Cooking.text:
烹饪是将常见的材料组合起来，以制作可供食用、维持生计的餐食的手艺。训练有素的厨师能够准备丰盛的餐食，以提升队伍的表演并帮助恢复士气。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示在烹饪艺术方面所受的训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.cookingNovice000]{烹饪新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.cookingJourneyma]{烹饪熟练工}

Cooking is the tradecraft of combining commonly available ingredients in order to prepare a consumable meal for sustenance. Well trained cooks can prepare hearty meals that bolster party performance and aid in the recovery of morale.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent training in the art of Cooking:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.cookingNovice000]{Cooking Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.cookingJourneyma]{Cooking Journeyman}

Enchanting.name: 附魔 Enchanting
Enchanting.text:
附魔是将现有的符文（由 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.glyphweaving0000]{Glyphweavers} 制作）与其他工匠制作的装备（例如 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.smithing00000000]{Smiths}、@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.tailoring0000000]{Tailors} 和 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.jewelcraft000000]{Jewelcrafters} 制作的物品）相结合的技艺，以便为这些物品赋予永久性的魔法属性。为物品进行附魔的过程通常还需要一些额外的感应性材料成分，在仪式中用来将魔法效果绑定到一件非魔法物品上，而这件物品通常至少需要具有精良品质。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示在附魔技艺方面所接受的训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.enchantingNovice]{附魔新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.enchantingJourne]{附魔熟练工}

Enchanting is the art of combining existing Glyphs (created by @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.glyphweaving0000]{Glyphweavers}) with equipment created by other crafters (such as @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.smithing00000000]{Smiths}, @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.tailoring0000000]{Tailors}, and @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.jewelcraft000000]{Jewelcrafters}) in order to imbue those items with permanent magical properties. The process of enchanting an item typically involves some additional sympathetic material components which are used in a ritual to bind the magical effect to a non-magical item, typically one of at least Fine quality.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent training in the art of Enchanting:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.enchantingNovice]{Enchanting Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.enchantingJourne]{Enchanting Journeyman}

Fletching.name: 制箭 Fletching
Fletching.text:
制箭是将木材、皮革、植物纤维和羽毛等常见材料组合起来，以制作弓和弹药的技艺。制箭师能够制作和修理弓，并确保自己不会耗尽合适的箭矢补给。

天赋

以下天赋可用于体现制箭训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.fletchingNovice0]{制箭新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.fletchingJourney]{制箭熟练工}

Fletching is the skill of combining commonly available components such as wood, leather, plant fibers and feathers to create bows and ammunition. A Fletcher is capable of crafting and repairing bows, and ensuring that they don't run out of suitable supply of arrows.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Fletcher training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.fletchingNovice0]{Fletching Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.fletchingJourney]{Fletching Journeyman}

Jewelcraft.name: 珠宝制作 Jewelcraft
Jewelcraft.text:
珠宝制作是将装饰性金属与稀有结晶矿物结合起来，制作戒指、手镯和项链的技艺，也包括将装饰性（以及可能具有魔力的）宝石镶嵌到这些及其他装备中。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示珠宝制作训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.jewelcraftNovice]{珠宝制作新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.jewelcraftJourne]{珠宝制作熟练工}

Jewelcrafting is the art of combining decorative metals and rare crystalized minerals to compose rings, bracelets, and necklaces as well as the insetting of decorative (and potentially magical) gems into these and other pieces of equipment.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Jewelcraft training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.jewelcraftNovice]{Jewelcraft Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.jewelcraftJourne]{Jewelcraft Journeyman}

Glyphweaving.name: 符文编织 Glyphweaving
Glyphweaving.text:
符文编织是一门奥术科学，通过铭刻形而上 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.qjTSKlh59JhtUuEr.JournalEntryPage.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{符文} 的物理显现来创造Glyphs。Glyphs可用于为非魔法材料注入魔法属性，或作为辅助仪式魔法的组成部分。

天赋

以下天赋可用于体现Glyphweaver训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.glyphweavingNovi]{符纹编织新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.glyphweavingJour]{符文编织熟练工}

Glyphweaving is the arcane science of inscribing physical manifestations of metaphysical @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.qjTSKlh59JhtUuEr.JournalEntryPage.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{Runes} to create Glyphs. Glyphs can be used to imbue magical properties into non-magical materials or as a component to aid ritual magic.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Glyphweaver training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.glyphweavingNovi]{Glyphweaving Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.glyphweavingJour]{Glyphweaving Journeyman}

Smithing.name: 锻造 Smithing
Smithing.text:
锻造是运用基础金属和合金来制作工具、护甲和武器，以及修理和维护金属制物品与装备的技能。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示铁匠训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.smithingNovice00]{锻造新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.smithingJourneym]{锻造熟练工}

Smithing is the skill of working to combine base metals and alloys in the production of tools, armor, and weapons as well as the repair and maintenance of metal-crafted items and equipment.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Smith training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.smithingNovice00]{Smithing Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.smithingJourneym]{Smithing Journeyman}

Tailoring.name: 裁缝 Tailoring
Tailoring.text:
裁缝是将织物、毛皮和皮革结合起来，用于制作服装和护甲，以及修理和维护由天然纤维和皮料制成的物品与装备的技艺。

天赋

以下天赋可用于表示裁缝训练：

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.tailoringNovice0]{裁缝新手}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.tailoringJourney]{裁缝熟练工}

Tailoring is the art of working to combine fabrics, furs and leathers in the production of clothing and armor as well as the repair and maintenance of items and equipment crafted from natural fibers and skins.

Talents

The following talents are available to represent Tailor training:

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.tailoringNovice0]{Tailoring Novice}

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.tailoringJourney]{Tailoring Journeyman}

Schematics.name: 图纸 Schematics
Schematics.text:
图纸是 Crucible 中的物品，用于定义一套规则：如何通过制作系统及其一组制作技艺@UUID[.tradeskillsOverv]{制作技艺}，将输入物品（通常称为“材料”）转化为输出物品（通常称为“产品”）。

图纸定义

图纸具有以下组成部分：

类别

图纸的类别决定了制造它所需的制作技艺。

输入

图纸的输入定义了一组制造该图纸所需的材料。材料可以按组指定，每个组都有特定模式，用以自定义该组中是否需要全部材料，或只需多个选项中的一种。

此外，每个输入组还可以要求一定数量的货币，用以表示制作尝试中固有但未逐一列为材料物品的次要材料或补给。

最后，每个输入组都会说明该组中的材料在制作过程中是否会被消耗。请注意，即使某些材料在制作过程中通常不会被消耗，如果尝试结果为严重失败，它们也可能会变为破碎。

输出

图纸的输出定义了成功制造该图纸后所得的产品。一张图纸可以产出一个或多个输出。若会产生多个输出，图纸可以设定为获得全部输出，或仅获得其中一个。

如果只获得一个输出，则图纸必须定义若干个可选输入组，其数量与潜在产品数量相对应。制作时所使用的输入组决定了最终获得哪一种产品。

品质

图纸具有一个品质，用于定义通过该图纸制造所得输出的初始品质。输出的最终品质还取决于所用材料的品质，以及对应制作检定的成功阶级。

难度

图纸定义了一个难度阈值（DC），指定制作检定必须超过的数值，才能获得成功结果。

小时

图纸会指定完成制造所需的小时数。这些小时必须连续进行且不中断。对于持续时间特别长的制作工作，任何所需的休息时间都应计入该数值。

获取图纸

图纸通常是在冒险过程中获得的，可以通过在世界中发现它们，或从其他角色处取得。每张图纸和所有实体物品一样，都有一个基础价格，并会根据其品质等级进一步调整。这个价格用于与非玩家角色交易时购买或出售图纸。

核心 Crucible 系统提供了若干图纸。这些系统提供的图纸可在 Crucible ➤ Items ➤ Schematics 资料库包中找到。

游戏主持人可以定义自己的图纸，直接授予角色，或将其放入附加资料库包中，使其可用于制作。

自定义图纸资料库包可以在 Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources 下指定。

学习图纸

图纸为其输出的创造过程提供详细说明。制造一件物品要求制作者必须实际持有该图纸、已经掌握它，或该图纸被归类为“通用知识”。

图纸可通过完成其制作流程并获得严重成功结果来掌握。一旦掌握图纸，之后重复该流程时便不再需要实际持有该图纸。

Schematics are items in Crucible which define the rules by which input items (often called "ingredients") are transformed into output items (often called "products") using the crafting system and its set of Trades@UUID[.tradeskillsOverv]{Tradeskills}.

Schematic Definition

Schematics have the following components:

Category

The category of a schematic defines which Tradeskill is required to manufacture it.

Inputs

Schematic inputs define a set of ingredients which are required in order to manufacture it. Ingredients can be specified in groups, with each group having a specific mode that customizes whether all ingredients in that group are required or only one of several options.

Additionally, each input group can require a certain amount of currency which represents minor ingredients or supplies inherent in the crafting attempt which are not individually enumerated as ingredient items.

Lastly, each input group specifies whether the ingredients in that group are consumed in the process of crafting or not. Note that even ingredients which are not ordinarily consumed during the process of crafting can become broken if the attempt results in a critical failure.

Outputs

Schematic outputs define the products which result from successful manufacturing of the schematic. A schematic can produce one or multiple outputs. In the event that multiple outputs are produced, the schematic can configure whether all of the outputs are obtained or only one of them.

If only one output is obtained, the schematic must define a number of alternative input groups which maps to the number of potential products. The input group used during crafting determines which product is obtained.

Quality

Schematics have a quality which defines the initial quality of outputs resulting from manufacture of the schematic. The final quality of outputs is also determined by the quality of ingredients used as well as the success tier on the corresponding crafting check.

Difficulty

Schematics define a difficulty threshold (DC) which specifies the value that a crafting check must exceed in order to result in a successful outcome.

Hours

Schematics specify the number of hours required to complete manufacture. These hours must be performed consecutively without interruption. For especially long-duration crafting endeavors any amount of required resting time should be included in this number.

Obtaining Schematics

Schematics are generally obtained during the course of adventure by finding them within the world or obtaining them from other characters. Each schematic, like all physical items, has a base price which is further scaled according to its quality level. This price is used when purchasing or selling schematics in trade with non-player characters.

There are a number of schematics provided by the core Crucible system. These system-provided schematics can be found in the Crucible ➤ Items ➤ Schematics compendium pack.

Gamemasters can define their own schematics which can be awarded to characters directly or placed into an ancillary compendium pack which makes them available for use in crafting.

Custom compendium packs of schematics can be assigned under Configure Settings ➤ Crucible ➤ Configure Compendium Sources.

Learning Schematics

Schematics provide detailed instructions for the creation process of their outputs. Manufacturing an item requires the crafter to either physically possess the schematic, have mastered it, or for the schematic to be classified as "common knowledge".

Schematics are mastered by completing their crafting process with a result of a critical success. Once a schematic has been mastered it is no longer physically required in order to repeat its process.

Crucible 的制作系统目前仍处于早期开发阶段，此处撰写的规则可能会发生变化，且许多细节可能尚未完成。请将这些细节视为未来内容的预览。

Crucible's crafting system is currently in early development, rules written here are subject to change and many details may not yet be finished. Please consider these details a preview of things to come.

Ingredients.name: 材料 Ingredients
Ingredients.text:
材料是 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.schematicDefinit]{图纸} 为了产出实体成品而需要的组成部分。材料在品质和附魔阶级方面可能各不相同，而且每种材料都可能具有各种属性，这些属性会共同影响制作品的整体品质。

Ingredients are the components required by @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.schematicDefinit]{Schematics} in order to produce a physical output. Ingredients can differ in terms of quality and enchantment tier, and each ingredient can have a variety of properties that contribute to the overall quality of the crafted output.

Crucible 中的制作是通过一组制作技艺进行的；与冒险相关的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.skills0000000000]{技能} 类似，它们是你角色身份中已注入的部分，可通过 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.talents000000000]{天赋} 进阶以及积累以 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleCrafting.JournalEntryPage.schematicDefinit]{图纸} 形式存在的知识来获得。

Crucible 的制作系统目前仍处于早期开发阶段，此处写明的规则可能会发生变化，且许多细节可能尚未完成。请将这些内容视为未来内容的预览。

任何角色都不必一定投入到某项制作技艺的精通中，不过通常建议至少选择一项制作技艺进行钻研，以便获得更完整的 Crucible 游玩体验，尤其是在你的游戏是长期战役时。
