Dice Mechanics.name: 骰子机制 Dice Mechanics
Dice Mechanics.text:
Crucible 使用标准的桌上角色扮演游戏骰组；在各种掷骰中会用到4面、6面、8面、10面、12面和20面骰。这些骰子分别称为d4、d6、d8、d10和d12，而骰子类型前面的数字表示要掷出的该类骰子的数量，例如4d6表示掷四个六面骰。

Crucible 是专门为 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 设计的，但它的骰子机制也可以在数字环境之外进行游戏，只是需要相当高程度的记录与管理。

当你的角色在世界中执行英雄般的动作时，无论是展现武艺的壮举，还是巧妙的社交周旋，所尝试动作的结果都通过掷骰来决定。

标准检定

在 Crucible 中，用于判定一次骰子检定结果的标准方法，是使用一个由三颗骰子组成并将结果相加的骰池，通常为 3d8。骰池中具体使用哪些骰子，会根据适用于此次掷骰的恩惠或祸骰而调整。在这三颗骰子的结果之上，还要加上属性、技能和附魔加值，以进一步提高最终结果的数值。这种类型的掷骰称为标准检定。

标准检定

=

3d8[Boons,Banes] + Ability Bonus + Skill Bonus + Enchantment Bonus

Crucible uses the standard set of role-playing game dice; relying upon 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, and 20-sided dice for various rolls. These dice are referred to as d4, d6, d8, d10, and d12, where a number that precedes the die type represents the quantity of that die to roll, for example 4d6 provides instruction to roll four six-sided dice.

Crucible is designed specifically for Foundry Virtual Tabletop, but its dice mechanics are possible to play outside of a digital environment, albeit with a fairly high level of bookkeeping required.

When your character performs heroic actions within the world, whether they be feats of martial prowess or clever social maneuvers, the outcomes of the attempted action are discovered by rolling dice.

Standard Check

The standard approach towards determining the outcome of a dice check in Crucible uses a dice pool comprised of three dice, typically 3d8, which are added together. The exact dice used in the pool are modified depending on the Boons or Banes which apply to the roll. Added to the result of these three dice are Ability, Skill, and Enchantment bonuses which further increase the value of the result. This type of dice roll is referred to as a Standard Check.

Standard Check

=

3d8[Boons,Banes] + Ability Bonus + Skill Bonus + Enchantment Bonus

Boons and Banes.name: 恩惠与祸骰 Boons and Banes
Boons and Banes.text:
一名地精正拼命用它那把已受损、钝掉的刀刃刺向一名身披护甲的人类。一名附魔师想与一位被她用魔法魅惑的商人讨价还价。一名士兵挥动他的锤子，砸向一头昏沉且脑震荡的食人魔头部。在进行一次检定时，角色可能会发现某些有利情势会让胜算偏向自己。其他不利情势则会妨碍角色成功的几率。

会对一次检定成功可能性施加有利或不利影响的情势，分别以恩惠与祸骰表示。一次掷骰要应用多少恩惠与祸骰，必须在掷骰前决定，因为它们会直接影响所使用骰池的构图。单次骰池掷骰受到的恩惠与祸骰影响都不能超过 6 个。

恩惠

每个施加于检定的恩惠，都会使骰池中第一个骰子的面值提升 +2，最高至d12。如果某个骰子因其他恩惠已经是 d12，则这次提升会应用到骰池中的下一个骰子。实际来说，恩惠会升级骰子，使其更大也更有效。

祸骰

每个施加于检定的祸骰，都会使骰池中最后一个骰子的面值降低 -2，最低至d4。如果某个骰子因其他祸骰已经是 d4，则这次降低会应用到骰池中的下一个骰子。实际来说，祸骰会降级骰子，使其更小且更不有效。

情势抵消

由于恩惠与祸骰分别从骰池的两端开始生效，它们可以同时对同一次掷骰造成变化。例如，一次带有 2 个恩惠和 2 个祸骰的检定，将得到1d12 + 1d8 + 1d4的骰池。如果恩惠超过四个且祸骰也超过四个，它们的效果就会开始彼此抵消。

示例：增加恩惠

假设海军队长阿尔伯特的船遭到海盗登船袭击。幸运的是，船身剧烈摇晃，把其中一名入侵者掀翻在他船上的甲板上。阿尔伯特朝这名摊倒的海盗逼近，拔出刀刃，朝这位不速之客猛然劈下。攻击一个倒地的生物会给予阿尔伯特的攻击检定2 个恩惠。

这两个恩惠会将3d8骰池中的第一个骰子提升两次，从d8升到d12，最终形成1d12 + 1d8 + 1d8的骰池。

由 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleConditio]{状态}（如倒地）产生的恩惠或祸骰，将由 Crucible 软件中的自动化层自动处理；但在任何掷骰之前，游戏主持人始终都可以额外给予恩惠，以此奖励玩家富有创意的问题解决方式或富有感染力的角色扮演。

示例：同时有恩惠与祸骰

达丽尔是一位勇敢无畏的野外行家，在生存上拥有熟练工等级，并专精于草药学。经过艰辛跋涉的一天后，她想要鉴定一种可用于治疗中毒的草药。她作为草药师的专精使她在鉴定正确草药的掷骰中获得1 个恩惠，但她的力竭状态让她的掷骰承受2 个祸骰。这个恩惠会将骰池中的第一个骰子提升为d10，而这两个祸骰会将第三个骰子降为d4，最终形成1d10 + 1d8 + 1d4的骰池。

从数学上说，每个恩惠都会使其对应骰子的期望结果增加 1，而每个祸骰都会使其对应骰子的期望结果减少 1。

A goblin desperately thrusts at an armored human with its damaged, dull blade. An enchanter wishes to haggle with a merchant she has magically charmed. A soldier swings his hammer at the head of a dazed, concussed ogre. When performing a check, a character may find some favorable circumstances shift the odds in their favor. Other disadvantageous circumstances will hinder a character's odds of success.

Circumstances which apply beneficial or detrimental forces upon the likelihood of a check being successful are represented as Boons and Banes, respectively. The number of boons and banes to be applied to a roll are determined before a roll is made, as they directly affect the composition of the dice pool that is used. A single dice pool roll can have no more than 6 boons and 6 banes affecting it.

Boons

Each Boon applied to the check increments the denomination of the first die in the pool by +2, to a maximum of d12. If a die is already a d12 due to other boons, the increase is applied to the next die in the pool. In practical terms, boons upgrade dice making them bigger and more effective.

Banes

Each Bane applied to the check decrements the denomination of the last die in the pool by -2, to a minimum of d4. If a die is already a d4 due to other banes, the decrease is applied to the next die in the pool. In practical terms, banes downgrade dice making them smaller and less effective.

Mitigating Circumstances

Because boons and banes start at opposite ends of the dice pool, they can both affect changes to the same roll. For example, a check made with with 2 Boons and 2 Banes would result in a dice pool of 1d12 + 1d8 + 1d4. If more than four Boons and more than four Banes are present their effects will begin to cancel each other out.

Example: Added Boons

Suppose Albert, a naval captain, has his ship boarded by pirates. By fortunate circumstance, the fierce rocking of the ship has toppled one of the invaders over on the deck of his ship. Advancing towards the sprawling pirate, Albert draws his blade and slashes down upon the unwelcome guest. Attacking a Prone creature confers 2 boons to Albert's attack roll.

These two boons upgrade the first die in the 3d8 dice pool twice, from a d8 to a d12, resulting in a dice pool of 1d12 + 1d8 + 1d8.

Boons or banes resulting from @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.crucibleConditio]{Conditions} like Prone will be handled automatically by layers of automation in the Crucible software, but additional boons may always be awarded by the Gamemaster prior to any roll as ways to reward players for creative problem solving or inspirational roleplay.

Example: Both Boons and Banes

Dariel is an intrepid outdoorswoman with the Journeyman rank in Survival with a Herbalist specialization. She wishes to identify a herb that may be used to treat poison after an arduous day of traveling. Her specialization as a Herbalist gives her 1 Boon to the roll to identify the correct herb, but her state of exhaustion gives her 2 Banes to her roll. The boon upgrades the first die in the pool to a d10, and the two banes downgrade the third die to a d4, resulting in a dice pool of 1d10 + 1d8 + 1d4.

Mathematically, each Boon increases the expected result of its die by 1 and each Bane decreases the expected result of its die by 1.

Weapons.name: 武器 Weapons
Weapons.text:
武器是一种特定的物品类型，代表角色手持并在战斗中使用的物品。Crucible 系统提供了用于创造和分类武器的基础规则，也提供了一系列预先定义的武器类型，这些类型通常见于奇幻角色扮演游戏中。这些武器可以在武器 Compendium 包中浏览。

除所有物品共享的属性外，武器还具有以下属性：

类别

武器的类别决定了该武器如何使用的某些参数。它需要几只手来持用？它是近战武器还是远程武器？它是否需要弹药？哪些属性值会影响其使用？以及更多。可能的武器类别列于下表。

伤害类型

每种武器在战斗中造成伤害时都会造成一种特定的伤害类型。

武器特性

武器可能具有若干特殊特性，这些特性会赋予该物品如下表所述的特殊规则功能。

武器类别

下表列出了 Crucible 游戏系统支持的武器类别。

品质阶级

武器的品质描述其工艺、材料和状态。品质阶级会为武器的基础伤害提供额外加值，并影响其稀有度评分。

武器的品质阶级在其最初被创造时就已确定，此后永远不能提高。

破碎武器

在使用过程中，或随着时间流逝，武器可能会变为破碎。破碎武器造成其普通伤害的一半，且不能为格挡或招架防御提供加成。修复破碎武器会将其恢复到原本的品质阶级，或根据修复该武器的手艺技能检定结果恢复到较低的品质阶级。

附魔阶级

武器的附魔描述其魔法灌注的程度。附魔阶级会为武器的攻击检定提供额外加值，并影响其稀有度评分。

次级+1+2

特殊特性

某些武器可能具有以下特殊特性之一（极少数情况下会有多个）。这些特性中的每一个都会为武器增加 +1 稀有度修正。

以下若干特性名称后带有*标记，表示它们在第一个 Crucible 试玩测试系统中尚未完全自动化。

超大

这把武器相对于其类别而言体型更大，若没有特殊训练，在战斗中会难以操控。该武器获得额外 +2 基础伤害加值，但它较为迟缓，并使先攻检定获得 +2 祸骰。

延伸

这把武器较为修长，可提供更大的攻击范围。近战武器的射程增加 +2 尺。远程武器的射程增加 +20 尺。

招架

这把武器在已装备且未破碎时，会为招架防御提供加值。单手武器的加值为 +1，双手武器的加值为 +2，此外再加上该武器的附魔加值。

格挡

这把武器在已装备且未破碎时，会为格挡防御提供加值。单手武器的加值为 +1，双手武器的加值为 +2，此外再加上该武器的附魔加值。

多用*

这把通常为单手的武器也可以用双手有效使用。当副手未装备任何物品时，其基础伤害增加 +2，且动作成本增加 +1。

投掷*

这把武器可以用来在最远 20 尺的距离进行远程打击。当它被用于打击一个不在近战范围内的目标时，该武器会变为未装备状态，且必须在再次使用前取回。

锋锐

这把武器能够造成格外致命的打击。该武器的暴击命中阈值降低 2，使成功的打击更有可能产生暴击。

可靠

这把武器值得信赖，几乎不会产生极其糟糕的结果。该武器的严重失败阈值降低 2，使失败的打击更不容易变成严重失误。

伏击

这把武器易于隐藏且能够快速取出。你可以在自己的回合中免费拔出该武器，或将其作为反应的一部分拔出。

交战

这把武器的设计让你能更好地同时对抗多个敌人，使你的交战值 +1。

Weapons are a specific Item type which represents items that are wielded in a character's hands and used in combat. The Crucible system provides the basic rules for creating and classifying weapons, and also provides an array of pre-defined weapon types which are typically observed in a fantasy role-playing game. These weapons can be browsed in the Weapons Compendium pack.

Weapons all have the following attributes, in addition to those shared by all items:

Category

The category of a weapon establishes certain parameters about how that weapon may be used. How many hands does it require to wield? Is it a melee weapon or a ranged weapon? Does it require ammunition? Which ability scores modify its usage? And more. The possible weapon categories are listed in the table below.

Damage Type

Each weapon deals a specific damage type when it inflicts damage in combat.

Weapon Properties

Weapons may have a number of special properties which instill that item with special rules functionality described in the table below.

Weapon Categories

The following table lists the categories of weapons supported in the Crucible game system.

One-Handed MeleeScalingRangeActionDamageSpecial
NaturalSTR123Offhand
UnarmedSTR,DEX123Offhand
Light (1h)DEX123Offhand
Simple (1h)STR124Offhand
Balanced (1h)STR, DEX224Offhand
Heavy (1h)STR236
Two-Handed MeleeScalingRangeActionDamageSpecial
Simple (2h)STR236
Balanced (2h)STR,DEX336
Heavy (2h)STR348
RangedScalingRangeActionDamageSpecial
Projectile (1h)STR,DEX6024
Talisman (1h)PRE3022Refocus
Mechanical (1h)DEX6024Reload
Projectile (2h)STR,DEX12036
Talisman (2h)PRE3033Refocus
Mechanical (2h)DEX12026Reload
Offhand OnlyScalingRangeActionDamageSpecial
Light ShieldDEX122Block
Heavy ShieldSTR123Block

Quality Tier

Quality of a Weapon describes its craftsmanship, materials, and condition. Quality tiers provide an additional bonus to the base damage of the weapon and contribute towards its Rarity score.

Quality TierDamage BonusRarity Modifier
Shoddy-2-1
Standard00
Fine+1+1
Superior+2+2
Masterwork+3+4

The quality tier of a weapon is established at its time of initial creation and can never be increased after that point.

Broken Weapons

During the course of use, or over the passage of time, weapons may become Broken. Weapons which are Broken deal half their normal damage and cannot contribute to Block or Parry defenses. Repairing a Broken weapon restores it to its original quality tier or a lesser quality tier depending on the result of the Tradecraft skill check to repair the weapon.

Enchantment Tier

Enchantment of a Weapon describes its level of magical imbuement. Enchantment tiers provide an additional bonus to attack rolls of the weapon and contribute towards its Rarity score.

Enchantment TierAttack BonusRarity Modifier
Mundane00
Minor+1+2
Major+2+4
Legendary+3+6

Special Properties

Some weapons may have one (or in very rare cases multiple) of the following special properties. Each of these properties adds a +1 Rarity modifier to the weapon.

Several of the following properties, denoted with an * after their name, are not yet fully automated in the first Crucible Playtest system yet.

Oversized

This weapon is large for its category and is unwieldy in combat without special training. The weapon gains an additional +2 bonus to base damage but is slow and provides +2 Banes to Initiative rolls.

Reach

This weapon is lengthy and offers an expanded attack range. The range of melee weapons is increased by +2 feet. Ranged weapons are expanded by +20 feet.

Parrying

This weapon provides a bonus to Parry defense while equipped and not Broken. The bonus is +1 for one-handed weapons and +2 for two-handed weapons, plus the enchantment bonus of the weapon.

Blocking

This weapon provides a bonus to Block defense while equipped and not Broken. The bonus is +1 for one-handed weapons and +2 for two-handed weapons, plus the enchantment bonus of the weapon.

Versatile*

This normally one-handed weapon can be used effectively with two hands. While equipped without any item in the off-hand its base damage is increased by +2 and Action cost is increased by +1.

Thrown*

This weapon can be used to Strike at range up to a distance of 20 feet. When used to Strike a target that is not within melee range, the Weapon becomes unequipped and must be retrieved before it can be used again.

Keen

This weapon is capable of achieving particularly deadly strikes. The critical hit threshold of the weapon is reduced by 2 making it more likely that successful Strikes yield a critical hit.

Reliable

This weapon is trustworthy and almost never produces spectacularly bad outcomes. The critical failure threshold of the weapon is reduced by 2 making it less likely that unsuccessful Strikes yield a critical miss.

Ambush

This weapon can be easily concealed and retrieved quickly. This weapon may be drawn for free during your own turn or as part of a Reaction.

Engaging

This weapon is designed to better allow you to combat multiple foes, increasing your Engagement by +1.

Equipment Overview.name: 装备概览 Equipment Overview
Equipment Overview.text:
装备指角色可携带或在世界某处找到的物品，包括随身物品、武器装备、护甲、药水、冒险装备，以及其他类型的物品。

所有类型的装备都共享一些通用属性：

重量

每件物品都有按单位计算的重量，以磅表示。

基础价格

物品的基础价格为之后适用的任何价格成长提供基准。对于某些物品而言，基础价格与成长后的价格始终相同，但有些物品的实际价值可能会远高于其基础价格。

物理品质

许多物品可以被赋予一个品质阶级，用以反映某种商品的制造品质或天然稀有程度。

附魔阶级

能够被魔法强化的物品具有附魔阶级，用以反映灌注于该物品中的魔法强度。

稀有度

物品稀有度用于量化该物品相对于其最常见形态的独特性。具有更高制造品质、更强魔法附魔或稀有属性的物品，会拥有更高的稀有度数值，因此也具有更高的价值。

物品价值成长

武器的基础价格由其标准品质、凡俗附魔版本决定。该武器的货币价格会根据其稀有度分数，依照以下公式成长：

物品价值

=

(1 + (稀有度^3) × 基础价格

假设一把标准品质且未附魔的凡俗长剑，其基础价格为50。同类型武器若以大师工艺品质打造，则价格为3200。若再为这把武器附加传奇附魔，则其价格将达到25,650。真是一笔财富！

Equipment refers to the belongings, weaponry, armor, potions, adventuring equipment, and other types of items which could be carried by a character or found somewhere within the world.

Equipment types share a few properties in common across all types:

Weight

Each item has a per-unit weight, expressed in pounds.

Base Cost

The base cost of an item establishes the basis for any cost scaling which later applies. For some items the base cost and scaled cost are always the same, but some items can have a true value many times greater than the item's base cost.

Physical Quality

Many items may be assigned a quality tier which reflects the manufacturing quality or natural rarity of a certain commodity.

Enchantment Tier

Items which can be augmented with magic have an enchantment tier which reflects the potency of magic that is imbued into the item.

Rarity

Item rarity quantifies the uniqueness of the item relative to it's most common form. Items with higher manufactured quality, stronger magical enchantment, or rare properties will have a higher rarity value and therefore a greater value.

Item Value Scaling

The base cost of a weapon is defined by its Standard quality, Mundane enchantment variety. The currency cost of the weapon scales with its Rarity score according to the following formula:

Item Value

=

(1 + (Rarity^3) × Base Cost

Suppose a Standard quality and unenchanted Mundane Longsword has a base cost of 50. The same type of weapon crafted at Masterwork quality would cost 3200. If a Legendary enchantment were added to the weapon, it would then cost 25,650. A true fortune!

Armor.name: 护甲 Armor
Armor.text:
护甲是可以穿戴的物品，用于提供 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Defenses00000000]{物理防御}，以抵御攻击或环境危害。Crucible 系统提供了用于创造和分类护甲的框架与规则，同时也提供了多种预定义的护甲类型，这些类型都符合奇幻角色扮演设定中的常见风格。这些护甲可以在 Armor Compendium 包中浏览。

护甲类别

护甲的类别决定了这种护甲在使用方式上的若干参数。它属于什么重量类别？它能提供多少物理保护？穿戴者在穿着它时还能多大程度上灵活移动？支持的护甲类别列在下表中。下表列出了 Crucible 游戏系统所支持的护甲类别。

护甲类别基础护甲基础闪避成长阈值
无甲080 敏捷
轻型4-86-84 敏捷
中型9-133-56 敏捷
重型14-180-28 敏捷
天然0-180-80 敏捷

这件护甲所贡献的总物理防御，等于其护甲与闪避组成部分之和。

物理防御

=

基础护甲 + 加值护甲 + 基础闪避 + 加值闪避

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.scaleMail0000000]{鳞甲} 是中型护甲，提供13 点护甲防御和3 点基础闪避防御。作为中型护甲，当穿戴者的敏捷高于 6时，鳞甲的效果会继续提升；6 即其成长阈值。当 Jex——一名灵巧、拥有8 点敏捷的战士——穿上鳞甲时，他们获得总计18 点物理防御（13 护甲 + 5 闪避）。

当 Jex 冒险归来回到城市后，他们购买了一套带有优良品质和次级附魔的鳞甲。Jex 的总物理防御提升至20（14 护甲 + 6 闪避）。

穿戴重型护甲时，每回合不能像其他护甲类型那样获得一次免费的移动动作，除非角色拥有某个可抵消此惩罚的特定天赋。

护甲防御

每件护甲都会提供一定数值的基础护甲防御，其数值受该类别允许的范围限制。当物品已装备时，这项护甲防御会直接计入物理防御。除了基础护甲外，该护甲还可能根据其下文所述的品质阶级提供加值护甲。

闪避防御

每件护甲都会提供一个基础闪避防御值。护甲所提供的基础闪避防御量，由其类别对应的特定公式决定。

基础闪避（轻型）

=

10 - (基础护甲 / 2)

基础闪避（中型）

=

10 - ((基础护甲-1) / 2)

基础闪避（重型）

=

10 - ((基础护甲-2) / 2)

基础闪避（天然）

=

10 - (基础护甲 / 2)

除了基础闪避防御之外，每件护甲还可以在穿戴者的敏捷属性值超过某个闪避成长阈值时，提供额外的加值闪避防御。加值闪避还会因物品的附魔阶级而提高，详见下文。

加值闪避

=

Max(敏捷 - 成长阈值, 0) + 附魔加值

品质阶级

护甲的品质描述其工艺、材料与状态。品质阶级会为护甲防御提供额外加值，并提高物品稀有度。护甲的品质阶级在其最初被创造时确定，此后永远无法再提高。

品质阶级加值护甲稀有度修正
粗劣-2-1
标准00
优良+1+1
卓越+2+2
大师工艺+3+4

附魔阶级

护甲的附魔描述其所蕴含的魔法灌注程度。附魔会进一步提高加值闪避防御，并提高物品稀有度。护甲可以在最初创造之后再进行附魔，或提升其附魔水平。

附魔阶级加值闪避稀有度修正
凡俗00
次级+1+2
强效+2+4
传奇+3+6

破碎护甲

在使用过程中，或随着时间流逝，护甲可能会变为破碎。处于破碎状态的护甲，其护甲防御只按正常值的一半生效。

特殊属性

某些护甲可能具有以下特殊属性之一（在极少数情况下也可能具有多个）。这些属性中的每一项都会为该护甲增加 +1 稀有度修正。

笨重

具有笨重属性的护甲难以驾驭，会使所有先攻检定承受 +2 祸骰惩罚。

Armor are items which can be worn to provide @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Defenses00000000]{Physical Defense} against attacks or environmental hazards. The Crucible system provides a framework and rules for creating and classifying Armor, and also provides an assortment of predefined Armor types which are typical to a fantasy role-playing setting. These Armors can be browsed in the Armor Compendium pack.

Armor Categories

The category of armor establishes certain parameters about how that armor is used. What is it's weight category? How much physical protection does it afford? How capable of nimble movement is someone while wearing it? Supported Armor categories are listed in a table below. The following table lists the categories of Armor supported in the Crucible game system.

Armor CategoryBase ArmorBase DodgeScaling Threshold
Unarmored080 Dex
Light4-86-84 Dex
Medium9-133-56 Dex
Heavy14-180-28 Dex
Natural0-180-80 Dex

The total Physical Defense contributed by the piece of Armor is equal to the sum of Armor and Dodge components.

Physical Defense

=

Base Armor + Bonus Armor + Base Dodge + Bonus Dodge

@UUID[Compendium.crucible.equipment.Item.scaleMail0000000]{Scale Mail} is Medium Armor which offers 13 Armor Defense and 3 Base Dodge Defense. As Medium Armor, the effectiveness of Scale Mail will continue to improve if the wearer has more than 6 Dexterity, it's Scaling Threshold. When Jex, a nimble fighter with 8 Dexterity, dons Scale Mail armor they benefit from a total Physical Defense of 18 (13 Armor + 5 Dodge).

When Jex returns to the city from adventuring, they purchase a Fine Quality set of Scale Mail with a Minor Enchantment. Jex' total Physical Defense improves to 20 (14 Armor + 6 Dodge).

Wearing Heavy Armor does not permit a free Move action each turn as other armor types do unless the character has a specific Talent which negates this penalty.

Armor Defense

Each piece of Armor provides a certain amount of Base Armor defense, bounded by the range allowed by its category. This Armor defense contributes directly towards Physical Defense when the item is equipped. In addition to Base Armor, the piece of armor may offer Bonus Armor according to its Quality tier which is described below.

Dodge Defense

Each piece of Armor provides a baseline amount of Dodge defense. The amount of base dodge defense provided by the armor is defined according to a formula specific to its category.

Base Dodge (Light)

=

10 - (Base Armor / 2)

Base Dodge (Medium)

=

10 - ((Base Armor-1) / 2)

Base Dodge (Heavy)

=

10 - ((Base Armor-2) / 2)

Base Dodge (Natural)

=

10 - (Base Armor / 2)

In addition to Base Dodge defense, each piece of Armor can yield additional Bonus Dodge defense depending on the wearer's Dexterity ability score exceeds a certain Dodge Scaling Threshold. Bonus Dodge is also increased by the item's Enchantment Tier which is described below.

Bonus Dodge

=

Max(Dexterity - Scaling Threshold, 0) + Enchantment Bonus

Quality Tier

Quality of Armor describes its craftsmanship, materials, and condition. Quality tiers provide an additional bonus to Armor defense and increase item rarity. The quality tier of Armor is established at its time of initial creation and can never be increased after that point.

Quality TierBonus ArmorRarity Modifier
Shoddy-2-1
Standard00
Fine+1+1
Superior+2+2
Masterwork+3+4

Enchantment Tier

Enchantment of Armor describes its level of magical imbuement. Enchantment provides further increases to Bonus Dodge defense and increases item rarity. Armor can be enchanted after its original creation or have its enchantment improved.

Enchantment TierBonus DodgeRarity Modifier
Mundane00
Minor+1+2
Major+2+4
Legendary+3+6

Broken Armor

During the course of use, or over the passage of time, Armor may become Broken. Armor which is Broken only benefits from half its normal Armor Defense.

Special Properties

Some Armor may have one (or in very rare cases multiple) of the following special properties. Each of these properties adds a +1 Rarity modifier to the Armor.

Bulky

Armor that is Bulky is cumbersome to wield and conveys a penalty of +2 Banes to all Initiative rolls.

Spellcraft Overview.name: 施法概览 Spellcraft Overview
Spellcraft Overview.text:
施法是《Crucible》系统中对魔法进行实现的特定技艺与理论。角色对施法的熟练度会通过作为角色成长一部分所学习的天赋而提升。《Crucible》的施法系统旨在具备动态性与生成性，让希望专注于施法的玩家能够即兴发挥，并发现其魔法能力的有效组合与应用。

施法系统目前仍在开发中，虽然已经可以使用，但预计会在未来的 Crucible 版本中经历大幅修订与迭代。试玩测试一中对施法系统的实现，应当能够让人洞察其机制与计划中的功能。

大师级构图

施法允许角色通过使用一个 @UUID[.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{符文}、一个 @UUID[.lhrYInsQ2f0YfhTu]{手势}，以及可选的一个 @UUID[.ELOcfx6LPZMh74y8]{屈折} 来构成法术，从而显现魔法。

  • 符文代表基础的魔法本质（例如灵魂或火焰），这些形而上概念结合起来，构成现实的法则。

  • 手势代表将符文化为法术的过程，运用身体动作作为姿势成分来塑造（例如创造或箭矢）符文的力量，使其以特定方式发挥作用。

  • 屈折代表进一步的变化或修饰（例如迅捷化或拉引），并通过发声来改变法术成形的方式。

随着你的角色学习提供施法构成要素的天赋，这些要素将显示在你角色卡的魔典标签页中，并可通过施放法术动作使用。学习这些构成要素并发现新的法术组合，这一过程旨在为投入施法的角色提供一种富有回报的魔法实验与叙事发展的体验。

从语言学的角度来理解施法系统的规则与结构会很有帮助。如果把法术看作一个句子，那么每个法术都必须有一个符文（名词）和一个手势（动词），并且还可以选择包含一个屈折（形容词/副词）来修饰其中之一。

用于攻击对手的法术遵循 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.lZfPVvBSsCEqlte4]{攻击检定} 的规则，但攻击的属性加值与基础伤害会根据所使用的符文和手势组合而变化。

示例：炎术师扎拉贾

扎拉贾是一名野心勃勃的 6级术士，致力于精通元素魔法的技艺。扎拉贾知晓火焰、念动力和闪电这几种符文，也掌握了触碰（自动习得）、影响和箭矢这几种手势。此外，扎拉贾还学会了迅捷化屈折。使用这些构成要素后，扎拉贾可以接触到 18 种形成法术的不同组合。

扎拉贾最喜欢的法术是迅捷化火焰箭矢，这让她能够以1 动作和2 专注点为代价，向最远 10 格外的单一目标投掷一枚奥术火焰投射物。火焰符文以反射防御为目标，并对生命值造成火元素伤害。箭矢和火焰都以智力进行成长，因此这个法术的效果只会随着单一属性值智力而提升。

当扎拉贾向一头俯冲的蝎狮兽施放迅捷化火焰箭矢时，她的法术攻击检定掷出了28，超过了蝎狮兽21的反射防御。这个7 点溢出伤害再加上箭矢手势的10 点基础伤害，最终对敌人造成总计17 点火元素伤害。

由于这次攻击同时也是一次重击，蝎狮兽因扎拉贾的炎术师天赋而浑身起火，该天赋会施加燃烧状态，从而造成额外的持续伤害。

魔法的代价

每个魔法法术都有代价——无论是在战斗中使用，还是用于战斗外的收益。一般来说，这种代价以 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resources0000000#capacity-for-action]{专注点} 的形式支付，但在某些情况下，代价也可能使用其他资源或有其他要求。

当你构建法术时，法术在动作点和专注点上的消耗可能会根据你对 @UUID[.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{符文}、@UUID[.lhrYInsQ2f0YfhTu]{手势} 和 @UUID[.ELOcfx6LPZMh74y8]{屈折} 的选择而变化。

Spellcraft is the particular art and theory of magic as implemented in the Crucible system. Proficiecy with spellcraft advances through Talents that are learned as part of character progression. The Crucible spellcraft system is designed to be dynamic and generative, allowing players who wish to focus their character on spellcasting to improvise and discover effective combinations and applications for their magical abilities.

The Spellcraft system is still a work-in-progress and, while functional, is expected to undergo substantial revision and iteration in future Crucible releases. The implementation of the Spellcraft system in Playtest One should provide insight into its mechanics and planned functionality.

Masterful Composition

Spellcraft allows characters to manifest magic by composing a spell using a @UUID[.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{Rune}, @UUID[.lhrYInsQ2f0YfhTu]{Gesture}, and optionally an @UUID[.ELOcfx6LPZMh74y8]{Inflection}.

  • Runes represent the base magical essence (such as Spirit or Flame), metaphysical concepts that combine to form the laws of reality.

  • Gestures represent the forming of the rune into a spell, using physical motion as a somatic component which shape (such as Create or Arrow) a Rune's power, causing it to act in a specific way.

  • Inflections represent a further change or modification (such as Quicken or Pull), and use vocalization to alter how a spell is formed.

As your character learns Talents which provide Spellcraft components, these components will appear on the Grimoire tab of your character sheet and become usable through the Cast a Spell action. The process of learning components and discovering new spell combinations is intended to provide a rewarding experience of magical experimentation and narrative development for characters which invest into Spellcraft.

It is useful to think of the rules and structure of the Spellcraft system linguistically. If you think of a spell as a sentence, each spell must have a Rune (noun) and a Gesture (verb), and may optionally include an Inflection (adjective/adverb) that modifies either.

Spells which attack an opponent follow the rules of @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.lZfPVvBSsCEqlte4]{Attack Rolls}, with changes to the Ability Bonus and Base Damage of the attack depending on the combination of Rune and Gesture used.

Example: Zarajah the Pyromancer

Zarajah is an ambitious Level 6 sorcerer who strives to master the arts of elemental magic. Zarajah knows the runes for Flame, Kinesis, and Lightning as well as gestures for Touch (automatically learned), Influence, and Arrow. Additionally, Zarajah has also learned the Quicken inflection. Using these components, Zarajah has access to 18 different combinations which form Spells.

Zarajah's favorite spell is Quickened Arrow of Flame which allows her to hurl a projectile of arcane fire at a single target up to 10 spaces distant at the cost of 1 Action and 2 Focus points. The Flame rune targets Reflex defense and deals Fire Damage to Health. Arrow and Flame both scale using Intellect, so the effectiveness of this spell scales using only Intellect as a single ability score.

When Zarajah casts a Quickened Arrow of Flame towards a swooping Manticore, she rolls a 28 on her spell attack roll, beating the Manticore's Reflex defense of 21. This 7 Overflow Damage is increased by the 10 Base Damage of the Arrow gesture, resulting in a total of 17 Fire Damage dealt to the foe.

Since this attack is also a Critical Hit, the Manticore bursts into flame due to Zarajah's Pyromancer talent which inflicts the Burning condition causing additional damage-over-time.

The Cost of Magic

Every magic spell has a cost- whether used within a combat situation or for out-of-combat benefits. Generally, this cost is paid in the form of @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.characterMechani.JournalEntryPage.Resources0000000#capacity-for-action]{Focus Points}, though in some situations the cost may use other resources or have other requirements.

As you construct your spells, the cost of the spell in Action Points and Focus Points may change based on your choice of @UUID[.p3hKRiZN3x0DEtyG]{Rune}, @UUID[.lhrYInsQ2f0YfhTu]{Gesture} and @UUID[.ELOcfx6LPZMh74y8]{Inflection}.

Gestures.name: 手势 Gestures
Gestures.text:
手势是为施法目的引导符文所需的物理性、姿势性成分。手势决定了法术在从由符文支配的原始魔法能量转化为这种力量的显现时，将采取何种形态。手势会设定魔法法术的特定属性，通常包括动作点与专注点消耗、射程（或尺寸）、目标类型和形状。手势还决定成长伤害公式的一半，另一半则由符文决定。

起始手势

任何知晓任意符文的施法者都会自动获得“触碰”手势，它提供了使用该符文的基础能力。想要更高级地运用该符文，则需要结合更高级的手势。

触碰

你将符文的奥术能量强化为一次贴身攻击。触碰手势使用敏捷成长，并以1英尺射程指定单个生物作为目标，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成6基础伤害。施放该手势需要1只手，基础消耗为2动作和1专注。

第1阶手势

第1阶手势（角色等级1-5）提供了广泛的施法构图基础，使你能够将符文塑造成各种攻击性或防御性的形式。

第2阶手势

Gestures are the physical, somatic components required to invoke a rune for Spellcraft purposes. Gestures determine the shape a spell will take as it is translated from the raw magical energies governed by a Rune into a manifestation of that power. Gestures set particular properties of a magical spell, usually the cost in Action and Focus points, range (or size), targeting type, and shape. Gestures also determine one-half of the scaling damage formula, with Rune as the other half.

Starting Gesture

Any spellcaster who knows any Rune automatically has access to the Touch gesture which provides a basic capability to use that Rune. More advanced usages of that Rune require incorporating more advanced Gestures.

Touch

You empower the arcane energy of a Rune into a hand-to-hand attack. The Touch gesture scales using Dexterity and targets a single creature at a range of 1 foot, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Tier 1 Gestures

Tier 1 gestures (character levels 1-5) provide wide-ranging fundamentals of spellcraft composition that allows shaping Runes into a variety of offensive or defensive forms.

Inflections.name: 屈折 Inflections
Inflections.text:
屈折是可选的言语成分，用于修改法术效果，通常会强化或替换法术可能具有的某些属性。屈折几乎可以改变符文或手势赋予法术的任何属性，并且还可能对法术的用途产生额外效果。

尽管一些屈折已为试玩测试1实装，但未来阶段还计划加入更多屈折。下方列出的一些屈折目前可能尚未被完整实装或自动化。

Iconic Spells.name: 标志性法术 Iconic Spells
Iconic Spells.text:
除了构筑法术之外，投入施法天赋还会解锁标志性法术栏位，使你获得少量你已知的特殊法术。这些标志性法术具有专门的效果，而这些效果无法通过构筑法术系统以其他方式实现，并涵盖了像 Crucible 这样的系统所需的广泛魔法能力。

学习标志性法术

每个角色都拥有一定数量的标志性法术栏位——初始为零。学习某些施法天赋时，你会额外获得一个标志性法术栏位，随后只要你具备学习该法术所需的前置知识，便可用一个标志性法术填入其中。

替换标志性法术

当你的角色提升等级时，你可以——如果你愿意——从你的已知标志性法术中移除一个，腾出该法术栏位，以填入另一个标志性法术。

In addition to Composed Spells, investment into spellcraft talents unlocks Iconic Spell slots which provide a limited number of special spells which you know. These Iconic Spells have specialized effects which are not otherwise possible via the Composed Spell system and cover the breadth of magical capability that a system like Crucible requires.

Learning Iconic Spells

Each character has a certain number of Iconic Spell slots — initially zero. When learning certain spellcraft talents, you will gain an additional Iconic Spell slot which can then be populated with an Iconic Spell provided you possess the prerequisite knowledge to learn it.

Replacing Iconic Spells

When your character advances in level you may — if you wish — remove one known Iconic Spell from your repertoire, freeing that spell slot to be filled with an alternative Iconic Spell.

Countermagic.name: 反制魔法 Countermagic
Countermagic.text:
反制魔法是魔法防御的技艺，通过编织对立的施法来抵消对手正在施放的法术。构筑一个合适的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000]{反制法术} 需要一定程度的魔法知识，以及以非对称方式处理这些知识的能力，因为你未必总能掌握正确构筑对立所需的全部信息。对魔法有深刻理解的人，或许能够轻易辨认出所使用的特定符文的明显迹象，识别一个手势，或解读一种屈折，并由此推知一个法术的用途。熟习反制魔法的人，可能会找到独特的方法来扰乱一个正在施放的法术，包括在其初生之时便抽离其中的魔法能量。

@Embed[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000 inline]

Countermagic is the art of magical defence, weaving opposing spellcraft to negate the spell being cast by an opponent. Constructing a proper @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000]{Counterspell} requires a degree of magical knowledge and an ability to process that knowledge in an asymmetric way, as you may not always have all the information needed to build your opposition correctly. Someone with a deep understanding of magic may be able to easily identify the telltale signs of specific Runes being used, identify a gesture, or interpret an inflection and glean the purpose of a spell. Someone practiced in Countermagic may find unique ways to disrupt a spell being cast, including sapping the magical energies from it at inception.

@Embed[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000 inline]

Welcome To Crucible.name: 欢迎来到Crucible Welcome To Crucible

What is Crucible.name: 什么是《Crucible》 What is Crucible
What is Crucible.text:
Crucible 是一套创新且现代的角色扮演游戏（RPG）系统，作为数字平台专为 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 打造。

Crucible 从零开始设计，旨在利用 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 的独特能力，创造令人兴奋且快节奏的游戏体验，让游戏主持人和玩家能够专注于最重要的事情：讲述一个引人入胜的故事。

Crucible 的核心在于通过无职业系统和角色成长的多重支柱，实现有意义且赋予玩家主导感的角色晋升。该系统的骰子机制支持复杂且富有战术深度的遭遇，可涵盖战斗、探索或社交挑战。

Crucible 既是一款角色扮演游戏，也是一个软件引擎。该游戏系统提供了高度深入的机制复杂性，但其规则已被完整编码，以一致且自动化的方式加以应用。系统在设计上有意消除高复杂度纸笔系统中普遍存在的繁琐记录负担。

开发状态

Crucible 现已开放其Alpha 试玩测试，让社区得以首次了解该系统、设计支柱和预期方向。系统目前具备中等程度的功能性，但仍处于开发早期。系统的所有部分都仍在开发中，有些部分甚至尚未开始开发。此次试玩测试为我们提供了收集早期反馈并与社区分享成果的机会。请以开放的心态来体验，并理解你所看到的内容距离成品仍有很长的路要走。

系统文档中像这样的区块用于标示系统中仍需大量开发的部分。其目的是让你了解哪些区域目前是有意保持未完成状态的。

Crucible 的开发采取双线并进的方式，同时以同等重点推进角色扮演游戏的系统机制开发以及这些机制的软件实现。随着游戏机制不断演进，游戏系统的新开发内容将使这些功能能够用于测试。试玩测试流程使我们能够征求并受益于反馈，从而帮助我们迭代游戏规则以及 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 中的用户体验。我们预计会进行多轮反馈收集，每一轮都聚焦于游戏体验的不同方面。

第一次试玩测试

第一次试玩测试，@UUID[Compendium.crucible.playtest.Adventure.F8AILycmdj2kuOVa]{试玩测试 1 - 英勇之戒}，重点关注 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{角色创建} 和 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c]{战斗遭遇}。此次试玩测试提供了对 Crucible 游戏系统的简要介绍，涵盖角色创建、骰子机制、战斗遭遇和升级。试玩测试从 1级 开始，并将角色推进至 6级，使他们能够在测试的每次挑战之间不断成长和晋升。

请注意，此次试玩测试中展示的规则和机制并非最终版本。大多数天赋、技能和规则都会在后续开发阶段进一步精炼。

余烬

作为我们原创设定与史诗冒险 Ember 的一部分，还有更多 Crucible 内容可供体验，目前该作品正处于 Kickstarter Beta 测试阶段。Ember 现已开放预购，并将包含一部面向 Crucible 的大型战役，跨越数年游戏时间，带领你的队伍将角色从 1级 提升到 12级（甚至更高）。

Crucible is an innovative and modern role-playing game (RPG) system built exclusively for Foundry Virtual Tabletop as a digital platform.

Crucible is designed from the ground up to leverage the unique capabilities of Foundry Virtual Tabletop to create exciting and fast-paced gameplay that allow gamemasters and players to focus on what matters most: telling a compelling story.

At the heart of Crucible is meaningful and empowering character advancement through a class-less system with multiple pillars of character progression. The system’s dice mechanics allow for crunchy and tactically rich encounters featuring combat, exploration, or social challenges.

Crucible is both a role-playing game and a software engine. The game system offers a deep level of mechanical sophistication, but its rules are entirely encoded to be applied with consistency and automation. The system is built intentionally to eliminate the cumbersome bookkeeping that is prevalent in high-crunch pen-and-paper systems.

Development Status

Crucible is now available for its Alpha Playtest which provides the community with a first look at the system, design pillars, and intended direction. The system is moderately functional, but still early in development. All areas of the system are works-in-progress and some areas are not yet developed at all. This playtest offers a chance for us to collect early feedback and share our work with the community. Please approach it with an open mind and an understanding that what you are seeing is still a long way from a finished product.

Blocks like this one in the system documentation highlight areas of the system that still require substantial development. These are intended to make you aware of areas that are intentionally unfinished at this time.

Development of Crucible is two-pronged with an equal focus on developing the system mechanics of the roleplaying game and the software implementation of those mechanics simultaneously. As the game mechanics evolve, new developments of the game system will enable those features for use in testing. The playtest process allows us to solicit and benefit from feedback that helps us iterate on the game rules and the user experience in Foundry Virtual Tabletop. We anticipate hosting multiple rounds of feedback, each focusing on a different aspect of the game experience.

Playtest One

The first playtest, @UUID[Compendium.crucible.playtest.Adventure.F8AILycmdj2kuOVa]{Playtest 1 - The Ring of Valor}, is focused on @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation} and @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c]{Combat Encounters}. This playtest provides an abbreviated introduction to the Crucible game system, covering character creation, dice mechanics, combat encounters, and level advancement. The playtest begins at level 1 and advances characters through level 6 allowing them to evolve and advance their character between each challenge of the test.

Please note that the rules and mechanics featured in this playtest are not final. Most talents, skills, and rules will be further refined during later phases of development.

Ember

There is far more Crucible content available as part of our original setting and epic adventure Ember, which is now in Kickstarter Beta testing phase. Ember is available for pre-order, and will contain an immense campaign for Crucible spanning several years of gameplay taking your party from character level 1 to 12 (or beyond).

System Cornerstones.name: 系统基石 System Cornerstones
System Cornerstones.text:
Crucible 的构建基于以下核心要点和设计原则。

具有实质影响的角色成长

Crucible 的一个主要目标，是提供能够带来有意义、令人兴奋且富有影响力的角色成长系统。在 Crucible 中创建并推进一个角色，应当是愉快且切实有影响的体验，因为你会获得新的能力，这些能力会明确地演变你的玩法风格与角色形象。

基于方格的战略战斗

Crucible 的游戏机制旨在应用于带有结构化网格的遭遇地图或区域地图，该网格定义角色之间的距离与位置，从而在战斗中围绕移动创造出战术选择。移动动作与代价、交战、夹击、掩护、范围效果能力等，都是为战斗增添战术层次与动态变化的方式。

一致的自动化机制

Crucible 的一个关键目标，是设计并实现能够无缝自动化，或至少在理论上可以无缝自动化的机制。我们不希望自动化因为需要繁琐记录而分散游戏体验的注意力——但我们也希望那些被自动化的底层游戏机制，对于桌上的玩家来说依然是可以理解的。我们不希望某些机制仅仅因为前面加了一层自动化，就变得高深莫测。在 Crucible 中，你会见到设计优雅且直观的游戏机制；而我们对这些机制进行全面自动化的方式，意味着你可以继续专注于角色扮演的乐趣。

带上你自己的故事

Crucible 在优化与设计时，着眼于长篇叙事。虽然它也可以用于单次冒险，但这套系统的机制本就是为了在数月甚至数年的游戏团过程中逐步展开。

Crucible 在叙事、角色个人故事或人际关系发展方面，提供的基于规则的指引相对较少——这是刻意为之，以便将这些叙事支柱留给游戏主持人和玩家，用他们最偏好的设定或讲故事风格去探索。

Crucible 有意不定义一个官方正典设定。该系统为游戏主持人提供工具，使其能够将系统应用于各种不同的设定。一般来说，Crucible 在偏写实、粗粝的奇幻设定中表现最佳，但它也可以调整用于其他类型与基调。

强力而易用

Crucible 被设计成一个易于学习、也易于使用的系统。游戏主持人应当感到自己获得了充分支持，能够讲述他们想讲的故事；玩家也应当能够扮演他们想扮演的角色。我们希望 Crucible 的游戏机制既有足够的规则深度与战略性，同时又能以一种直观且易于投入乐趣的方式呈现给玩家。

Crucible is built with the following cornerstones and design principles in mind.

Consequential Character Progression

A primary goal for Crucible is to provide systems for meaningful, exciting, and impactful character progression. Creating and advancing a character in Crucible should be enjoyable and impactful as you gain access to new capabilities that tangibly evolve your playstyle and character persona.

Strategic Grid-Based Combat

Game mechanics in Crucible are designed for application to encounter or area maps with a structured grid which defines distances and positions of characters to create tactical choices about movement during combat. Movement actions and costs, engagement, flanking, cover, area-of-effect abilities, and more are all ways to add tactical nuance and dynamism to combat.

Consistently Automated Mechanics

A key goal for Crucible is to design and implement mechanics which are seamlessly automated or theoretically capable of seamless automation. We don't want automation that distracts from gameplay with the need for bookkeeping - but we also want the underlying game mechanics which are automated to be understandable to players at the table. We don't want mechanics which are inscrutable simply because we have a layer of automation in front of them. In Crucible you will find game mechanics which are elegantly and intuitively designed, but our approach to full automation of those mechanics means you can stay focused on the fun of roleplaying.

Bring Your Own Story

Crucible is optimized and designed with extended-form narrative in mind. While it can be used for one-shot adventures, the system's mechanics are intended to play out over months or years of game sessions.

Crucible provides relatively little rule-based guidance around narrative, personal character story, or the development of intrapersonal relationships - deliberately leaving these narrative pillars for the Game Master and players to explore using whatever setting or storytelling style they most prefer.

Crucible intentionally does not define a canonical setting. The system provides Gamemasters with tools to apply the system to a variety of settings. As a general rule of thumb, Crucible will work best in a gritty fantasy setting but it can be adapted for other genres and tones.

Ease of Powerful Use

Crucible is designed to be a system which is easy to learn and easy to use. Gamemasters should feel empowered to tell the stories they want to tell, and players to play the characters they want to play. We want game mechanics in Crucible to be crunchy and strategic while being presented to players in a way that is intuitive and fun to engage with.

Providing Feedback.name: 提供反馈 Providing Feedback
Providing Feedback.text:
作为试玩测试流程的一部分，我们会请用户提交他们使用 Crucible 的体验反馈。我们将收集并整理这些数据，以帮助我们识别游戏中需要改进的部分、收集需要修复的错误，并帮助我们确定新功能开发的优先级。

通过 Google Forms 提交正式反馈

我们目前暂不收集反馈表单回复，但会在后续的试玩测试更新中重新开放反馈表单。

通过 Discord 提交常规反馈

Foundry Virtual Tabletop 社区的 Discord 服务器是 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 讨论与反馈的主要中心，我们已设置了一个专门用于试玩测试反馈的频道。我们设有一个专门用于试玩测试反馈的频道，并鼓励用户加入服务器并参与讨论。请在我们的 Discord 服务器中的 #crucible 频道加入讨论。

As part of the playtest process, we ask users to submit feedback on their experience with Crucible. This data will be collected and collated to help us identify areas of the game which need improvement, collect bugs that need to be fixed, and help us prioritize the development of new features.

Formal Feedback via Google Forms

We are not collecting feedback form responses at this time but will be re-opening the feedback form as part of a subsequent playtest update.

General Feedback via Discord

The Foundry Virtual Tabletop community Discord server is a primary hub for discussion and feedback for Foundry Virtual Tabletop, and we've configured a dedicated channel for playtest feedback. We have a dedicated channel for playtest feedback, and we encourage users to join the server and participate in the discussion. Please join the discussion in the #crucible channel of our Discord server.

License.name: 许可 License
License.text:
在此次试玩测试期间，Crucible 仅向一部分精选的 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 用户发布，其中包括我们的 Patreon 会员以及从我们社区中精心挑选的一些用户。

在这些初期试玩测试期间，Crucible 不提供可用于创建第三方内容，或修改该系统及其规则的许可。

我们计划在未来提供一份宽松的许可，使其他人既可用其创建插件，也可创建第三方内容，并可出于商业及非商业目的进行分享。该系统的代码库将采用与使用该系统制作内容所适用的许可分开的另一份许可。

At the time of this playtest, Crucible is being released exclusively to a select group of Foundry Virtual Tabletop users including our Patreon membership and a number of hand-picked users from our community.

During these initial playtests, Crucible does not provide a license which can be used to create third party content or to modify the system or its rules.

It is our intent in the future to provide a favourable license which others may use both for creating addons and third-party content that they may share for both commercial and non-commercial purposes. The codebase for the system will be a separate license from the license for producing content using the system.

Module Recommendations.name: 模组推荐 Module Recommendations
Module Recommendations.text:
与 Foundry Virtual Tabletop 中的任何游戏系统一样，模块可以增强并提升游戏体验的品质。不过，我们确实请求初版 Crucible 试玩测试的测试者在尽量少装模块的环境中体验该游戏系统，以确保你的体验与反馈能够恰当地、明确地对应 Crucible 系统本身的功能。如果你安装的模块更少，你的试玩测试反馈对我们会更有帮助。

Ember

作为我们原创设定与史诗冒险 Ember 的一部分，目前还有更多 Crucible 内容可供体验，该项目现已进入 Kickstarter Beta 测试阶段。Ember 现已开放预购，并将包含一部庞大的 Crucible 战役，跨越数年的游戏流程，带领你的队伍将角色等级从1级提升到12级（或更高）。

Dice So Nice

Crucible 游戏系统在设计时已将 Dice So Nice 模块的使用纳入考量。进行掷骰时，Crucible 会利用 Dice So Nice 的功能，为任何包含恩惠的掷骰赋予正向发光效果；同样地，也会为任何带有祸骰的掷骰赋予负向发光效果。

As with any game system in Foundry Virtual Tabletop, Modules can enhance and augment the quality of gameplay experience. We do, however, request that testers of the initial Crucible Playtest try out the game system in a module-light environment in order to ensure that your experience and your feedback is appropriate and specific to the functionality of the Crucible system. Your playtest feedback will be more useful to us if you have fewer modules installed.

Ember

There is far more Crucible content available as part of our original setting and epic adventure Ember, which is now in Kickstarter Beta testing phase. Ember is available for pre-order, and will contain an immense campaign for Crucible spanning several years of gameplay taking your party from character level 1 to 12 (or beyond).

Dice So Nice

The Crucible game system is designed with use of the Dice So Nice module in mind. When rolling, Crucible leverages the features of Dice So Nice to give a positive glow effect to any roll which contain Boons, and similarly a negative glow effect to any rolls which have Banes.
